body:
We're helping to build a warchest of funds for the two Democrats who run for these open Florida seats - we need your urgent help!
Chip in NOW so we can flip these red seats blue >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]

Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]

subject: Elon Musk + 𝘔𝘚𝘕𝘉𝘊 = TERRIBLE

body:
We’re stunned...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22640%2E4449941%2E_l60b6)
---
**BAD NEWS:** _MSNBC’s_ sharp drop in recent ratings has led to Comcast deciding to sell the network. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241214_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22640%2E4449941%2E_l60b6) **WORSE NEWS:** Far-right billionaire Elon Musk is considering purchasing it!

We’re **stunned** to see that MSNBC is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re conducting an _URGENT_ poll to see our top supporters viewing habits:** | **[_[1-CLICK POLL] Do you watch _MSNBC?__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241214_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22640%2E4449941%2E_l60b6)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241214_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=22640%2E4449941%2E_l60b6) | **[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241214_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=22640%2E4449941%2E_l60b6)**
---
**[NO, I DON'T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241214_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=22640%2E4449941%2E_l60b6)**
**** 500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE. ****
Donald Trump and his MAGA army have waged a war against any news channel that doesn’t bow down to him and promote his dangerous rhetoric.

_Now, Trump’s biggest supporter is trying to buy it and RUIN one of the most trusted news sources in America._

We need to know if our supporters are still watching MSNBC or if they’ve abandoned the once beloved network.
**[_So PLEASE: submit your poll response quickly! »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241214_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=22640%2E4449941%2E_l60b6)**
**500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM**
Thank you for your commitment to upholding democracy,

-FFR Polling Team
_MSNBC_ is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
please don’t ignore this!
| **🚨 URGENT 🚨
Trump Has Sights Set on Prosecuting Political Rivals — Including Jack Smith ** Friend, despite Jack Smith announcing he’s stepping down, Donald Trump is STILL out for revenge. **He’s not only plotting to DESTROY all evidence against him, but PROSECUTE Jack Smith!** [**We need 99 more Democrats in your area to sign our letter thanking Jack Smith for his work and standing with him against these vile attacks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85496?t=6&akid=18230%2E878179%2Ew7rh7F) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85496?t=7&akid=18230%2E878179%2Ew7rh7F)
---
To: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_I am FURIOUS that Trump is seeking to prosecute you!_**

Trump is running scared because he KNOWS you’re about to drop hundreds of pages of evidence detailing his treasonous crimes.

He’s even promising to be a _“dictator on day one,”_ hell-bent on avenging anyone who has held him accountable.

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your amazing work over the years to bring Donald Trump to justice! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85496?t=8&akid=18230%2E878179%2Ew7rh7F) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85496?t=9&akid=18230%2E878179%2Ew7rh7F)
---

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18230%2E878179%2Ew7rh7F). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18230%2E878179%2Ew7rh7F).**

subject: BREAKING: New cabinet pick under SIEGE.

body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EB9/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
|
---
Trump’s new Attorney General pick Pam Bondi has thrown the radical-left into a frenzy.
They’re TERRIFIED of what Pam will do when she’s AG.
**Just take a look at her America-First Record:**

* Pam Bondi has stood by President Trump’s side as his lawyer during the SHAM impeachment trials.
* Has been TOUGH on ILLEGALS invading Florida.
* SAVED countless lives by reducing the flow of dangerous fentanyl.

As the Attorney General, she will show JUST how corrupt DC has become, _**but her chances of being appointed are slimming by the second.**_
But as you read this The Fake News has launched a devastating onslaught of attacks, calling her another MAGA Extremist & DESTROYING her good name.
_**[Sadly, she could be disqualified if we don’t act.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EB9/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ _**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBa/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBa/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

clean_body: Do you see our dilemma? 2025 is jam-packed. With so much on the line for state Democrats, we need to make this year count. So we’re turning to you to help fuel the work ahead. | | | | | ---|--- Since launching our membership drive last month our numbers have already started to drop off. | December 2024 Membership Goal Active Members: Over 2,200 Membership Goal:2,500 With Republicans preparing to take full control of the federal government, there is too much at stake to slow down our work to build Democratic power in the states. State Democrats are facing nearly a dozen special elections in the coming months. Trump’s far-right allies are gearing up to spread Project 2025 in state legislatures nationwide. AND in Virginia, Democrats are defending our majorities in TWO chambers next month. Do you see our dilemma? 2025 is jam-packed. With so much on the line for state Democrats, we need to make this year count. So we’re turning to you. As an avid grassroots supporter, will you activate your 2025 membership and help our team gear up for tough fights ahead? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Becoming a member provides Democrats with the early investments we need to win in competitive races. We’re counting on local Democrats to step up and join our 2025 membership list before time runs out. Don’t miss this opportunity, DLCC Membership Team ** The information provided above is associated with the following email address: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you have donated in the past with a different email, by check, or to another organization or party committee, that will not be reflected here. We appreciate your continued support! | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . name: Sean Themea
subject: I used to support Obama
body:
Government is the problem... and freedom is the answer.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6sk50go6j3tig0qi1jhjruke9nqgt0u88utjto8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)
Friend,

When I say the liberty movement changed my life, I’m not exaggerating.

Believe it or not, it was actually in college where I STOPPED being an Obama supporter.

I used to be your typical liberal college student. I supported big government programs to take care of us from cradle to grave and that if we had the right people in power, we could use the government to solve all our problems.

But, it was at college that I came across a student organization called Young Americans for Liberty (YAL).

And my life changed forever.

Through YAL, I learned about free market economics from Milton Friedman. I learned about limited government and individualism from Thomas Sowell. I learned about the Constitution from Ron Paul.

Most importantly, I realized government is not the solution to our problems...

Government _is_ the problem... and _freedom_ is the answer.

Inspired by this new philosophy, I also discovered something I never knew I was good at - organizing students.

Now, I am the Chief Operating Officer at YAL.

And with over 400 chapters on college campuses across the country, the fight for liberty is stronger than ever.

But education alone is not enough. What makes YAL different is that we take direct action to get students politically active.

And under YAL’s flagship program, Operation Win at the Door (OWD), our students knock on doors to help elect liberty legislators and get pro-liberty legislation passed.

Liberty won BIG in 2024. YAL-trained activists have now helped elect over 400 principled, pro-liberty legislators through OWD. YAL has also helped pass pro-liberty laws, including:
* Constitutional Carry in Texas and Louisiana
* Property Tax Relief in North Dakota
* School Choice in Arizona
* Free Speech Protections on college campuses in Indiana

Now here’s the next step: **passing pro-liberty legislation in 2025**.

[The single most important thing you can do to Make Liberty Win in 2025 is fuel the fight to pass legislation that not only preserves but expands liberty. Can I count on you to join me in this fight with a donation of $20.24, $50, $100, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent donation today! >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zptk9o7q7pmridbsdsgav43i3kr1e8e52091c7r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)
[**Donate**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdg0o0hivu3opfqi9s2iltgjn9jslgth1tpabk3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)
**Operation Win at the Door**

This critical program is the way YAL advances liberty from the grassroots level to the halls of government...

Here are 5 REMARKABLE facts about YAL’s Operation Win at the Door (OWD).
1. OWD student activists have knocked on over 6 MILLION doors to help elect over 400 liberty legislators.
2. Thanks to student door knockers, liberty candidates outperformed Republicans, including President Trump, in Maine, New Hampshire, and Minnesota!
3. Alongside YAL, liberty legislators have passed 753 pro-liberty bills since 2018, including property tax relief in North Dakota, school choice in Arizona, criminal justice reform in Kentucky, and many more...
4. Over half of all Establishment GOP incumbents who lost in a primary and over two-thirds of all GOP leaders who lost on November 5th were ousted through the efforts of YAL-recruited students!
5. Operation Win at the Door’s mobilization efforts swing races by 6-15%.

[As a personal favor to me, can you please donate $250, $50, or even $10 today? Click here to donate. ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhjmtro5rk34us7doikhdfilkaspkk77m1s926ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)

Here’s how it works.

**STEP 1:** Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus. YAL identifies and recruits thousands of students each year from college campuses who believe in the cause of freedom (and even converts new students like me!)

**STEP 2:** YAL trains student activists in everything they need to know in order to effectively advance the ideas of liberty, including door-to-door and phone banking.

**STEP 3 (Operation Win at the Door):** YAL’s army of youth activists flood electoral districts and make three door-knocking passes to help tip the scales in favor of the liberty candidate.

The record speaks for itself.

These student door knockers did their part in 2024 to elect a full bench of pro-liberty candidates. Now it’s time to put in the hard work of transforming the states into beacons of liberty.

[Please send your urgent donation today to help us pass pro-liberty legislation in 2025. Your support is critical to reaching our goal of $122,000 before midnight on December 31st.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd56fa4be5mlqcfjhcksjtvrnnu0sjdn8574slpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)
**[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z55pporu2kk29ff5d3804q83islag78d0vc747i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)**

[**Donate $20.24**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zifspbtk3tegaartuj2u643f1jedmgmatpl7vm0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)

[**Donate $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjh7e14duc7neppoenh3uv370ocs1krvmgkg37oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)

[**Donate $100**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq4ma57941o4mhhvvpblufujg7gmimuk6nqtgmf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)

[**Donate $250**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqtr0gblec048tp3c1ov846mdq9sfsj5jebs6rmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)

[**Donate $500**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu9nfgu7q9skq7oflkm83fdfam9hv9oj498p5eig_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)

[**Donate $2,300**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztofib39lanivokvpmi17vdoqdi82nt1vq8u281o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)
I know that each and every student YAL reaches on campus has the chance to save them from the siren song of socialism... I’m living proof of it.

And we can channel that newfound love of liberty into real political impact through Operation Win at the Door.

This winning combination is helping us slash big government policies across the country.

**You can help YAL awaken a lifelong love of Liberty in the next generation and fight for pro-liberty legislation by donating today!**
[**Donate**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z199bnmv1vbs41d7s0lhmk52fed717ff0ovd2boo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj2clh2bs)
Thank you,

Sean Themea
Chief Operating Officer
Young Americans for Liberty

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This email breaks a lot of the rules
body:
Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl64qb4de7u2icbjdb7rsnf5653jlagpdc7f3528_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)
Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrrdhus2ubkl50s9j7nldcc4fviasm6u2u0nk9g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
**Defending Parental Rights** While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zesdatjgl9ohlccahba9seu9qr0i6v3sos82pgfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeftncnefo9vh95f1murns0nishg2hcnlljl9kho_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhef32m5v20cbp53q2bgajdvt6c915gtuemcvp38_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3se18ku5l1ea040hdth6utb3tfc7h20hkfv5sio_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn8u3vk8scucjhf9uvtjrlqnevjani33aqghrahg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh8ogb8145gh9svqugco5s1g05netp51qact8rco_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdc5rlg0fvd5p7sq6m5pjp9a3oap0n8elbj7btc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9m177d8sdljc857q97pbkjnggrvc6aucc5ov3n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zegdds22e378p9i0ti2qdk56cvl007c55ia3b88g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imcoj6clh2bs)
**School Choice** Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

The Goldwater Institute’s exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality.

subject: This email breaks a lot of the rules
body:
Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zio3pr7lvn4d7at33p9ro91fki9t3ro38jfnlpno_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im2p32c9h2bs)
Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqml00rn5gpts0iu3vmdni065rga0o7ei034ni9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im2p32c9h2bs)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
**Defending Parental Rights** While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf0ea3g11qumva8crhaa8m18q3fguibb34hosf88_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im2p32c9h2bs)

I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute’s exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It’s so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute’s latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn’t have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don’t have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. American Defense News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn04fvsa97htlke6uug70vqrp2q312avcq2oiqh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im6o74cjh2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmsimh6h73qah0j1h6h06i747s741qcvhge9586o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im6o74cjh2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbe7uvdm33eq76cgtj8raj052je9nh9hf789l2jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im6o74cjh2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgr8qr7i29i0ufdacgp2v6s0eti6m9llak9mhg90_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im6o74cjh2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmrrpti8lf8q370dg99iltejiuvvmu53ao62efk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im6o74cjh2bs)
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |

| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhrrpp1b12p4pfav9np2st72drcqg3ms2i2stlfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imepr0c3h2bs)
Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4g6ap1teet7vmaumfdhnf0306dqg3k9n65v8vj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imepr0c3h2bs)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
**Defending Parental Rights** While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvmq49j4spnep7mf9cu19r7kca6h8nrhjf93gd8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9imepr0c3h2bs)

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zroha4o3i9m2c1p6od7ks0ei6mu0kv1simnomqag_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im1or6c1h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu5ovjun27itn1btgh50ql3mjasd7o5mv930snvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im1or6c1h2bs) [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5hp6a2j1hrcfcqj1teg5h1fpuni0fj141i2u9c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im1or6c1h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqkaqkd83jf7sc2o1fdbecjqfe4nr41qu98lsh6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im1or6c1h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv8ictjge3okid90mu7kjmpofjije6rcaautulbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im1or6c1h2bs)

Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute’s exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It’s so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute’s latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn’t have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don’t have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. American Briefing PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvqavufm994q6kn0i9844d5fc2e8v0oiu2aln7fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im9pb2chh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcoora5lsekfdq9oi54suanevp5s234tl6np9ftg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im9pb2chh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbliqj4oo1b50qqjrlh5oqitmhqcc8qsvvrv7260_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im9pb2chh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvt5eb67fdafd2394r0t91lr1td111ch5mud8l1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im9pb2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36cthmcpr7c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpm26efuicfd7n6ioa412iulbp32o4qk3uja83r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9im9pb2chh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za08em9dv7e5ei9ginqc6iio6fkdlta29og99jjg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5h6ap75c9i649fg)

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Now, after everything the proud movement has ensured, we’re giving every true patriot a chance to win the ultimate victory prize! _**_[_**_You can enter right now by making a contribution of any amount for a chance to win a FREE trip for you and a guest to Washington, D.C. for President Trump's inauguration day!_**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd3bvo0ibgbc5ht74prvtonivq6dlk436tn8ntro_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm0ob6c3h2bs)_**_

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8cjuijscn6hmib694omof497ullvlq67tjp3n00_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm8pj6c9h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp84ijkcsek0tm7ts6l393rnrb7o7940ndgc73f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm8pj6c9h2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpoue7o2lo3u0t9l2gbvsd72b0tlrklrt9q8fptg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm8pj6c9h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk34g13fsto702sa89b74mj6m7p06dfhfvie9gdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm8pj6c9h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl0rfnjev1bk96t02tqkrfuq7843hvoebjjsk0ko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj7cdj61pb246h22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm8pj6c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1700ke0aq8llb6u0o5g4riavprcgo7lrp95t6ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm8pj6c9h2bs)_

name: MERRY CHRISTMAS, TRUMP FAMILY! [From Team Scalise]
subject: We need your help wishing President Trump and Melania a Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
TO: President Trump and Melania...

| |
---
| | | Friend -

There are just DAYS left before Christmas and we need your help wishing President Trump and Melania a Merry Christmas!

The Trump Family could have left politics behind and enjoyed a peaceful life out of the public eye.

**But they didn 't.** They continued their fight to help SAVE our country from the disastrous policies of the Radical Left and RESTORE the fundamental freedoms that make America great.

They are an inspiration so we want to make this Christmas as special as we can._And what better way to do that than to send them a card signed by their most dedicated supporters!_

name: Sean Themea
subject: I used to support Obama
body:
Government is the problem... and freedom is the answer.

|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd30vl7jqk22gcb7bq6hpleg8kovvau010ltoo1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)
Friend,

When I say the liberty movement changed my life, I’m not exaggerating.

Believe it or not, it was actually in college where I STOPPED being an Obama supporter.

I used to be your typical liberal college student. I supported big government programs to take care of us from cradle to grave and that if we had the right people in power, we could use the government to solve all our problems.

But, it was at college that I came across a student organization called Young Americans for Liberty (YAL).

And my life changed forever.

Through YAL, I learned about free market economics from Milton Friedman. I learned about limited government and individualism from Thomas Sowell. I learned about the Constitution from Ron Paul.

Most importantly, I realized government is not the solution to our problems...

Government _is_ the problem... and _freedom_ is the answer.

Inspired by this new philosophy, I also discovered something I never knew I was good at - organizing students.

Now, I am the Chief Operating Officer at YAL.

And with over 400 chapters on college campuses across the country, the fight for liberty is stronger than ever.

But education alone is not enough. What makes YAL different is that we take direct action to get students politically active.

And under YAL’s flagship program, Operation Win at the Door (OWD), our students knock on doors to help elect liberty legislators and get pro-liberty legislation passed.

Liberty won BIG in 2024. YAL-trained activists have now helped elect over 400 principled, pro-liberty legislators through OWD. YAL has also helped pass pro-liberty laws, including:
* Constitutional Carry in Texas and Louisiana
* Property Tax Relief in North Dakota
* School Choice in Arizona
* Free Speech Protections on college campuses in Indiana

Now here’s the next step: **passing pro-liberty legislation in 2025**.

[The single most important thing you can do to Make Liberty Win in 2025 is fuel the fight to pass legislation that not only preserves but expands liberty. Can I count on you to join me in this fight with a donation of $20.24, $50, $100, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent donation today! >>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc0ugm5c4re87r3bemsl32oq02tjbejv1h45cq1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)
[**Donate**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdbq6duh3rjae8okqfa17ihscq2nrkotf9r7463g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)
**Operation Win at the Door**

This critical program is the way YAL advances liberty from the grassroots level to the halls of government...

Here are 5 REMARKABLE facts about YAL’s Operation Win at the Door (OWD).
1. OWD student activists have knocked on over 6 MILLION doors to help elect over 400 liberty legislators.
2. Thanks to student door knockers, liberty candidates outperformed Republicans, including President Trump, in Maine, New Hampshire, and Minnesota!
3. Alongside YAL, liberty legislators have passed 753 pro-liberty bills since 2018, including property tax relief in North Dakota, school choice in Arizona, criminal justice reform in Kentucky, and many more...
4. Over half of all Establishment GOP incumbents who lost in a primary and over two-thirds of all GOP leaders who lost on November 5th were ousted through the efforts of YAL-recruited students!
5. Operation Win at the Door’s mobilization efforts swing races by 6-15%.

[As a personal favor to me, can you please donate $250, $50, or even $10 today? Click here to donate. ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfh0obluafod776ssmm0fuur8copvcqp4nh9ba28_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)

Here’s how it works.

**STEP 1:** Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus. YAL identifies and recruits thousands of students each year from college campuses who believe in the cause of freedom (and even converts new students like me!)

**STEP 2:** YAL trains student activists in everything they need to know in order to effectively advance the ideas of liberty, including door-to-door and phone banking.

**STEP 3 (Operation Win at the Door):** YAL’s army of youth activists flood electoral districts and make three door-knocking passes to help tip the scales in favor of the liberty candidate.

The record speaks for itself.

These student door knockers did their part in 2024 to elect a full bench of pro-liberty candidates. Now it’s time to put in the hard work of transforming the states into beacons of liberty.

[Please send your urgent donation today to help us pass pro-liberty legislation in 2025. Your support is critical to reaching our goal of $122,000 before midnight on December 31st.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh3m087dfgmlt9thv1hr12s275l1f8gjkhc0278o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)
**[Donate $10](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi6t7v4r7n2l0oohthidiballp9fgb1papkocb70_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)**

[**Donate $20.24**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7g2fjfb83t303l6iir7na2kn2gi1sh2ndhhp86g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)

[**Donate $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zim0v7vd11bs01jngsi9hk85esm7c6n4getimi2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)

[**Donate $100**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo2q2i4h1mmqhrj2k4s8f0qctcsi57nvs0t59rso_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)

[**Donate $250**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z36to8cisgom93qf1agd7ight26ljpk7e7air1o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)

[**Donate $500**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo89ln2a34pmpovb5501ec5eot2m5t8bi5kt3hq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)

[**Donate $2,300**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1p2ndcv6h5slm0fi2l557rnm5v6bkrco32pod0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)
I know that each and every student YAL reaches on campus has the chance to save them from the siren song of socialism... I’m living proof of it.

And we can channel that newfound love of liberty into real political impact through Operation Win at the Door.

This winning combination is helping us slash big government policies across the country.

**You can help YAL awaken a lifelong love of Liberty in the next generation and fight for pro-liberty legislation by donating today!**
[**Donate**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zomf1ck479dcdab5b8knmjd33kb67dia4l6o0jj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm4oj4c1h2bs)
Thank you,

Sean Themea
Chief Operating Officer
Young Americans for Liberty

subject: We still have a plane ticket reserved for Pres. Trump’s HISTORIC inauguration!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defending America's Future
body:
Your flight covered, your hotel covered!

| | | Friend, the last year has proved that the MAGA movement is the bravest, toughest political movement in American history. Now, after everything the proud movement has ensured, we’re giving every true patriot a chance to win the ultimate victory prize! _**_[_**_You can enter right now by making a contribution of any amount for a chance to win a FREE trip for you and a guest to Washington, D.C. for President Trump's inauguration day!_**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbmogaek0mm6baunl1cf6ie5tu8us870qm4922p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hmcp36c9h2bs)_**_
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq6gjsthvmm2gdg1pc9av6autu8equ28mq6qsss8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hmcp36c9h2bs)
---
**Flight?****_COVERED!_** **Hotel?****_COVERED!_** **_[Friend, we’ve reserved a ticket for one lucky winner and their plus one and we can’t wait to send a brave patriot on their merry way to witness what will surely be a historic day for our country.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi5j72e91n7n75m86c02238pugt7hjhk1jhnmg90_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hmcp36c9h2bs)_ ** **Do you want to witness a moment that will define the future of America as we know? You’ll want to tell your kids and grandkids that YOU were there in our Nation’s Capital for this moment! **
---
[**ENTER FOR A CHANCE TO WIN TRIP**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5bj1mdeg71i5ah6n4ih7o37o0geb0cuskbto7p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hmcp36c9h2bs)
---
**_[This will be a trip you’ll hold near and dear to your heart. You’ll remember this forever! So don’t waste any time. This opportunity won’t last forever and we’d hate for you to miss your chance!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv8lrfnf5febp7co7u25a9uv27ifu3gm7ef3k030_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hmcp36c9h2bs)_ ** We hope you’ll be the lucky patriot at this once-in-a-lifetime event! name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Know Your Rights
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWawrvFW-N

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWawrvFW-N

Dear Fellow Patriot,

Since President Biden came into office
in 2021, government overreach has soared to new heights.

This brazen abuse of power is
unsettling and nauseating.

With today's polarized political
discourse in the public square, we find our conservative values
continually attacked by the increasingly radical elements of the
Left. You and I must band together and fight back to uphold our
shared American principles.

Our beacon in these uncertain times
remains the Constitution.

I know you love our country. And today,
I am reaching out to offer you complimentary access to The
Heritage Foundation's Digital Guide to the Constitution, a
comprehensive tool to help you articulate and defend your
conservative values amidst the political turbulence.

In this digital interactive guide,
you'll discover:

Detailed analysis of every clause
and amendment in the Constitution

Insights from over 100
constitutional scholars and legal experts, including former
Attorney General Ed Meese from President Reagan's tenure

A thorough review of what the
Constitution actually says and discussion of how it applies today

Copies of the Constitution and the
foundational documents that shaped it

You can get instant access to your FREE
guide now using this secure link:
https://secured.heritage.org/constitution

We find ourselves at a crossroads. The
nation is split on pivotal issues. The radical Left is rapidly
expanding the reaches of government into aspects of our lives
that we value as private and independent.

To counteract this shift, we must
enlighten as many conservatives as possible about the liberties
protected by our Constitution.

Understanding this document fully
empowers us to defend it passionately.

To join us in expanding your knowledge
of the Constitution today, please activate your complimentary
access by clicking the following link:
https://secured.heritage.org/constitution

This resource has received national
acclaim as an "excellent guide," and I sincerely believe it ranks
among the most powerful educational materials produced by the
Heritage Foundation. I know you'll find it enlightening and a
daily asset in reinforcing your principles.

Armed with this guide, you'll be
well-prepared to assertively champion the vision of our Founding
Fathers against the radical Left.

I invite you to use this link to get
your FREE Guide to the Constitution today!

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

President, The Heritage Foundation

The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE |
Washington, D.C. 20002

clean_body: Dear Fellow Patriot, Since President Biden came into office in 2021, government overreach has soared to new heights. This brazen abuse of power is unsettling and nauseating. With today's polarized political discourse in the public square, we find our conservative values continually attacked by the increasingly radical elements of the Left. You and I must band together and fight back to uphold our shared American principles. Our beacon in these uncertain times remains the Constitution. I know you love our country. And today, I am reaching out to offer you complimentary access to The Heritage Foundation's Digital Guide to the Constitution, a comprehensive tool to help you articulate and defend your conservative values amidst the political turbulence. In this digital interactive guide, you'll discover: Detailed analysis of every clause and amendment in the Constitution Insights from over 100 constitutional scholars and legal experts, including former Attorney General Ed Meese from President Reagan's tenure A thorough review of what the Constitution actually says and discussion of how it applies today Copies of the Constitution and the foundational documents that shaped it You can get instant access to your FREE guide now using this secure link: We find ourselves at a crossroads. The nation is split on pivotal issues. The radical Left is rapidly expanding the reaches of government into aspects of our lives that we value as private and independent. To counteract this shift, we must enlighten as many conservatives as possible about the liberties protected by our Constitution. Understanding this document fully empowers us to defend it passionately. To join us in expanding your knowledge of the Constitution today, please activate your complimentary access by clicking the following link: This resource has received national acclaim as an "excellent guide," and I sincerely believe it ranks among the most powerful educational materials produced by the Heritage Foundation. I know you'll find it enlightening and a daily asset in reinforcing your principles. Armed with this guide, you'll be well-prepared to assertively champion the vision of our Founding Fathers against the radical Left. I invite you to use this link to get your FREE Guide to the Constitution today! Sincerely, Kevin D.
