name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5d14m5ak24cn6ehk0dp1aghog467l3js69t7tno_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hmao74cjh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zca3egn26troks7vmjhfr4mgvi7ripm111fje560_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hmao74cjh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zge9vv4b2cqpqm2kcthk4jvmhptsd8hkr5t46s90_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hmao74cjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zftm7etdr5blfg2h1985a0jt71p7mjk70cu17410_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk9qj8cdk6mqj4t5m6gpr4t9geup72t5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpjm6pj4sth238h1e8he4937cpgm4or5c3i69oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgc8hrp2nifpqic1i8lb3nis62qd53ci88aldvfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hmao74cjh2bs)_

Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. name: Sean Themea
subject: I used to support Obama
body:
Government is the problem... and freedom is the answer.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ov8sg2knltqoupvrtgjjm84l1qat06a9jv284o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)
Friend,

When I say the liberty movement changed my life, I’m not exaggerating.

Believe it or not, it was actually in college where I STOPPED being an Obama supporter.

I used to be your typical liberal college student. I supported big government programs to take care of us from cradle to grave and that if we had the right people in power, we could use the government to solve all our problems.

But, it was at college that I came across a student organization called Young Americans for Liberty (YAL).

And my life changed forever.

Through YAL, I learned about free market economics from Milton Friedman. I learned about limited government and individualism from Thomas Sowell. I learned about the Constitution from Ron Paul.

Most importantly, I realized government is not the solution to our problems...

Government _is_ the problem... and _freedom_ is the answer.

Inspired by this new philosophy, I also discovered something I never knew I was good at - organizing students.

Now, I am the Chief Operating Officer at YAL.

And with over 400 chapters on college campuses across the country, the fight for liberty is stronger than ever.

But education alone is not enough. What makes YAL different is that we take direct action to get students politically active.

And under YAL’s flagship program, Operation Win at the Door (OWD), our students knock on doors to help elect liberty legislators and get pro-liberty legislation passed.

Liberty won BIG in 2024. YAL-trained activists have now helped elect over 400 principled, pro-liberty legislators through OWD. YAL has also helped pass pro-liberty laws, including:
* Constitutional Carry in Texas and Louisiana
* Property Tax Relief in North Dakota
* School Choice in Arizona
* Free Speech Protections on college campuses in Indiana

Now here’s the next step: **passing pro-liberty legislation in 2025**.

[The single most important thing you can do to Make Liberty Win in 2025 is fuel the fight to pass legislation that not only preserves but expands liberty. Can I count on you to join me in this fight with a donation of $20.24, $50, $100, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent donation today! >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbh8b73av49msgbmotgk9hogddgp5cfcppu5qd08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)
[**Donate**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4in7g4eh5epfg6i8vb7b6ns7nrp61kg79jjr0a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)
**Operation Win at the Door**

This critical program is the way YAL advances liberty from the grassroots level to the halls of government...

Here are 5 REMARKABLE facts about YAL’s Operation Win at the Door (OWD).
1. OWD student activists have knocked on over 6 MILLION doors to help elect over 400 liberty legislators.
2. Thanks to student door knockers, liberty candidates outperformed Republicans, including President Trump, in Maine, New Hampshire, and Minnesota!
3. Alongside YAL, liberty legislators have passed 753 pro-liberty bills since 2018, including property tax relief in North Dakota, school choice in Arizona, criminal justice reform in Kentucky, and many more...
4. Over half of all Establishment GOP incumbents who lost in a primary and over two-thirds of all GOP leaders who lost on November 5th were ousted through the efforts of YAL-recruited students!
5. Operation Win at the Door’s mobilization efforts swing races by 6-15%.

[As a personal favor to me, can you please donate $250, $50, or even $10 today? Click here to donate. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm7ih362mn2384fefub43qjui8nvg0n8g582isdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)

Here’s how it works.

**STEP 1:** Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus. YAL identifies and recruits thousands of students each year from college campuses who believe in the cause of freedom (and even converts new students like me!)

**STEP 2:** YAL trains student activists in everything they need to know in order to effectively advance the ideas of liberty, including door-to-door and phone banking.

**STEP 3 (Operation Win at the Door):** YAL’s army of youth activists flood electoral districts and make three door-knocking passes to help tip the scales in favor of the liberty candidate.

The record speaks for itself.

These student door knockers did their part in 2024 to elect a full bench of pro-liberty candidates. Now it’s time to put in the hard work of transforming the states into beacons of liberty.

[Please send your urgent donation today to help us pass pro-liberty legislation in 2025. Your support is critical to reaching our goal of $122,000 before midnight on December 31st.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqgt1t5bq2jmeiri1n2nmo174onc3q03ls0nqc0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)
**[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4dj361jmc92iaoehmdtgi3odlv8su23nt0srb50_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)**

[**Donate $20.24**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi412fq9fq4657cfvkt4fhmsv4h773m8dt705320_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)

[**Donate $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znctarsuneg18mj84f6f7h5cr3j39va80pj16etg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)

[**Donate $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zml5ea2j9v16mkpddf4hfrlsehc5qg4e67m1pokg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)

[**Donate $250**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkaj36tpd4h2ggd2n8mgjhg0p2vp2qhblvu51v2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)

[**Donate $500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfuqilmtnlff92s6tlutqi1slje5l8njsrro60m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)

[**Donate $2,300**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zok33u5vs6uql0u3im78n1bu14jkeo62a3nsb5r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)
I know that each and every student YAL reaches on campus has the chance to save them from the siren song of socialism... I’m living proof of it.

And we can channel that newfound love of liberty into real political impact through Operation Win at the Door.

This winning combination is helping us slash big government policies across the country.

**You can help YAL awaken a lifelong love of Liberty in the next generation and fight for pro-liberty legislation by donating today!**
[**Donate**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmgjrhp9kcvvpaqgp5bs5abhgtmr5tpjr425iql8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0cth2bs)
Thank you,

Sean Themea
Chief Operating Officer
Young Americans for Liberty

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3ogakgmm4uc7inq36jnrms221qc0saog70ubnl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0clh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj56qb601dfpajfkm3fbhedc85prasus4t5259s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0clh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0vgo3pqh1sfbl1qo4eq6m7fikeamles7th2sfro_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0clh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znlru9dpj9ut05ucs128tcs3kk5hu1vn5sm36a8o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj6eor6cjie48d245p25oh4ctj62oj3cdjm0pb24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0jgrp0m6bn85j6v1s7bei3eb5mfapk2hbsaq9jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c9hm6pr0clh2bs)_

name: Ear Armor
subject: These are shooter's earmuffs w/ a 21 noise reduction rating...
body:
A gunshot is an impulse high decibel noise, which can be harmful to the human ear...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19377/6374453/83ad07a677d7d3152b13fd3854372ba90845a3f3/ecd02c230d78ae54ad15f72c763788c2e61b779c)
---
| | |
---
_December 15th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
**Hearing Protection
****Is A Must While Shooting**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19377/6374453/83ad07a677d7d3152b13fd3854372ba90845a3f3/ecd02c230d78ae54ad15f72c763788c2e61b779c)
---
A gunshot is an impulse high decibel noise, which can be harmful to the human ear, so much so that even a single shot can cause permanent damage without the right hearing protection. **Depending on the caliber of the firearm, every gunshot registers above the[safe hearing DB levels](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19377/6374453/83ad07a677d7d3152b13fd3854372ba90845a3f3/ecd02c230d78ae54ad15f72c763788c2e61b779c), at which hearing damage can occur quickly.** EarArmor.com's Earmuffs Rated with a Noise Reduction Rating (NRR) of 21, EarArmor offers best-in-class hearing protection from noise levels across all firearm calibers.

**[Order Your Pair of EarArmor.com Earmuffs& Save 50% Off Today!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19377/6374453/83ad07a677d7d3152b13fd3854372ba90845a3f3/ecd02c230d78ae54ad15f72c763788c2e61b779c)** On Your 6,

**Thank You.**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076c7fc1aff943e1b7526d295eb495e4&_e=jcUnP1YftpofQFm7z5Krtn35MvHcbctmpSDtojFm0iDt3MFTMlVukqykrIlPBA-KAlZuhlt6YfcJzvBMKJ9nsHUHnifwKIahhatY57YHKX88rFN01-nOoD7yC524J-x0JM94JOoq_2TwsjqIFgkyOiDoTdsiT4kygr9O-ILw0muu2MaT0IA16HavZjCBbbcNnqhpYf-pHpv9zospcf-X35YF0aFWTYl9Csn5hz741nMYG5L7nnr1aIAgq-qCiJbQ5UugPWN9Tjf4qic9s8_sTQvR8BWk2DvZQzSb_o4vKukJsTUFAdeg4SyhPWX0bbcxwEwzwkDua2clQXXO2K2lu2KxVKVJyYyHmxoRmabZQBcIUlTKx7YGoWxzci21iAdQUQjg-Gl7irjcMp6XKx6Aq0A_Jkkp0c1ef0qD9Y-yd7mgFzUnM-IiesITM15fMtnV) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076c7fc1aff943e1b7526d295eb495e4&_e=jcUnP1YftpofQFm7z5Krtn35MvHcbctmpSDtojFm0iDt3MFTMlVukqykrIlPBA-KAlZuhlt6YfcJzvBMKJ9nsHUHnifwKIahhatY57YHKX88rFN01-nOoD7yC524J-x0JM94JOoq_2TwsjqIFgkyOiDoTdsiT4kygr9O-ILw0muu2MaT0IA16HavZjCBbbcNnqhpYf-pHpv9zospcf-X35YF0aFWTYl9Csn5hz741nMYG5L7nnr1aIAgq-qCiJbQ5UugPWN9Tjf4qic9s8_sTQvR8BWk2DvZQzSb_o4vKukFpSEnD18rRnAMH1-HybQNRn9xCo6lo8u_NEeiB6vKCOs0YLnLq1UPpfFThxxRi4wmLj8xCB_8Vna10f-EEbMryQU_PMH11GLMfS0DjEoAT7JM3PEjVyuLdN8lk-V7aqhWHNaAAHFWhiBOdYsBaK_D)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076c7fc1aff943e1b7526d295eb495e4&_e=jcUnP1YftpofQFm7z5Krtn35MvHcbctmpSDtojFm0iDt3MFTMlVukqykrIlPBA-KAlZuhlt6YfcJzvBMKJ9nsHUHnifwKIahhatY57YHKX88rFN01-nOoD7yC524J-x0JM94JOoq_2TwsjqIFgkyOiDoTdsiT4kygr9O-ILw0muu2MaT0IA16HavZjCBbbcNnqhpYf-pHpv9zospcf-X35YF0aFWTYl9Csn5hz741nMYG5L7nnr1aIAgq-qCiJbQ5UugPWN9Tjf4qic9s8_sTQvR8BWk2DvZQzSb_o4vKulIg8tP1qSrMeY9CLdXkXhiAg4YXi2j7hEpRsTpfNWt4L1LJE_pYyAsKQ48X9AnMo9cS7svlz_q1q_tKVDt0HsWOJW7oo7qniNMHgQgLGdwVk6GylIqa_x1QiJEvLB5Fj7uiuDSUObXaSraAVT0Q71J)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076c7fc1aff943e1b7526d295eb495e4&_e=jcUnP1YftpofQFm7z5Krtn35MvHcbctmpSDtojFm0iDt3MFTMlVukqykrIlPBA-KAlZuhlt6YfcJzvBMKJ9nsHUHnifwKIahhatY57YHKX88rFN01-nOoD7yC524J-x0JM94JOoq_2TwsjqIFgkyOiDoTdsiT4kygr9O-ILw0muu2MaT0IA16HavZjCBbbcNnqhpYf-pHpv9zospcf-X35YF0aFWTYl9Csn5hz741nMYG5L7nnr1aIAgq-qCiJbQ5UugPWN9Tjf4qic9s8_sTQvR8BWk2DvZQzSb_o4vKunniQxJy2xy9pTlOA4wCTEBrKGKKN1nliWoMDnLMO61ZIYWAfW-3BRvXLoDGWrYNoOM7PIHsdemc-kZGgk3at8aBTT53dllJKvE5rT0JYi1g7MVkWjDO3tT1CQCaJN5viEec8fL78ALht7SRPIpkmJn) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076c7fc1aff943e1b7526d295eb495e4&_e=jcUnP1YftpofQFm7z5Krtn35MvHcbctmpSDtojFm0iDt3MFTMlVukqykrIlPBA-KAlZuhlt6YfcJzvBMKJ9nsHUHnifwKIahhatY57YHKX88rFN01-nOoD7yC524J-x0JM94JOoq_2TwsjqIFgkyOiDoTdsiT4kygr9O-ILw0muu2MaT0IA16HavZjCBbbcNnqhpYf-pHpv9zospcf-X35YF0aFWTYl9Csn5hz741nMYG5L7nnr1aIAgq-qCiJbQ5UugPWN9Tjf4qic9s8_sTQvR8BWk2DvZQzSb_o4vKumKa95dUshSlSfkUJ7JHMDrTjf2FFwOxzjE-DoWo6hm_NV6pmazskQb5TjUrINMxdJOpJtxgvQ6VdMcx15r5bjBaw5IGBnvqMzAR6broIxGv0seezRKdPKa6rxUfIutHtntZ9FR3BR48f78Vin08BE_)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076c7fc1aff943e1b7526d295eb495e4&_e=jcUnP1YftpofQFm7z5Krtn35MvHcbctmpSDtojFm0iDt3MFTMlVukqykrIlPBA-KAlZuhlt6YfcJzvBMKJ9nsHUHnifwKIahhatY57YHKX88rFN01-nOoD7yC524J-x0JM94JOoq_2TwsjqIFgkyOiDoTdsiT4kygr9O-ILw0muu2MaT0IA16HavZjCBbbcNnqhpYf-pHpv9zospcf-X35YF0aFWTYl9Csn5hz741nMYG5L7nnr1aIAgq-qCiJbQ5UugPWN9Tjf4qic9s8_sTQvR8BWk2DvZQzSb_o4vKunE_JjlfzFT365K_uHXx1ibKX1rrNOtpRYiBog96xJi4826twoU4UBvHzfWz3UdLRgg3nECyE-BwSuE7t7PpHmrlvGglXYReBepD74fvzFNkvDzklOzSrkuifL0y57StZskKDFhcSc78OMr1Xa_6AX0) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=81dd544b442645f49c19f7e910ecacd4&_e=PX8VrMxoxX0RCDQ93ea-q951dqw66W-k9gcrwt1ykrgvyHpt-tLnb9Q8AFCoJ080Qnz8OPChWT64QUk8plHcydGhrvsX2XK1vdsGC60yrB-JU9BVanJ37XnT123X7zl2RSL6Tg8-HCCm9L60OZ8z5Cu8wiG_gyJXZqI54zNcGY6j3YDb1NzKFdVnGdErbM9n2UiGZLH8MOelGx9DmCKS28JjVwWiSBVZBRO8vUXNjTy_TQfv4qoNerV_ZiwrwyV8pI72XMWb-Em-qy2xYZTYD_T5P-ODVDTz1Zcg4KqmbFGLPkO_XYjrTuticQFEEw2D1PdfWsPEhw-KdTFu_ipaXtC9NwPERLKjZm2JnTzTvRKfy57PbKsQn8j863SeO4uS1qddqT7y4fXnZnvoBwkw6gi0iwIsAbWE-FCTRyav4GFRxKpAgVhp11cmxzivP4M4) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=81dd544b442645f49c19f7e910ecacd4&_e=PX8VrMxoxX0RCDQ93ea-q951dqw66W-k9gcrwt1ykrgvyHpt-tLnb9Q8AFCoJ080Qnz8OPChWT64QUk8plHcydGhrvsX2XK1vdsGC60yrB-JU9BVanJ37XnT123X7zl2RSL6Tg8-HCCm9L60OZ8z5Cu8wiG_gyJXZqI54zNcGY6j3YDb1NzKFdVnGdErbM9n2UiGZLH8MOelGx9DmCKS28JjVwWiSBVZBRO8vUXNjTy_TQfv4qoNerV_ZiwrwyV8pI72XMWb-Em-qy2xYZTYD_T5P-ODVDTz1Zcg4KqmbFE8rYfVetUxZ52YUDorfsZ0e737xNrgwVwadmHvP5d6itP7ikNs9aIGsBZiTPCOaiCpai8b6fpGjQvOp7bs3rnxrGZhTXLzsB0iIywVNa8u9EjCZFltSrBEBF7z-a0OGlUZ3CZyX64yxflgmA9NYMpt)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=81dd544b442645f49c19f7e910ecacd4&_e=PX8VrMxoxX0RCDQ93ea-q951dqw66W-k9gcrwt1ykrgvyHpt-tLnb9Q8AFCoJ080Qnz8OPChWT64QUk8plHcydGhrvsX2XK1vdsGC60yrB-JU9BVanJ37XnT123X7zl2RSL6Tg8-HCCm9L60OZ8z5Cu8wiG_gyJXZqI54zNcGY6j3YDb1NzKFdVnGdErbM9n2UiGZLH8MOelGx9DmCKS28JjVwWiSBVZBRO8vUXNjTy_TQfv4qoNerV_ZiwrwyV8pI72XMWb-Em-qy2xYZTYD_T5P-ODVDTz1Zcg4KqmbFHJKYViIybRhWPQVm0FeTlpqm48D8GxXq6XLHY0J136sB-qJpBeK2gtp6chcsbKKqhCkAxK3aIbJQ7cOLls1TLZLGjZV4TPK4dQGttxT0Y6AaHyAoeP9LZ4STXiImdNIDG9p8aoB2fp3XvysR9SBkvf)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=81dd544b442645f49c19f7e910ecacd4&_e=PX8VrMxoxX0RCDQ93ea-q951dqw66W-k9gcrwt1ykrgvyHpt-tLnb9Q8AFCoJ080Qnz8OPChWT64QUk8plHcydGhrvsX2XK1vdsGC60yrB-JU9BVanJ37XnT123X7zl2RSL6Tg8-HCCm9L60OZ8z5Cu8wiG_gyJXZqI54zNcGY6j3YDb1NzKFdVnGdErbM9n2UiGZLH8MOelGx9DmCKS28JjVwWiSBVZBRO8vUXNjTy_TQfv4qoNerV_ZiwrwyV8pI72XMWb-Em-qy2xYZTYD_T5P-ODVDTz1Zcg4KqmbFHkBEV2JyafIwFzh8fzHqnEc18cy16z1CtkxpxKI7GeqTCYdOPpKJaDFoso7DS5Taalo6jbJJ--2nK0fXFvtDoid8Ad-d73Rnjjmc4UB3NpZjRwgnyEYbUebVyrrmRCOialGwxDiaE0oWZIgEyFKgnw) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=81dd544b442645f49c19f7e910ecacd4&_e=PX8VrMxoxX0RCDQ93ea-q951dqw66W-k9gcrwt1ykrgvyHpt-tLnb9Q8AFCoJ080Qnz8OPChWT64QUk8plHcydGhrvsX2XK1vdsGC60yrB-JU9BVanJ37XnT123X7zl2RSL6Tg8-HCCm9L60OZ8z5Cu8wiG_gyJXZqI54zNcGY6j3YDb1NzKFdVnGdErbM9n2UiGZLH8MOelGx9DmCKS28JjVwWiSBVZBRO8vUXNjTy_TQfv4qoNerV_ZiwrwyV8pI72XMWb-Em-qy2xYZTYD_T5P-ODVDTz1Zcg4KqmbFGopRQesInT9v92AmOMzLUCqd7AKXEkgoBQPZm60s3bd-OkdxsJCGjZCHgeITmdb3OFdh18MGe9mrpez2AX4Oan6lKy_3JbiQfZ9oIVsmXifIJXHaHw-PYQhDhVcarjSM2-8XfIiT5tm7Ng97EjDMqf)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=81dd544b442645f49c19f7e910ecacd4&_e=PX8VrMxoxX0RCDQ93ea-q951dqw66W-k9gcrwt1ykrgvyHpt-tLnb9Q8AFCoJ080Qnz8OPChWT64QUk8plHcydGhrvsX2XK1vdsGC60yrB-JU9BVanJ37XnT123X7zl2RSL6Tg8-HCCm9L60OZ8z5Cu8wiG_gyJXZqI54zNcGY6j3YDb1NzKFdVnGdErbM9n2UiGZLH8MOelGx9DmCKS28JjVwWiSBVZBRO8vUXNjTy_TQfv4qoNerV_ZiwrwyV8pI72XMWb-Em-qy2xYZTYD_T5P-ODVDTz1Zcg4KqmbFGqfqzFlamY7frNSTJa-ghmLpTzP8iGn3qEu05HqV1UYrotElprIBXcTrYJwzIRCTWXd9En_PROI7aWdK0haKp5g9enNiBFuFfQ07LVGWeHpAKdpE7wuGjTZgR_Dr5ZsVX25VEjAlHHamhym3ENFkKo) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Hassan Martini, Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind
subject: The Anger is Real.
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqwah-o6vpp6-kyd76rh7/)
---
**The Anger is Real.**
---
| | | | We are not immune to the pushback surrounding the Democratic Party and the results of the 2024 Presidential election. People are angry—more specifically, Democrats are angry. We are receiving hundreds of messages weekly, and the sentiment is consistent: _How could you do this to us?_ By _us,_ they are referring to America. In order to move forward, **we must take accountability** , including us at No Dem Left Behind. We saw the warning signs early, even before the Gaza genocide, but that event became the tipping point. People watched the harrowing images on television and then turned to the Democratically-controlled White House and State Department briefings, **utterly shocked by what they were hearing.** Just yesterday, the White House honored the Israeli Defense Minister—the very man responsible for the genocide on the ground, who has an arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Court (ICC). **That was the man honored with a White House visit.** And now, people are paying attention. _How could they do this? What universe are they living in? Don't they care how history will judge them? What about those innocent children? Where is humanity?_ We hear these questions. **We echo them.** We are flabbergasted. **Young people and people of color have abandoned the Democratic Party—and frankly, we get it.** We did speak up privately—to the Biden campaign, to the Harris campaign, and to our U.S. Senate candidates, both those who won and those who lost. We urged them to change course, but it fell on deaf ears. Now, we must ask ourselves over and over: _Would it have made a difference if we had spoken out publicly?_ We can't change the past, but **we can learn from our mistakes.** You will never hear us use the phrase _Vote Blue No Matter Who_ ever again. Yes, we want you to vote for Democrats. Yes, we want to support Democratic candidates. But **simply checking a box and assuming that qualifies someone to represent the Democratic Party is no longer enough.** **Democrats are the party of working people—not corporations exploiting them.** Washington, D.C. consultants and lobbyists are not all evil, but the system in which they operate is as corrupt as can be. Everyone knows it, yet those who benefit from it remain silent. **We will not stay silent.** A document is circulating among our peers, outlining what the Democratic Party must embrace. **We want the next chair, whoever they may be, to sign on.**
---
|
---
Principles for the Next DNC Chair ____________________________________________________________________ Reform, restructure, and rebrand the party. ● Rebuild our party from the ground up, committing to a 50-state strategy that builds power through the state parties, is year-round rather than transactional, and that respects all voters within our big tent. ● Create an authentic Democratic brand that offers a clear alternative and inclusive vision for how we will make life better for the 90% who are struggling in this economy, take on the biggest corporations and wealthiest individuals who have rigged the system, expose Trump’s corporate favoritism and create a clear contrast with Republicans. ● Undertake an immediate assessment of the effectiveness of Democratic political consulting practices and businesses, and terminate those who have been ineffective and detrimental to the success of our candidates and party. Expand the diversity of DNC consulting partners, focusing on bringing in more consultants to have a demonstrated understanding of populist policies that benefit poor and working class people of every race and geography. ● Undertake a deep analysis of the communications ecosystem to understand where voters get their information, and build an up-to-date operation that targets voters in new ways that will reach, persuade and move them. ● Bring in new leaders and encourage more voices to join party leadership by dedicating seats for leaders of major allied organizations and other key partners. Embrace grassroots donors and reject special interest and dark money. ● Restructure and reform the DNC’s fundraising approach and apparatus to ensure we prioritize fundraising from the 7 million+ grassroots donors who contributed to our campaigns this year, rather than Big Money and dark money donors who do not share our values. The Chair should identify structural reforms to prevent their undue influence and appoint a committee to outline options for state committees to limit or eliminate dark money in primaries. ● Reinstate the 2008 DNC ban on corporate PAC donations and specifically push to ban SuperPAC spending in Democratic primaries. ● Make significant financial reforms that bring transparency to the DNC budget. Rebuild our multiracial working-class base. ● Address the fundamental danger to Democrats receiving a shrinking share of the vote of poor and working-class Americans of all races in every presidential race since 2012. ● Make rebuilding our multiracial poor and working-class base the top priority by launching new efforts to engage with multiracial low-income and working-class voters in all 50 states. ● Prioritize a ten-year plan to invest in reaching and turning out young people, including on college campuses with appropriate tactics, strategy and communications infrastructure. ● Expand efforts to recruit working-class candidates which will further the goal of rebuilding our multiracial, low-income, and working-class base. ● Invest in showing our commitment to real populism versus Trump’s faux populism through lifting up working-class voices and issue-based campaigns that take on corporate concentration and monopoly power at the expense of working people. Show recent, demonstrated experience of turning around organizations, building large coalitions and winning elections. ● Demonstrate clear recent victories and experience in winning elections and building powerful organizations with a shared, coalition party that wins through addition not exclusion. ● Embrace economic populism, multiracial coalition building and grassroots organizing, and be able to articulate how they are connected to building political power and winning elections for Democrats. ● Present a clear strategy to help win upcoming statewide elections in New Jersey, Ohio, and Virginia, as well as local elections across the country. ● Invest in and coordinate with rank-and-file Democrats and grassroots organizations who lead party-building efforts and campaigns in communities across the United States.
---
|
---
[**_We need to do this work—our country is worth it. We know we must earn your trust, and we plan to work tirelessly to do just that. We also recognize that we need funding to continue fighting the good fight. As grassroots organizers, we understand why support is not where it needs to be right now._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqwah-o6vpp7-kyd76rh8/) [If you are in a position to help, please pitch in and help us keep fighting the good fight.](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqwah-o6vpp8-kyd76rh9/)
---
| [Chip in $25](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqwah-o6vpp9-kyd76rh0/)
---
| [Chip in $50](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqwah-o6vppa-kyd76rh0/)
---
| [Chip in $100](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqwah-o6vppb-kyd76rh1/)
---
| [Rush $250!](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqwah-o6vppc-kyd76rh2/)
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqwah-o6vppd-kyd76rh3/)
---
In solidarity, -Hassan Martini
---
| | | | |
---
__ONE__ donation to No Dem Left Behind supports winning the critical rural votes that decide the outcome in __EVERY__ major battleground. **Maximize your impact this cycle →** **No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2vqwah--15aab-kyd76rh5&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2vqwah--15aab-kyd76rh5&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2887b7e10ca4bf398a4f049905aa90e&_e=E0Kx5sVpP6WqRHRO1rqkzs7v5_a8rpwztgwqUeK4h63As6zyHk-r_J5e7hv2b3N2YYCeXC_9NxiRw-V415tV3keLO-AYX8G1vbYf-Bmry0QE85V9bL49Ufstutyzi2pEWAqEFZ3_PvnrPfmR2pJDKbkpWEF40dr1bRnVtoUps2UzOVyK9CcM-pO6uVYbLBsNTGELxKRtyEimxiwdZhoCnp9l34qffRtKCqInvMZ3poWesEz5nJ9Tl1inSdLyp1ROlUtGn4f6G0o62AvLvvuI4h2aOojJq_QT1tuYGIJPi7VOijaz4_FqG7hS2mK1syJsYwN6y9C2XoJBGkrhZUtvi8iNiIj1-MGtUl6Iwjdc9ylAKXTDfcJuMyM1oC6Fz38j)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2887b7e10ca4bf398a4f049905aa90e&_e=E0Kx5sVpP6WqRHRO1rqkzs7v5_a8rpwztgwqUeK4h63As6zyHk-r_J5e7hv2b3N2nMCJ9dwGEmLFGXM2orAkxxDme_bjmz1l3CBU-VHtNAV50cW2PwFQj4syBqkEQc1QUz-OuVYIY1lXgaf5R8bW48yov36Qu_7sCnxiFeN62IDwmr27Xextokl_wEgZwlva88FEo0FGTEX0z8jmpugkcOjjOWKRPMUnf4gaor5oT4znz-83Ms_HEpbY6mMhpPx5kdwkK8B1dBdQmcl-u0CZ7sGBESZwqOj1C9jcDyY_6FARkm-Bw9kemquhdr1zwycPeEd21PAePoUtapKbpXc7twRJ-yjC7Av-yyydVX62J8bEDGWrY96vJmHj0nnm5z8Wz_aKzFsDrEzsihKPsm5vCQ%3D%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2887b7e10ca4bf398a4f049905aa90e&_e=E0Kx5sVpP6WqRHRO1rqkzs7v5_a8rpwztgwqUeK4h63As6zyHk-r_J5e7hv2b3N2nMCJ9dwGEmLFGXM2orAkxxDme_bjmz1l3CBU-VHtNAV50cW2PwFQj4syBqkEQc1QUz-OuVYIY1lXgaf5R8bW48yov36Qu_7sCnxiFeN62IDwmr27Xextokl_wEgZwlva88FEo0FGTEX0z8jmpugkcOjjOWKRPMUnf4gaor5oT4z5CHo6oh2MlILjnMFiJo4la8_jsocMM_NrSIyXyp4JPevZ496zHvhFEFFu5Fc_XN5g2Elsxc92yWk71o9ck69PCLlV-kfZsUZQdVbon8V-c9KllBsq2HByTKmUr5Kzlm_juOgRL2MciDQ59w0AxZgCZ5puF2HmGFl0ZAraNsCd7Q%3D%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." body:
Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|*

clean_body: Please forgive me for sending you a long email. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn't have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don't have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

## ABC Settles With Trump for $15 Million
ABC News and anchorman George Stephanopoulos have reached a settlement with President-elect Donald Trump in his defamation suit, with [the network paying Trump $15 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQhZ8GOiM8_mFTuNiGLttuiQY8Bq9sxgInbO7TXyX9bc85Ovr0_b1Pd4wp7usfzORq4Al60EKCkGbyGNNr0q13gQhIteTkoDRYUFa3m7MzakPBDjPBzVu9BASlDIEPhPKXaaN7v0mQRkq4gen6BcxMs7e3AZX1qtE9-Vj56P5x3OtGIb34SUe3cG6T22otZ6N-NzA2MF7X1QX-v9N1vvsGxkw-YgPjSnysJM5KZcOdCz8SnwLnRWDhxGv8IlGPRy4i8LGQFwVfQhqRY0qRd3FSrYmEp4AZ6yd5xNoezpfrPTnt0Oh-zRjTh6z-ZOrp4DsAAP__AkxvEQ). ABC News will make the payment as a charitable contribution to a "Presidential foundation and museum to be established by or for Plaintiff, as Presidents of the United States of America have established in the past." ABC will also pay $1 million in Trump's attorney fees. Trump filed the suit against Stephanopoulos after a March 10 interview with South Carolina Rep. Nancy Mace in which Stephanopoulos asserted that Trump was found "liable for rape" in a civil case. Trump spent Saturday afternoon [at the Army-Navy football game](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OozAURp8GOke-1z-YwsU26bLtlugaX4JXxkbgScTbjzL9lJ8-6ejo_HtMD0o5ledf2ti3pU4oUQtAAWaKlPI16T76hRlZ9exhUBotKqv71YMbyVFkhIHJgEMiME5Kp4NFG8c--Q8NEAwAjmhuckYTOEQ7DqRsVJ2WHFOrx-1_TaWtvOSrvvi4zXXrs19b289O_enw3uGd9sLv83N9xtHSnLnDezu-tl3QsV2i0OsSS60tUM5i51IusfLz5LaKyCeVlk7hTCRQLiiaQcmAALTMGnRYtDKgqT983N8p53TaodPyuVHKP0Ltt0Avj98BAAD__xlKZx0), joined by Vice President-elect JD Vance, Secretary of Defense nominee Pete Hegseth, Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis, and other high-profile supporters.
## U.S. Citizen Freed From Syrian Prison
American citizen Travis Timmerman [was freed from a Syrian prison](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX8N3rDMAXY9MHTxlq4drYs5kqsMREBi5d9X7t7t6T3p6dP3fVkvyDun2xdGci3kFQYwUoFUdvXI-3s1nXeBCEh35NSkDYygR9PdXTDeqsEOGxltwxRm3EirDw9gLUyz6tidbwqUVQpmsP2wgb3S1Y_zhHr0WpiBPLdc-p_Mqd0p7O_8otJvOXa7u7f2qEJ_ClgELMdx9Nu1JjrquQtYzihgaQVfXGXjGKlETLK-C6PESIU3TPKsQn4mL0Mh8vJRuOYksVb0Mj9royJg6Yrzj4P3nes4CTPcIvL-B9L-E_Ny8BsAAP__qMpnUQ) on Friday and taken out of the country by the U.S. military amid the downfall of President Bashar al-Assad's dictatorship. He was transported to the Al Tanf U.S. military base and then flown out of Syria by helicopter and handed over to the U.S. State Department. Timmerman went to Syria for a [religious pilgrimage](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71ugzAUxfGnsbcgfG3sMnjowpauHZE_LnAbgyOw4qRPX9E925GO9JP-39fx6ijRNn-5FW2Z8ggtqIuAi-jG6Ci9RsWjnRABJUcrjFSgQWrFFxuNFrr3IKWZQiejwTYa14veTcI7bzjZUxMgOiGgh65pA3QefdS9cVJHyVSLkUrem59MW1lwSq_8wL0JeeXJLqXcDyY_GQwMhlpr4304PwbDhvVgMLi9UEh4znCbn7u5PT_ib-a7jfdKKdGhDVPtvDpK_2p5V_mw8BcAAP__dZhUJA) but disappeared into Syria's prison system about seven months ago. Meanwhile, U.S. officials [continue to search for Austin Tice](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAQBeBfY2-O4MA4DAxdsqVrRwu4u-QqbEcGJcq_r9ypS8dPT3p6el_X-RqlyHr7jAuFxtsMCuygYdDjjFHKe7Y9BiYCMj0FPRkLDoyz_T2g9Txxsi56N1nNLiU-Z09wVgSsVC_haNOgR63Bw3hSGcZECZ2fonFoOqsIpW376XuTtd2Jy3t70n7K29KXcG_tUTvz0cGlg0t8rPSqR3Rgb5ILdXCp713i0GRZaF_iOsRaI_6xtQZ1NgmSzzyOOmNmZAZImAmz7_eAj5eUItVNnVW3JUr5HdD-O-QZ4CcAAP__Tq5jAA), an American journalist who disappeared 12 years ago near Damascus. A member of U.S.-based Hostage Aid Worldwide said he had visited detention centers and the houses of prominent figures in Assad’s circle, but the search had so far not produced results. Some U.S. officials fear that [Tice could have been killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnsTssOPxdFxS3SZdtt7RO4DgmIhABjpW3XyXNVluORhp9mu_zcsaYYr5-4Z1cX8sCHBQTwIReAsb0WtQY3EoEJEdywkoFBqRR4-bI0qo5EtdEhKtQQJ7PXgXzD41GM0b3XhMgtBAwg564B32hSzCzRWmCHBSnEHup063E3Dda06s8qU6-3Mfktt4fbZD_BzgNcDqOY-obfVStY50y9QFOmY72bktN4Tc2wuo3tjd2K3vNmGLrDPfWY2Y9emI-7cSEYC_C2hheC5PW6tmKsbrwOGJKsRk7KH69Y0wfUP_roKeDnwAAAP__judpXw) during a recent round of Israeli airstrikes.
## Ice, Snow Causing Dangerous Conditions
Close to [40 inches of snow fell](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2u4yAQxfGnwR0WM3w4Lii28VZJu6WFYWITYRMBspW3X-X2t_5JR0f_f_f57mKKx_pwO9n2zDMKVByQg56Di-kzqy7YJxGS7MjCIBUalEZ1m_ViuGnttPYAMIL34-JuEMyCSjipQhftdw0QNACOqHvhUS-0BDMOTpogmRIUYsulf-V4tI2e6ZNPKr3Pe5fs1tq7MvmH4cRwcos_6Kr9mr_McPp7_8qDrspwOmOgzHDa3SsXXlsuO19KPNbKN3Lnh9cjXzx64nsMF9XGj1zaRq42DmCG2zhI0RUb3ldMKVYzMCXW3cX0c6b9Fue0-D8AAP__TxFmLg) across parts of western New York and Michigan on Friday and Saturday. Freezing rain created [dangerous travel conditions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ_G7rBgWbBTUPxNuvztlRaBdbwnbCLDhcvbn3Kpr5zRaD7p-7jMF8-J99t_v5GrS55BAgoFQpk5ek7PGfvoFiIg3ZNTo0awoC32q0MtcUQTVJBBTiagnoKJE56snuyEtmf3elOgjFJwAjPIAOZK12hPo9c26g4lRa75GD4z73WlJT3zg44h5K1Pbq31Xjr9r4NzB-fW2rDk70a-ru_Jq3wnsVMrHZw5kNg4NipV1IN8WOnIX0XUwz8oiZD3yJXzXvrDxXvjlLjYsUN52zynX2z9S8PDwU8AAAD___SQYKw) in the Midwest and Plains on Saturday morning with hours-long closures of major interstates and dozens of crashes. Temperatures fell to the single digits in the Midwest, and wind chills were in the teens from Philadelphia to Boston. body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=065acafaf5b94af8b614a415b68ccb8c&_e=8DdaK6oOaydvCs9I4Zm5fvk_W8AVgto3VMbUUqo6cU5_FmHXBlkQaE3tFNYsCQ9Ffs5KNsKTvtL5mj5QO_xbjMsqwLWVmR13ngNbWsgtZ6PM0I1BocoD5dn1kxYTiMQwVGGeNncFBSGE2vKReQhrF9hk0dwJmbvJMnVOo5tGbLo7zjVJxkqS2dq1t1SFzV_iXuWXzqEtajUasJVinKqCxVOqMp7R11HprUj2pU8B2j9Pxn5SnhmcUiGEe_IqZwxdJ10KPPWi28YvEqXrj1rn_1mRURnaGeaiK6enOaYV0p7quevX7jYcFuiVyo3lgwFD0ym-FomirB4js8kzGyxtS1M2zAKWqsQCeVNxSuZE8JTXbJt825hxgNM2P_yji57N0k2ACwZK_BZttXKMqyUGKw9dhvnZ_9ayUHEIzlje8KKNCytarYJ8MGASegLRdj_i) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=065acafaf5b94af8b614a415b68ccb8c&_e=8DdaK6oOaydvCs9I4Zm5fvk_W8AVgto3VMbUUqo6cU5_FmHXBlkQaE3tFNYsCQ9Ffs5KNsKTvtL5mj5QO_xbjMsqwLWVmR13ngNbWsgtZ6PM0I1BocoD5dn1kxYTiMQwVGGeNncFBSGE2vKReQhrF9hk0dwJmbvJMnVOo5tGbLo7zjVJxkqS2dq1t1SFzV_iXuWXzqEtajUasJVinKqCxVOqMp7R11HprUj2pU8B2j9Pxn5SnhmcUiGEe_IqZwxdJ10KPPWi28YvEqXrj1rn_1mRURnaGeaiK6enOaYV0p4-Ma4UAvsVYYtZc2-fGIpPbXCyNtxUOwZtBGxShLjIGvb_X_NBaX8f_6WGRkt2XnEjVph7ZOKBx4r6uwv80NCqH3_EAU00AOZ-ueg85dJfF_ok94vR8aDtuJI06aO1vNhiOR8d4GLvp4byQwC_L1pS)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=065acafaf5b94af8b614a415b68ccb8c&_e=8DdaK6oOaydvCs9I4Zm5fvk_W8AVgto3VMbUUqo6cU5_FmHXBlkQaE3tFNYsCQ9Ffs5KNsKTvtL5mj5QO_xbjMsqwLWVmR13ngNbWsgtZ6PM0I1BocoD5dn1kxYTiMQwVGGeNncFBSGE2vKReQhrF9hk0dwJmbvJMnVOo5tGbLo7zjVJxkqS2dq1t1SFzV_iXuWXzqEtajUasJVinKqCxVOqMp7R11HprUj2pU8B2j9Pxn5SnhmcUiGEe_IqZwxdJ10KPPWi28YvEqXrj1rn_1mRURnaGeaiK6enOaYV0p76eYd63A1EEOJCh3Y3gdkiH4TN28it_zJLreVaPXjgI4LpxWbVt-_vjDBfnr4fwdpmM_3IoledJQpCTvaIzJhKHVpg7X4AwBEQCLugqKl5uvveVCcqDnUcqI892tcsn7-SGHmhZYSz-GNB9lHio1Qi)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=065acafaf5b94af8b614a415b68ccb8c&_e=8DdaK6oOaydvCs9I4Zm5fvk_W8AVgto3VMbUUqo6cU5_FmHXBlkQaE3tFNYsCQ9Ffs5KNsKTvtL5mj5QO_xbjMsqwLWVmR13ngNbWsgtZ6PM0I1BocoD5dn1kxYTiMQwVGGeNncFBSGE2vKReQhrF9hk0dwJmbvJMnVOo5tGbLo7zjVJxkqS2dq1t1SFzV_iXuWXzqEtajUasJVinKqCxVOqMp7R11HprUj2pU8B2j9Pxn5SnhmcUiGEe_IqZwxdJ10KPPWi28YvEqXrj1rn_1mRURnaGeaiK6enOaYV0p7XkFcs0UcLg6jy55kb7MHdsR56CJxYt5-AoN7meDxPLtQJ2aJ9qG9IrH5Z1UW5xZZ-PRv_Ag7EO_QRQnJWdNicHTcqjdOl_QtX5eGhyNET9LM-jbJGxkbiV6x8wP_XdWNSPNcDAkyCu9NAlku8jNCs) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=065acafaf5b94af8b614a415b68ccb8c&_e=8DdaK6oOaydvCs9I4Zm5fvk_W8AVgto3VMbUUqo6cU5_FmHXBlkQaE3tFNYsCQ9Ffs5KNsKTvtL5mj5QO_xbjMsqwLWVmR13ngNbWsgtZ6PM0I1BocoD5dn1kxYTiMQwVGGeNncFBSGE2vKReQhrF9hk0dwJmbvJMnVOo5tGbLo7zjVJxkqS2dq1t1SFzV_iXuWXzqEtajUasJVinKqCxVOqMp7R11HprUj2pU8B2j9Pxn5SnhmcUiGEe_IqZwxdJ10KPPWi28YvEqXrj1rn_1mRURnaGeaiK6enOaYV0p5yT5C8F_8Fvcy9Rv25lmMKcZdix08WQ20Qq514p4IjmxyopMzyqB8jYl-iuoYJt-SNAvssyXTddI2GAQS1D3TguGGxNGy2GG5Rv5RDSyzhU4PYiw_T7EKTC5tEwgtAgDQalfZjSJpoXnr3Ao0mNWEy)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=065acafaf5b94af8b614a415b68ccb8c&_e=8DdaK6oOaydvCs9I4Zm5fvk_W8AVgto3VMbUUqo6cU5_FmHXBlkQaE3tFNYsCQ9Ffs5KNsKTvtL5mj5QO_xbjMsqwLWVmR13ngNbWsgtZ6PM0I1BocoD5dn1kxYTiMQwVGGeNncFBSGE2vKReQhrF9hk0dwJmbvJMnVOo5tGbLo7zjVJxkqS2dq1t1SFzV_iXuWXzqEtajUasJVinKqCxVOqMp7R11HprUj2pU8B2j9Pxn5SnhmcUiGEe_IqZwxdJ10KPPWi28YvEqXrj1rn_1mRURnaGeaiK6enOaYV0p4ZopA0wasOrlHQEMUSfDtPRwyr0lb5XnlSyQxbHmaQRy-UmQgilv5zYueylyBXZ7B1XxPqm3uItgEiV-vkahxAklwfJoTULbvzALSU3JotTAAir7Uwhofqr0Zlp8aA-NTkU-kEiTPcGgfda88PAlUx) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. body:
Help me achieve my agenda

| | |
---
Peter this is Congressman-Elect Troy Downing – and I’m not wasting a second.

The fight starts NOW. My swearing-in is right around the corner, and the Left is already sharpening their knives, ready to take down every America First policy we hold dear.

I’m heading into the 119th Congress with a mission:

⭐ Secure the border before it’s too late.
⭐ Revive our economy from Biden’s disastrous policies.
⭐ Take on China and protect American jobs.

But let me be clear – none of this will happen if we don’t fight like hell. **The Democrats are stacking the deck, and I need patriots like YOU to stand with me.**

Peter, can I count on you? Chip in right now to help me hit the ground running, show the Left we mean business, and start delivering for the American people.

subject: New Hunter Biden Bombshell
body:
| | | | **The following information is for MTG’s Top Advisors only...**_**If you are receiving this message,_that means you_.**___FOR YOUR EYES ONLY__
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBd/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend,

Joe Biden’s pardon of Hunter came as a shock to nobody... _**We knew they were dirty, but now, they aren’t even trying to hide it.**_
I'm staying at my office late to write this letter for you, because **The Fake News Media** & **Big Tech Conglomerates** are going to censor it...
**The Democrats, and the special interests they serve want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**
They are going to be mad as hell that I sent this out...
But I don't care, because I don’t work for them:
_**I work for the American people. I WORK FOR YOU. **_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBd/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
From 2014 until now, the Biden Crime Family received **over $27,000,000** from foreign individuals and groups as part of a **conspiracy** to get rich from Joe Biden’s positions in government... _**Thousands of these dollars can be traced directly back to _China_**_. The Biden Crime Family went as far as to set up shell companies to _hide these payments from our investigators._
Joe Biden used his position as Vice President to change American policies, making _**millions of dollars**_ for both his son, and his son’s _**foreign business partners**_. Witnesses say Joe Biden was directly involved in business dealings with **_Russian_ , _Ukrainian_** , and **_Chinese groups_.**
****
**You know it. I know it. Even the Democrats and the DOJ know it. **

But the DOJ and FBI _**gave special treatment**_ to Hunter because he is Joe Biden’s son.

We are even learning that the White House _**directly interfered with our investigators**_ by withholding key documents and witnesses!

Friend, the level of corruption we are witnessing is _**unprecedented, in the entire history of our country:**_
_****_
_****__**Joe Biden is the most corrupt President in American history...
And he isn’t even the one that has been controlling the White House.**_

Joe can issue as many pardons as he wants: _**this fight is far from over.**_

_**The American people are _done_ tolerating corruption at the highest levels: We demand better!**_
_****_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBd/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The Deepstate, Corrupt RINO “Republicans,” and Democrat special interest megadonors _**hate**_ that I am exposing this... they want these crimes to stay out of sight, and out of mind.
_**They want the pardons to be filed, and they want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**_
_**[We can’t let that happen.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBd/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
__**Now that we’ve got real, actionable evidence against Joe Biden, things are about to get much, much worse.**__
We need to raise awareness... We need to mobilize our legal experts... We need to shed light on the Biden family’s corruption _**once and for all...**_

Friend,

As a loyal member of our MAGA movement, **we've selected you to participate in House Republicans ' End Of Year Performance Review.** You've proven yourself as an all-around, America-loving Patriot, Friend, and **we _need_ the cold hard truth from folks like you.**

Your input will be absolutely crucial in shaping the direction of the Republican Party and ensuring a successful implementation of an America First Agenda.

Between the liberal media and the coastal elites, extreme Democrats have already begun undermining the MAGA agenda, but we're never going to let up on this fight. **We need to hear from grassroots conservatives like you who are committed to Making America Great Again.**

Your feedback will help us identify the top priorities for our new Republican majority in Congress and guide our efforts to pass legislation that advances the America First agenda. **We must collect your feedback before 9 PM tonight, Friend, so please _make this a priority._**

_**[Please take just 30 seconds to complete this survey and share your thoughts.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=831fa2e871ef4ba7b62a24ef179124c6&_e=-zTBIn2v-OcPfTIk3F6qhPhMyQHYCZhozdhC8stPxfUOh11e1k17qBlMRdO9lJF4OzCx7Svpm1t-5eFCJoEV22Db0fJ61lWMJD8e3_uIoi2Cwy-oCpgB5zrmejB7pzi07bzkAZkO60-BHD2LedZrYg8WTt5LbvuvDBDheNb7Xe0USHlRwjoh1jLZH9GZFgvEBgsNxf7W3FZCRak1c25UdzaPwE2yRvvlqbzymZ6YzHvPQhDzVOcTsrny4UmI_PlHuP46NBZs43yOqGoHXGcEkM-gWf4Gpk65fEEnRIX2Wk59r4T_XhIT-IK59BWNXCQW0kNpX59ziVB05WtoQ9lUsc-6vOg3S1gUgnVryEtksLUWuTMfHad7P1DiZIJs0NjeSMP2le_Aq1w9TMfBM2YTFVGDh0-P5HXo26KdPih2vjgqj1hduSVpjjt543NEKc6zOl0_xh_mekVN04F1NFtrZg%3D%3D "Please take just 30 seconds to complete this survey and share your thoughts.")**_ We can't afford to wait - the Left is already mobilizing to stop us.

| | | [COMPLETE SURVEY HERE](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=831fa2e871ef4ba7b62a24ef179124c6&_e=-zTBIn2v-OcPfTIk3F6qhPhMyQHYCZhozdhC8stPxfUOh11e1k17qBlMRdO9lJF4OzCx7Svpm1t-5eFCJoEV22Db0fJ61lWMJD8e3_uIoi2Cwy-oCpgB5zrmejB7pzi07bzkAZkO60-BHD2LedZrYg8WTt5LbvuvDBDheNb7Xe0USHlRwjoh1jLZH9GZFgvEBgsNxf7W3FZCRak1c25UdzaPwE2yRvvlqbzymZ6YzHvPQhDzVOcTsrny4UmI_PlHuP46NBZs43yOqGoHXGcEkM-gWf4Gpk65fEEnRIX2Wk7V98P42lN3Pm94PV7x6mrv0H7lqYNWmNdsVWBwwmAj4VssMCX6j5J4BnK-atEXeBeQuMVdVdYbc6d4gtNv4xGmtyeKZLNvCmaprSQB3a5h7DTPUuK65uYCRhEBJ0yOYRGJ_j_jd7gprOho8SZmW_KDp9kSTT_nh_2GNCrVok98zg%3D%3D "Generic Button")

name: MERRY CHRISTMAS, TRUMP FAMILY! [From Team Scalise]
subject: We need your help wishing President Trump and Melania a Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
TO: President Trump and Melania...

| |
---
| | | Friend -

There are just DAYS left before Christmas and we need your help wishing President Trump and Melania a Merry Christmas!

The Trump Family could have left politics behind and enjoyed a peaceful life out of the public eye.

**But they didn 't.** They continued their fight to help SAVE our country from the disastrous policies of the Radical Left and RESTORE the fundamental freedoms that make America great.

They are an inspiration so we want to make this Christmas as special as we can._And what better way to do that than to send them a card signed by their most dedicated supporters!_

_**[We're asking you to help us out and sign their card as soon as you can:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f6aadbe485d441d7b053509cfde5f3de&_e=YJpP0mAe8OlllwxEbc-J3TrqxD-o0qZkrkQUbFgNrjprHcnOmUwiiGoJQp5Z24H0aZaoeDo03TYKBXElY2P3TWyJ7MhDubOfT6MSVdCIBn2g2QkFJqbbums0JrLU8-NNC1HDbeuy_yyu-idtQll2mOrF6StkeifAFSE-NQDV_xI40gqXBm6blyNLirJFuIW2qT5XJb_4o5jDHMmfy-mCTUI1yIDMqyz9uw8y1NDvrwZsp5dXa2PWM0D3SbksG6b-dIUY2Ew3ZpHuzW8bv8WagdZ009v_szgcZRfBR4sNbmddmzOIRNbpz_5PpAac26-umbKW59KprSvte459CNBBxqM0hie_cFGNZ_vOJhhEHu5JBRvpdIbfLjwxZI6Jxqy_rmFD2a5s8rVnyLgXAvMiIz5NB3UIxRzvl_giB25bSU-5bmMlEASF7ZGYxO4mCHmTGgQKVmrHjgM54WRvcL1h5Q%3D%3D "We’re asking you to help us out and sign their card as soon as you can:")**_

---
_**President Trump and Melania,

Your unwavering dedication has given us all the gift of a brighter future. We can't thank you enough.**_

clean_body: TO: President Trump and Melania... | | | | | Friend - There are just DAYS left before Christmas and we need your help wishing President Trump and Melania a Merry Christmas! The Trump Family could have left politics behind and enjoyed a peaceful life out of the public eye. But they didn 't. They continued their fight to help SAVE our country from the disastrous policies of the Radical Left and RESTORE the fundamental freedoms that make America great. They are an inspiration so we want to make this Christmas as special as we can.And what better way to do that than to send them a card signed by their most dedicated supporters! "We’re asking you to help us out and sign their card as soon as you can:" President Trump and Melania, Your unwavering dedication has given us all the gift of a brighter future. We can't thank you enough. "Merry Christmas!" I hope your Christmas is filled with love, laughter, and the warmth of family. | Peter,

You may be wondering why we’re still fundraising, so we wanted to fill you in.

MD-06 was one of the most competitive races in the country this cycle. And in 2026, it’s bound to intensify as Republicans feel emboldened to widen their House majority.

That's why we're counting on you to give us your honest feedback in House GOP 's End of Year Performance Review before 9 PM tonight. "Take the 2024 End of Year Performance Review now and tell us where we're getting it right – and where we need to improve." | | | "Generic Button" Draining the swamp, securing the border, and cleaning up our streets are top priorities, but we know there are countless issues to tackle. Your feedback will be crucial in shaping our strategy for 2025 and ensuring we stay focused on the issues that matter most to you. | Don't miss this chance to let Republican House Leadership know about your honest opinion on our performance. Complete your review now and help us build a stronger, more prosperous America. | | | "Generic Button" Please submit your response promptly. All submissions will undergo review at 9 PM tonight. | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: U.S. Marine Corps Veteran
subject: I'm a third-generation U.S. Marine and asking for your help
body:
A personal note from a veteran
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT*](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/zdb4h3e~aZCy/eDdpeE5LR1hLZ1V4ZnR4VzJxUWtwTFpLT2dsWGt1bkhkbFJxcTRMRGhHWVBRb3dDam5zMndkOWthUTJIc0pDOGM3YzBnZklyUFduYmVhVHJpblJWZ21NcEJrOTdDVytveEZkM3g5SXlwSjg9S0/NnhRZFFPMkJIa25JQWFCTWVaeU1NNUtKeGYrb0ZZTTdpWUxOVUpOa0k2YXV0ZS9Na1BvSGtzQUptOWxwekpBUU1NemdLdko2aUF4VmVXbDFwQXJzU1FXMUVlV2JXYnV6S0)
