[**Help Provide Holiday Meals
to Service Members
Far From Home This Christmas** **](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.)
USO Supporter,
My name is Brad Meuli, and I'm a proud third-generation U.S. Marine.
My grandfather, dad and I all had the honor of serving our country. But one of the hardest parts of military life was knowing I may have to spend Christmas away from my family -- especially when I was a young Marine with a wife and two small boys.
That's why I'm reaching out on behalf of the USO today. The USO set a goal to raise enough funds via email and text messages through Wednesday to provide 3,000 warm meals and other critical programs for service members far from their families.
**[Will you donate now to show your military support this holiday season? Every donation will be matched, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, for 48 hours, so please, give a tax-deductible gift now if you can:](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/N-6VBp9qXxM~/eDdpeE5LR1hLZ1V4ZnR4VzJxUWtwTFpLT2dsWGt1bkhkbFJxcTRMRGhHWVBRb3dDam5zMndkOWthUTJIc0pDOGM3YzBnZklyUFduYmVhVHJpblJWZ21NcEJrOTdDVytveEZkM3g5SXlwSjg9S0/NnhRZFFPMkJIa25JQWFCTWVaeU1NNUtKeGYrb0ZZTTdpWUxOVUpOa0k2YXV0ZS9Na1BvSGtzQUptOWxwekpBUU1NemdLdko2aUF4VmVXbDFwQXJzU1FXMUVlV2JXYnV6S0)**
| [$37.50 CAN HELP
PROVIDE ONE HOLIDAY MEAL](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBbeA6KF2/eDdpeE5LR1hLZ1V4ZnR4VzJxUWtwTFpLT2dsWGt1bkhkbFJxcTRMRGhHWVBRb3dDam5zMndkOWthUTJIc0pDOGM3YzBnZklyUFduYmVhVHJpblJWZ21NcEJrOTdDVytveEZkM3g5SXlwSjg9S0/NnhRZFFPMkJIa25JQWFCTWVaeU1NNUtKeGYrb0ZZTTdpWUxOVUpOa0k2YXV0ZS9Na1BvSGtzQUptOWxwekpBUU1NemdLdko2aUF4VmVXbDFwQXJzU1FXMUVlV2JXYnV6S0)
---
[$75 CAN HELP
PROVIDE TWO HOLIDAY MEALS](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$150 CAN HELP
PROVIDE FOUR HOLIDAY MEALS](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[MATCH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
**The USO has been supporting service members during the holidays since WWII** -- the same time my grandfather first put on his uniform. This year, we can continue this tradition and show our current military heroes that they are not forgotten.
**Please don 't wait. The match expires in just 48 hours: [Will you rush $75 now to have your gift matched and provide warm meals and other critical support to our service members this holiday and into the new year?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/N-6VBp9qXxM~/eDdpeE5LR1hLZ1V4ZnR4VzJxUWtwTFpLT2dsWGt1bkhkbFJxcTRMRGhHWVBRb3dDam5zMndkOWthUTJIc0pDOGM3YzBnZklyUFduYmVhVHJpblJWZ21NcEJrOTdDVytveEZkM3g5SXlwSjg9S0/NnhRZFFPMkJIa25JQWFCTWVaeU1NNUtKeGYrb0ZZTTdpWUxOVUpOa0k2YXV0ZS9Na1BvSGtzQUptOWxwekpBUU1NemdLdko2aUF4VmVXbDFwQXJzU1FXMUVlV2JXYnV6S0)**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for standing with our military community this Christmas.
Semper Fi.
Brad Meuli, USMC Retired

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Connecticut Elections 2024 - A Scorecard 🙂
body:
Same Day Registration Has Been Weaponized | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ff345772b834/when-we-vote-we-win-14761303?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
[](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=f2becfcee9&e=8763c56857)
| | | | |
---
|
# 2024 Voter Trends and the Path Forward for Connecticut
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | _**By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**_
---
| As the 2022 candidate for Secretary of the State in Connecticut, I’ve closely analyzed the trends and developments shaping our elections. Today, I’m sharing key insights from a comprehensive scorecard on the 2024 general election. These data points underscore both our challenges and opportunities as we work to improve the integrity and efficiency of our electoral process.
Connecticut ranked fifth among 50 states shifting rightward toward the Republican Party in 2024, with a notable nine-point swing in favor of Donald Trump. While this marks significant momentum, it’s tempered by a loss of five seats in Hartford—a clear reminder that success on the national stage doesn’t automatically translate locally. We must act strategically and refuse to take anything for granted.Several takeaways demand immediate attention:
**1\. Early Voting’s Limited Impact—A Silver Lining for Republicans** During my campaign, I cautioned that early voting would not impact voter turnout despite Democrats touting it as a transformative measure. This prediction proved accurate. Connecticut spent millions of dollars to implement early voting, yet we didn’t see a single additional voter at the polls. Instead, we shifted the days on which people voted, 40% of the electorate voted early but the overal turnout was 71% compared to 74% turnout in 2020, **we went down 3pts in voter turnout!**!
Ironically, early voting may have benefitted Republicans more than Democrats. While we await detailed turnout data segmented by party affiliation, early observations show low turnout in traditional Democratic strongholds like New Haven and Hartford, sometimes dipping into the mid-40% range. Republican voters appear to have taken better advantage of early voting, as it required in-person participation and offered a more secure alternative to mail-in ballots, which have inherent risks. Additionally, absentee voting declined as a proportion of overall voting, reinforcing the preference for in-person methods.
Moving forward, we must reassess the scope of early voting. To limit expenses and reduce the strain on part-time registrars across Connecticut’s 169 towns, I propose:
• **Seven Days of Early Voting for General Elections:** This should accommodate voters while keeping costs manageable.
• **One Day of Early Voting** for Primaries and Municipal Elections: Given their smaller scale, a single day of early voting would balance accessibility and efficiency.
By making these adjustments, we can preserve the benefits of early voting while ensuring it remains cost-effective and practical for our state.
**2\. Same-Day Registration Concerns** This system has been weaponized, particularly in college towns, where transient student voters significantly impact local races. Many of these voters participate once and then leave the community—sometimes even casting absentee ballots in their hometown elections later. This trend is alarming and speaks to the broader issue of voter residency requirements.
Opportunities for ReformThese patterns reveal an urgent need for reform. We should consider:
**• Cut-off Times for Same-Day Registration:** Limiting registration to no later than noon or 2 p.m. would help local registrars properly vet voters.
•**Stricter Residency Requirements** : Common-sense measures, like those implemented in states such as Georgia, could address loopholes created by transient voters.
• **More Secure ID Standards** : Allowing college IDs as voter identification is risky, given how easily they can be tampered with or recreated.
We cannot afford to let these trends shape our elections. I urge you to take action by engaging with your legislators, submitting your testimony to the General Assembly, or voicing support for common-sense reforms. Together, we can build a more muscular, resilient electoral system for Connecticut.

---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What do all these signs and symbols mean for you?
body:
A verse-by-verse explanation of Revelation
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5f22441929154cf3a751aea551d81ca3&_e=PxxtVwqMDWo0FQy2aeu8t4vITPpkEQq169He5WYNxoBn8oKFBk_LEkU3guV227PySxv_-NGmUeVJPfC-Yh2j4j-Cn2bckxyO8egQQTU7Jf15OnCNdWRFLV7_BQjbNn3MX6J5SCbGlknmk6XmSFqvVb37k8hYfTcJ5dUc9S3FnCb0tVA91y8MSWrBzNwD5e76jxS-DukYei-zzWS60VbpTw9e28WZ-vX17tx1dY85Dur1VuGY9Sd60r_ZpIZhmFjkVdScER5i0rbCBc4MllmxmT_1XMbTl2aBzLzKaNEH9AXefEqgMpzPCOAR6bpokdSUlbWTaxuOf3TGIpiZMiLsFbvuBwO7jOCsYQK9o-F6CeC1jkiXdsvqkd9i9bA-aVBhBjtUgtNzd4z65q7Ir4FbHw%3D%3D)
---
Hello Peter, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5f22441929154cf3a751aea551d81ca3&_e=PxxtVwqMDWo0FQy2aeu8t4vITPpkEQq169He5WYNxoBn8oKFBk_LEkU3guV227PySxv_-NGmUeVJPfC-Yh2j4j-Cn2bckxyO8egQQTU7Jf15OnCNdWRFLV7_BQjbNn3MX6J5SCbGlknmk6XmSFqvVb37k8hYfTcJ5dUc9S3FnCb0tVA91y8MSWrBzNwD5e76jxS-DukYei-zzWS60VbpTw9e28WZ-vX17tx1dY85DuproCif3c1kBjq9whdWKuLzyPR2xg5hCgQcFxv4SIhJrRb-BOcyH_qLEa3_pDJi5zz_cahKKk5ruljz22RaE_CKbJFdk6KCdyHHB2jKKwXXuS5weVx9QAxzrqKaNvGKAecd4dK_fF0KDC6GnZCXSp7lEQkRO8QKBodNkbH1DHRRjg%3D%3D)
---

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Delco overspends by 2.1 mil, analysis finds
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6ee7688004&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Delaware County’s bond issuance cost $2.1 million more than necessary, local analysis finds](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8299b5b27e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
Delaware County could have saved $2.1 million dollars when it issued bonds this summer but chose not to, preferring instead to go with private entities as opposed to a regional government-associated entity set up for the sole purpose of saving governments money on loans. That’s according to a[ loan analysis document](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fbf90e5781&e=b7b3eddce2) from the June meeting of the Delaware Valley Regional Finance Authority, or DVRFA. When Delaware County decided this year to issue bonds through private lenders, it could have borrowed from the DVRFA but decided to take a more costly route, the DVRFA analysis concludes. After accounting for all items associated with the bond offering like capitalized interest, underwriting fees, and “other issuance costs,” Delaware County “paid $2,124,851 more debt service than a comparable [DVRFA] Loan,” the analysis concludes. **Why It Matters. **The analysis also notes that law firm Ballard Spahr acted as the “bond counsel.” Ballard Spahr has political ties to the current council. According to Councilwoman Christine Reuther’s LinkedIn resume, she worked for the firm for about five years ending in 1993. In a more recent show of those close connections, however, Ballard held a fundraiser for Reuther in 2019,[ according to a page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ffcd2a722b&e=b7b3eddce2) from Reuther’s campaign website. Although the advertisement for the fundraiser on the website has since been taken down, it was saved through the Internet Archive, a nonprofit that archives billions of webpages daily to create a historical archive. The firm’s political committee gave $2,000 to Council Chair Monica Taylor’s re-election in 2023. As _Broad + Liberty_[ __ reported](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=039384938e&e=b7b3eddce2) in July, the county’s spending on outside, third-party counsel has skyrocketed since Democrats took control of the council after the 2019 elections. In that last year of Republican control, spending on third-party attorneys or law firms was about $400,000. In 2023, that figure had ballooned to $4.5 million — the highest spending of any of the collar counties.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4c7f71d68b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Beth Ann Rosica: U.S. House report vindicates parents who fought to keep schools open](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a85a2aa266&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
This month, almost four years after these tragic events, the subcommittee released the “After Action Review of the Covid-19 Pandemic: the lessons learned and a path forward” report. While there were no surprises in that report for me personally, I finally received some much awaited vindication.

The subcommittee report is comprehensive, as they “sent 100 investigative letters, conducted 38 transcribed interviews or depositions, held 25 hearings or meetings, and reviewed more than one million pages of documents from dozens of custodians” as a part of the process.

The report confirms there was no “science” to support extended school closures, masking, or social distancing. Furthermore, Dr. Anthony Fauci lied to the American public, and state and local health departments blindly followed his guidance. I hope that he is held accountable for his actions.

**Why It Matters**. These findings reveal that the majority of school districts in Pennsylvania followed not only poor but misguided recommendations — which were not rooted in science — from their local, state, and federal health departments. It also questions whether school districts may be liable for the consequences of extended school closures and forcibly masking children against their parent’s wishes.

Furthermore, the report shows that the Center for Disease Control (CDC) colluded with the American Federation of Teachers (AFT), a national political labor union, to keep schools closed.

**Quotable**. “Schools remained closed longer than necessary because of AFT’s political interference in the CDC’s school reopening guidance. AFT is a political union, not a scientific organization, that advocated for mitigation efforts that prolonged school closures — including an automatic closure ‘trigger,’” the report said.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ce145420b6&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4fdd1057ed&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Emily Greene: Congress should pass site-neutral policies to lower patient costs and improve access](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=934b79a490&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Math takes a backseat, social justice drives the bus in PA schools](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7ce87a5c6e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Ryan Costello: Misuse of opioid settlement funds betrays Pennsylvania’s most vulnerable](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=21fa54c856&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Elizabeth Stelle: Corporate welfare doesn’t work. Cutting red tape does.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=14d24788b9&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Wally Nunn: Delco council can’t fool all of the people all of the time](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4397b4b971&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Delco stays silent on mystery $7.6 million that helped backfill 2025 proposed budget](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1dcd4ceaa2&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
Donald Trump is returning to the White House and Joe Biden’s four years of de facto open borders are one of the main reasons why. At _The Free Press_ last month, the Manhattan Institute’s [Reihan Salam took a look at the mess on the border](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=877bc74eb6&e=b7b3eddce2) and proposed some reasonable steps on how to start fixing it. (It’s what we’re reading now because we’re still wading through all of the post-election articles in open tabs on our browsers.) Biden and Kamala Harris acted as though there was nothing anyone could do to stem the flow of illegal immigration; Salam shows the lie of that with proposed fixes that could restore confidence in our government’s ability to maintain its own borders.********
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

body:
TO: President Trump and Melania...

| |
---
| | | Friend -

There are just DAYS left before Christmas and we need your help wishing President Trump and Melania a Merry Christmas!

The Trump Family could have left politics behind and enjoyed a peaceful life out of the public eye.

**But they didn 't.** They continued their fight to help SAVE our country from the disastrous policies of the Radical Left and RESTORE the fundamental freedoms that make America great.

They are an inspiration so we want to make this Christmas as special as we can._And what better way to do that than to send them a card signed by their most dedicated supporters!_

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. clean_body: TO: President Trump and Melania... | | | | | Friend - There are just DAYS left before Christmas and we need your help wishing President Trump and Melania a Merry Christmas! The Trump Family could have left politics behind and enjoyed a peaceful life out of the public eye. But they didn 't. They continued their fight to help SAVE our country from the disastrous policies of the Radical Left and RESTORE the fundamental freedoms that make America great. They are an inspiration so we want to make this Christmas as special as we can.And what better way to do that than to send them a card signed by their most dedicated supporters! "We’re asking you to help us out and sign their card as soon as you can:" President Trump and Melania, Your unwavering dedication has given us all the gift of a brighter future. name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Your 2024 End-of-Year Impact Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Our team here at the DLCC crunched the numbers to show you how your support of state Democrats made an impact this year. Open this email to learn more. | | |
---
| |
---|---
This election cycle was unlike anything we have ever seen. Despite more money and attention than ever flooding federal races, we still saw one of the most shocking election results in modern history. However, at our ballot level, the story was remarkably different. **Right now, state legislatures are the _only_ level of the ballot where Democratic power is on the rise, and our accomplishments are thanks to your support this year. Thank you, for everything you’ve done for state Democrats in 2024. ** We’re excited to share with you how your support of state Democrats made an impact this year. While you read, know that you made a real difference in the lives of Americans nationwide, and we are so grateful to celebrate our success together!
* * *
🔢 **The Year in Numbers** 🔢 | **Democratic-held chambers:** 39 **2024 Special election victories:** 29 **2024 Donors:** Over 130,000 **2024 DLCC Members:** Over 24,000 **Average online donation amount:** $26
---
* * *
**🎉 Our Top Cycle Victories 🎉**
[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW2aN-O-bpoVp69blojF9fwK4XAkr6xJuqb0o2ko6mlBw9eAOp5EHxAul1Qiy0Uiezb-VRi-tOhazRjkkj2SLeGAqsvjXTfbeKEeklxEvjCkYYgnHi3JW8nhhsRHpJvWYBxN4xTck_ClOx1552QnL_VptVGXRsllpllkHTS3CfdhtQMVCtvziqN99LwQX4_RRwGVg-L_MRPTFsybD-xlmMCnY_ORdIkB2UyXMjIBRx3biDs1xDdKLN8mdFAufCr69SBXlPJxSq6qPY3-fPS8cYKntLVa_-m61Kt2YP2dUHjSPNSl3vC9sXnKradFpyTwaBAzYEsdySB-8_lMLWOtoQPr5e4LJslPFu8yXvG0ZAztTVZqkLPs4UFROYsFjr1FWlR31aqMg11HeK20WFbLrBt8GatOSH0-4qQLzkhwlvtwNVLLvDtp_1e9Ayb7vib-dgStMfsYnLyOFKyQlF8rLw7__iigufos9KnsV01L0j4Hjaa2AUE-dnVN8vRHAUygUxPtgjLGA18IsbEtE7Dj5ARHxsbm_-3aBo2luvFsOLgiD34vUA1iXtQnMXvWs88OzNg/4cb/6lx7-PX3Ttmxc1wmOa6-hg/h0/h001.VU6StKwVWgTtuNOWFFrEhMouxWAfsF0u6eEEu9oI8TU)

**📰 With the support of this team, we made waves in the press. Our hard work is being recognized nationwide.📰**
[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW2aN-O-bpoVp69blojF9fwK4XAkr6xJuqb0o2ko6mlBw5nU_2BBfWgnERUdU7nTeIxgdtCj4TsFzDj6uZZz9FY8eEMVVUQ3KovEY4_usPzxk12zildRAd6uYLeqzulGt1UR6ZL94JoTfPUNhnfJ2LXo6KCX9O4kZsVGa44hRNiNk1KOIdHWDMLFCkfHnHtqMsoqWXlngHmeVwu3u7zebx02qtorQBMRoMKPQwMjURYrL6WaVID3kPvU6Bomd4dMw4xJ4fA75dzMoDD_vIUYkOKe0r_PxacDAny0sEsmG2e_1ZEdupVx4G4Th3vTP-0iKdMtjIBJfvwbAL14xh8-sVcpnD05iaPblVFXUrnEE3hfx1Qa0i0NKNcX4LHOjKsO-XQ0vwEMtnjb1XYQW1e3vc7Bb_-I5UHstjINPCp8pLpSXRM0pa0YfC5Xi7aiWPw-Tcd-EUA6k4twiqAHFufkeXuJnbXuXlPzD-YWYCIf7Vhx1UQ3FJFtT5a2OFJM0LY_BwZBOkReZw90qb8MTPt1HM1NhfhG62BceF-1QmoWYD3-YarZWxATDZJsXPMhl3INLsA/4cb/6lx7-PX3Ttmxc1wmOa6-hg/h1/h001.IGNcNrpqv-OCG8SOyHCmqKdC182z64jZBHcDljz-A38)

* * *
**✨ Together, we made history, electing...**
🩷 **A historic number of women legislators nationwide**
🩷 **The largest female legislative majority** in U.S. history in New Mexico
🌟 Rep. Melissa Minor-Brown – **the first Black woman Speaker in Delaware history**
🏳️⚧️ Aime Wichtendahl – **the first openly trans member of the Iowa legislature**
🏳️🌈 Amaad Rivera-Wagner – **the first openly gay Black man ever elected to the Wisconsin legislature**
🏳️🌈 Keturah Herron –**the first openly LGBTQ+ person of color elected to the Kentucky Senate**
🏳️🌈 Rashaun Kemp – **the first openly gay Black man elected to the Georgia legislature**
🏳️🌈 Gabby Salinas – **the first openly LGBTQ+ woman and the first Latinx person to be elected to the Tennessee legislature**
🏳️🌈 Molly Cook – **the first openly LGBTQ+ member of the Texas Senate**
* * *
**And many of our state legislators were elected to higher office 👇**
[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW2aN-O-bpoVp69blojF9fwK4XAkr6xJuqb0o2ko6mlBwv72HacD2y8ax2wVPoP8N424PuINnbUHNGORyOQ8CtdQwBJKW97WD1w-CZi8r1h35wzpu7MDBX8yz4eU6jAU0G6AX6Mry-q4HASsDQPctLG2Y25WdgVcZQ1873H7QHTWLvCUNoZ2V7HkYA6cfG8ePQ0A6WHYav_0EJtN1_TD1MQYX0ExWAfCGTnTt0IjH5ppsk04bJjxXr65liGDmYkQ8xUyMV8kFJXoxe0eDARTYDNyEaGrUKjvVqCpoggtS3wLvNzxZC4p3ajI9ZMtLWR3eIGQV8SncFFMhCkJ5E-DxNQP64Wcr6P0ixLbJ97IUYVNIC2Qq6mdh7854DSAosCKZyqGkDSAn0PSTTrzIfiuuvej-u1dhLSSUMxHRD4iHjKyU6p8g0a4Rpj8WGgLwwXP1nesvhWy_W8-k70AnGtnMV2Tb6gl1U3lLHTnAsqiJDIPo4FpMMPUqN1dQJJ-BdmOGREQow59rcwuvSXfHObxtSVAeh-Kx_VnYBfMi2-KgbIMB237nEVz-4xyJD7a1aj8vDA/4cb/6lx7-PX3Ttmxc1wmOa6-hg/h2/h001.OGSIBqfVoKrUkBwXJUqOKR-JcVU11SubTKmF_DhuZSU)
---
* * *
This is only an overview of the power of grassroots organizing, though we tried to put your impact into numbers and words, so much more of it will be _felt_ in the daily lives of your neighbors and loved ones in your community and beyond.
This cycle, _you_ did your part and helped elect Democrats who will protect abortion access for millions. _You_ supported candidates who will stand against the GOP’s relentless attempts to restrict access to the ballot. _You_ powered leaders who are invested in building a brighter future to victories nationwide.

clean_body: Our team here at the DLCC crunched the numbers to show you how your support of state Democrats made an impact this year. Open this email to learn more. | | | | | ---|--- This election cycle was unlike anything we have ever seen. Despite more money and attention than ever flooding federal races, we still saw one of the most shocking election results in modern history. However, at our ballot level, the story was remarkably different. Right now, state legislatures are the only level of the ballot where Democratic power is on the rise, and our accomplishments are thanks to your support this year. Thank you, for everything you’ve done for state Democrats in 2024. We’re excited to share with you how your support of state Democrats made an impact this year. While you read, know that you made a real difference in the lives of Americans nationwide, and we are so grateful to celebrate our success together! 🔢 The Year in Numbers 🔢 | Democratic-held chambers: 39 2024 Special election victories: 29 2024 Donors: Over 130,000 2024 DLCC Members: Over 24,000 Average online donation amount: $26 🎉 Our Top Cycle Victories 🎉 📰 With the support of this team, we made waves in the press. Our hard work is being recognized nationwide.📰 ✨ Together, we made history, electing... 🩷 A historic number of women legislators nationwide 🩷 The largest female legislative majority in U.S. history in New Mexico 🌟 Rep. Melissa Minor-Brown – the first Black woman Speaker in Delaware history 🏳️⚧️ Aime Wichtendahl – the first openly trans member of the Iowa legislature 🏳️🌈 Amaad Rivera-Wagner – the first openly gay Black man ever elected to the Wisconsin legislature 🏳️🌈 Keturah Herron –the first openly LGBTQ+ person of color elected to the Kentucky Senate 🏳️🌈 Rashaun Kemp – the first openly gay Black man elected to the Georgia legislature 🏳️🌈 Gabby Salinas – the first openly LGBTQ+ woman and the first Latinx person to be elected to the Tennessee legislature 🏳️🌈 Molly Cook – the first openly LGBTQ+ member of the Texas Senate And many of our state legislators were elected to higher office 👇 This is only an overview of the power of grassroots organizing, though we tried to put your impact into numbers and words, so much more of it will be felt in the daily lives of your neighbors and loved ones in your community and beyond. This cycle, you did your part and helped elect Democrats who will protect abortion access for millions. You supported candidates who will stand against the GOP’s relentless attempts to restrict access to the ballot. You powered leaders who are invested in building a brighter future to victories nationwide. We couldn’t have done this without you. For a more in-depth analysis of this past cycle and our outlook for 2025, you can check out our full impact report at the link below: I can’t wait to see what this team can accomplish with you on our side in 2025. With gratitude, Heather Heather Williams President Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Our 51st State!? (via VPP)
subject: this is a TOTAL gamechanger!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Click to unlock 2 more Dem Senators >>
| **You know:** DC is missing representation in Congress due to its lack of statehood. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18232%2E878179%2Egvj_v-) **You know:** If DC becomes a state, we’d be __almost guaranteed__ to gain 2 more Democratic Senators.

**And you know:** Control of the Senate usually comes down to just 1 or 2 seats — _DC statehood could _lock down_ a Democratic Senate majority for us, team!_

**[So we need to know if you support the fight for DC Statehood: Take your one-click poll ASAP! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=18232%2E878179%2Egvj_v-)** | [DC SHOULD BE THE 51ST STATE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=18232%2E878179%2Egvj_v-)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18232%2E878179%2Egvj_v-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18232%2E878179%2Egvj_v-).**

name: Bill Gray
subject: Big media vs. new media
body:
You think this is the end of an era?

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a3a1eef3af444b34928a7a072e702b19&_e=0u_dXTQBTSUr5NZo-3ml7-bpMMQczDPFes35BhQ8d0YjaDTDC_TIPc-C2WMmOSXuP252VAVjcliYsLw1ltMEncho_hokYeFBCojbA7kXrAO5jzya5_BC32HZkeUyyQX34LVUGPC5Zq29Lo1s8hUKBlWk23854LH7cN8TCZMwmFonT39Tw95YITlUghd54GmU2-nrL9XlHjKCf_K0ROPfILaoEiMke0idiq9zHQmqeNuhK2olCwZKYV2_LYrYcUE9bUEfnpeD_5qrPBgUOg-KofgpfwdKTVxupRXZF_RVvgP6hVgjupcSajotQ7pBpQjpTBjd2SKoxFln24XMFFd-32k0DIFoAuqSntfVWSUIQZ7tJWTUJDyDm8_bMztEMixGsSv-8yf1xDG0285AEXqL9A%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend, how are you today? I'm reaching out with a bold prediction--what do you think about this...

**Big media is over**.

It's the end of an era. And I can't say I'm sad to see it go.

But the death spiral of the legacy news media means that [I need YOUR urgent help to be forward-thinking during this news revolution.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a3a1eef3af444b34928a7a072e702b19&_e=0u_dXTQBTSUr5NZo-3ml7-bpMMQczDPFes35BhQ8d0YjaDTDC_TIPc-C2WMmOSXuP252VAVjcliYsLw1ltMEncho_hokYeFBCojbA7kXrAO5jzya5_BC32HZkeUyyQX34LVUGPC5Zq29Lo1s8hUKBlWk23854LH7cN8TCZMwmFonT39Tw95YITlUghd54GmU2-nrL9XlHjKCf_K0ROPfILaoEiMke0idiq9zHQmqeNsh8s1lyBKJzaqrMN-sDuQhtUgKV-4oqHnXPPHeGVRFFy3eTKI71LMET_7NzcQBp6gvais2GjnZacJnz_V41leerAskFHK8IjsnlwYFtynnpfVzY2I1DxnRXQ-lboSFkt6d42MH8DrYDyBfCvvID2XLTSbPF9Bv7goAdcdvOM_gTg%3D%3D)

I'll tell you more about how you can help in just a moment, but first, let me tell you why we need to act right away.

Next year, there's one thing we can absolutely expect...

Big media will continue to call for censorship of new media. And honestly, is that any surprise to you?

The ladies on _The View_ are already blaming the election results on X (formerly Twitter) and "misinformation." The _New York Times_ claims we're experiencing a "dark turn in democracy." Rachel Maddow cried on MSNBC about the dangers of Elon Musk and new media. Here's the thing--so-called "Big Media" has been corrupt and one-sided for a long, long time. In fact...

[**Hillsdale has led the fight against "Big media" for decades--with YOUR help!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a3a1eef3af444b34928a7a072e702b19&_e=0u_dXTQBTSUr5NZo-3ml7-bpMMQczDPFes35BhQ8d0YjaDTDC_TIPc-C2WMmOSXuP252VAVjcliYsLw1ltMEncho_hokYeFBCojbA7kXrAO5jzya5_BC32HZkeUyyQX34LVUGPC5Zq29Lo1s8hUKBlWk23854LH7cN8TCZMwmFonT39Tw95YITlUghd54GmU2-nrL9XlHjKCf_K0ROPfILaoEiMke0idiq9zHQmqeNsSbNkk2f2f67aWqcTRjh_Isc63KmDRuoYI3p1pBf-dT-VTFV4C224ZPEaWM4HS-dGm12ArdXMbECuP9iEd-mAGwZl6PRwn9i8ZXcASmyAy4YZTHd6su926w75MWc6janb9guqJJVphshuU-uf1k8r4nhYzUA8CErfodc2FWfWqlA%3D%3D)

_Imprimis_ --an important alternative to pervasive and pernicious far-Left narratives--first reached the mailboxes of a few thousand readers in 1972. Now, we fight against dangerous ideologies through our **free** online courses, **Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , and all our **outreach on social media**.

**And our outreach numbers in the millions --a far cry from the few thousand folks that received the first issue of _Imprimis_ back in '72!**

We've also partnered for decades with talk-radio shows and podcast hosts like Mark Levin, Tucker Carlson, and Charlie Kirk. We've also had the blessing to work with some of the best radio hosts in history--Rush Limbaugh and Paul Harvey--to promote the principles of liberty that Hillsdale staunchly defends.

**This has been some of our most important work. And it 's work we couldn't do without YOU.** You've especially been a big help to us during attacks from legacy media and censorship from Big Tech companies like Facebook.

Thank you so much!

Next year--as Big Media clings desperately to remain relevant--we can expect more attacks, so [I pray you'll continue to stand with us for TRUTH against Leftist dogmas.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a3a1eef3af444b34928a7a072e702b19&_e=0u_dXTQBTSUr5NZo-3ml7-bpMMQczDPFes35BhQ8d0YjaDTDC_TIPc-C2WMmOSXuP252VAVjcliYsLw1ltMEncho_hokYeFBCojbA7kXrAO5jzya5_BC32HZkeUyyQX34LVUGPC5Zq29Lo1s8hUKBlWk23854LH7cN8TCZMwmFonT39Tw95YITlUghd54GmU2-nrL9XlHjKCf_K0ROPfILaoEiMke0idiq9zHQmqeNtx3fil0dhsV6ISiTY4R5JOtDVRk1jYzZYUtgOFfuGRXBegNVdb2PnhYNWVk6-CJOczgG8e9D9IK_iHfZqz9wExnw1f-9mZcixUhhjJbry2yC-VFmKbdo6NJ0I3pVbUw2e1nJOUf4myPN0hRijKQrMxm5qgveVwa5h_gHEALsuPIA%3D%3D)

An important part of our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** will be confronting Big Media head-on. As more Americans begin turning off MSNBC and canceling their _New York Times_ subscriptions, with your generous gift today, you will provide...

* Free subscriptions to _Imprimis_ --our digest of liberty--featuring constitutional perspectives on contemporary problems, including immigration, the weaponization of government, and education.
* Podcasts including "The Larry Arnn Show," "Hillsdale Dialogues," and "Liberty and Learning with Mark Levin," all on **our Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , part of the "New Media" that more and more people--especially and including young people--are tuning in to.
* Free online courses on the Constitution, American history, Christianity, and Marxism--especially important as our audience for these courses begins to become younger and younger. We've got a great lineup of courses planned for 2025, by the way...
* Massive outreach on social media--including X (formerly known as Twitter)--where we often share our educational content, such as lectures from Hillsdale events, free online courses, informative surveys, and our learning videos.

**I hope you know we can only accomplish all of this with your help.**

[**Are you with us?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a3a1eef3af444b34928a7a072e702b19&_e=0u_dXTQBTSUr5NZo-3ml7-bpMMQczDPFes35BhQ8d0YjaDTDC_TIPc-C2WMmOSXuP252VAVjcliYsLw1ltMEncho_hokYeFBCojbA7kXrAO5jzya5_BC32HZkeUyyQX34LVUGPC5Zq29Lo1s8hUKBlWk23854LH7cN8TCZMwmFonT39Tw95YITlUghd54GmU2-nrL9XlHjKCf_K0ROPfILaoEiMke0idiq9zHQmqeNthgMgeTDZPa8IOzMtGytC79g2elvQCQQ882KSNvQj7BHpbUfuLtzV_QhPn6h0AX935zqa-zTuONO4a8P8D-X_OtD0XYh6NM5gi-kUX7LnT5VtiLU9hZA5avG5-5KHaM0Qkd0qOzfcFXVCOsPbuqPpis6xCLESqixTaYU6-QrUf-Q%3D%3D)

This is an exciting time when we can do so much to restore liberty. Together, we will STOP Big Media LIES and propaganda and TEACH the American people the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution.

To do so, we must expand these programs further than we ever have before--and that brings me to my last point...

I'm asking for your most generous year-end support for next year's **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

**If you haven 't renewed your support yet, can I count on you to please give your best tax-deductible year-end gift right away?**

**You can make your gift online, safely and securely, at this link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a3a1eef3af444b34928a7a072e702b19&_e=0u_dXTQBTSUr5NZo-3ml7-bpMMQczDPFes35BhQ8d0YjaDTDC_TIPc-C2WMmOSXuP252VAVjcliYsLw1ltMEncho_hokYeFBCojbA7kXrAO5jzya5_BC32HZkeUyyQX34LVUGPC5Zq29Lo1s8hUKBlWk23854LH7cN8TCZMwmFonT39Tw95YITlUghd54GmU2-nrL9XlHjKCf_K0ROPfILaoEiMke0idiq9zHQmqeNuK4bp1v4ex1UI4-FEU9MkRNtM16fO87b5DH0MyJlx_hkqaBPeRfWDPBJX-nfoBmdhCpRFNNJfz6x86BGea1d93tdrtbLbrFDk90NPa7ccHjdCNTeg3LtkqFD0idqrmo5lVz277Fl2Gez6XXugkJqSniiy9PF3nVgmiw3PJ6xv57w%3D%3D)

And because we can count on the support of informed patriots like you, we'll continue to accomplish our goals without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT.

So please help us reach our $6,000,000 year-end online goal by **December 31** (that's only a few days away!).

Your gift of any size will help us restore liberty today, and secure liberty for the long term. After all, there is only one way to save liberty in America--EDUCATION.

Thank you for helping us meet this historic moment head-on--and for reading all the way to the end of this email! Really appreciate you,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** The era of Big Media is over. But next year, as legacy media attempts to cling to relevance, we can expect even more attacks. So I need your help to provide all our outreach, including _Imprimis_ , the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and free online courses, to millions for FREE. Next year, we plan to expand our outreach to newer and younger audiences.

Thanks to the help of informed patriots like you, we remain on the vanguard of new media--standing up to the lies and propaganda of the legacy media with the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution. This work will be even more important in 2025.

**That 's why I hope I can count on you today for a generous, tax-deductible gift to help us meet our $6,000,000 online funding goal--before December 31.** I've included your secure link to give right now here:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a3a1eef3af444b34928a7a072e702b19&_e=0u_dXTQBTSUr5NZo-3ml7-bpMMQczDPFes35BhQ8d0YjaDTDC_TIPc-C2WMmOSXuP252VAVjcliYsLw1ltMEncho_hokYeFBCojbA7kXrAO5jzya5_BC32HZkeUyyQX34LVUGPC5Zq29Lo1s8hUKBlWk23854LH7cN8TCZMwmFonT39Tw95YITlUghd54GmU2-nrL9XlHjKCf_K0ROPfILaoEiMke0idiq9zHQmqeNvXOSxBZ2uOsAb-WvftNX4ACRfAL2i40jgIqtfRbY5u9UXZG-ZhJd-54r_5q6APzi7I2zPh8CvT_0H4pwMyocOoMUHemnlWnMVJD6DB750R6H7B39rxcOyIY8bG3kZqARmwQVaJJbLg-6r6dUdGw0k2w5CVFHOy3Nd-Q7xautHm2A%3D%3D) [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=a3a1eef3af444b34928a7a072e702b19&_t=Bbabi53urTyXv8HJfIs33-hFaq6zyia4xVKhlvhlAlCfSosMVVN0-wtUyJt7SPN5xwLP9dQXj4a8GodcG2Rdwr1974yeUPdtsqh4iN464DJ4yHVSeVk1CgEyhfLjrjW4)

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

clean_body: It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. And we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

| | | | | Peter – across the country, Republicans at ALL LEVELS of government are doing everything they can to ban books and prevent libraries from performing at full function. In fact, there have been over 10,000 instances of book bans over the last year, mainly targeting communities of color and the LGBTQ+ community. Republicans constantly talk about fighting for individual freedoms and limiting government overreach but will do anything to target everything and anyone they disagree with – even inanimate objects. [So we need to do everything we can to protect our libraries and prevent any further bans on books. Will you rush a donation of any amount to keep our nation’s libraries alive and prevent the GOP’s Project 2025 tactics?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefb3a320-3f4a-4645-93d3-33978ad36f4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. # You could be on the guest list for **_Trump’s Inauguration_** \- NO JOKE!

Patriot, in just a few weeks, Donald J. Trump will be sworn in as the 47th President of the United States!
We’re putting together a list of Trump supporters who made a difference in this election, and we’re handing it to Trump before his inauguration.
**__Here’s the deal:__****__**_Donate through**[this link](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxMkc-OmzAYxJ_G3Izszw6QA4e0hPSPWnW1lbrbCzK2Aa9s44JJlD59BaLRXse_0cz4Ey5Y091LlH9AAINRMwJA7IQATk_w6_mnPuscs4wKLM76y_f1FT7u6BUesJfi9-uT_NqL4XV-ObLPf_iJXOkDj_egH_AemmonjF3VvEpUCbIAKRNd0pxxyFlBSDKURduKlpGjoupQEGAkp0dCiWqP9EBJpxNTAgFOgR4o54zSlClCBRS8axmnGaOIk5vxqRq9sOotTosLqRxdYsshxjBvlWoE9azlMun0Zvyk1UogqDcaexHN6sZydM7EqDV-6ySC2gY8dHibgY0XS79MG4qtmSO-MjwDYvUSXeO0MotDrNo3Z6s4j8skNWKVDY0NzdDtuhQuCNN7xKp9G22il837iD2hmaFRW8vGhv_20UftI2LVujlqBFnjrVGIVZcfF_XJPYvzsonbvVl14ePfun_5BslUqnAz1po5yxEn_Vp2-6xrCf8CAAD__1nIr4c)** , and you’ll automatically be added to this exclusive list and entered to win 2 tickets to the Inauguration. _

[ DONATE! > ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxMkU9vnDAUxD-NuXmFn83CHjhsS-ifKJWiVmrSC_LaD3BkGwfMou2nr0B0lev4N5oZP-mCNe2tJPknAtAbPREAws8E4PwMv3_-wgfMKT8ySeUDfv-xvsLnHb3CHfZK_nl9Vo-d7F-nlxP_9i7O6ZXd8XgLeIf30AM6aeyq5lWiS1AFKJVgyXIuIOdFmiZ9qS6sYOKUnbICs0wIobBITxm7KFUAYpaYElIQDFjGhOCMHbhOmYRCtBcu2JEzItLF-IMevLT6LY6zCwc1uMSWfYxh2irVBOoJ1TziYTF-RL0SBOqNpl5Gs7qpGpwzMSLSt1YRqG2gfUu3GdR4OXfzuKHUminSK6cTEF7P0TUOtZkd4dW--biK0zCPCgmvbGhsaPp215V0QZrOE17t21gTvWo-RuwJzQSN3lo2Nvy3Dz6ij4RX6-aIBI6Nt0YTXt2eHrP35bZ8jZu43ZtXX8Twt-5eniAZSx0WY62ZjjkRabeW3T7rWsK_AAAA__-nmbAl)
## **_If you win (we're rooting for you), your plane tickets and hotel stay will be completely FREE!_**

body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2cb46c31d7d04159acda98987c92f314&_e=0RlG_WWckQLdAtBzAmbe-Nsgs_wcJwlpA8hrTdoyu3hC66GTwt-9CfDlWcYNEWGEGMxSbOnl2Z9SBaM2JORuFLLDz-0VV6808u97-nsEc2gWYWCIBJxOstA7dE38wILuZ7e5ZNHyNGpRpUAGwga4JR_VuF3YK43aWCG5YCXZLcynqZh7bL_S_bcSSnVEv4GKZRtQMHnaNewIMWn2lOkvLoJFZp2ZezeqQi9BdlBtSyYQJ0opJLHv9WnFCvQDBK3cXxcRcyZB25wr-v9tJTvqeaFsWmu7krGemVUvbOQliuUIfSpxxx8aZ5upP5boW6RsUwkOuVfLIpj5tWPQtkORsw-N0eiQ48GdYxonnm6w-IdLvehC63ce8ouSUQ0g3Su8ClzXQrY-VmhmfUYNh94a7w1J4kjQ8I6CZq10DACoBve4qv3hF9NKorpMfI-6Ud-s)
---
Dear Peter,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---
[**But if you can fund my battle to appeal this unjust ruling, please make a contribution of any amount to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund now that I’ve officially appealed this unjust ruling.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2cb46c31d7d04159acda98987c92f314&_e=0RlG_WWckQLdAtBzAmbe-Nsgs_wcJwlpA8hrTdoyu3hC66GTwt-9CfDlWcYNEWGEGMxSbOnl2Z9SBaM2JORuFLLDz-0VV6808u97-nsEc2gWYWCIBJxOstA7dE38wILuZ7e5ZNHyNGpRpUAGwga4JR_VuF3YK43aWCG5YCXZLcynqZh7bL_S_bcSSnVEv4GKZRtQMHnaNewIMWn2lOkvLoJFZp2ZezeqQi9BdlBtSyYQJ0opJLHv9WnFCvQDBK3cXxcRcyZB25wr-v9tJTvqeaFsWmu7krGemVUvbOQliuUPvAnnP9Vwye06wEl6LKUOrhUSfnExFp4rFRaW7SOclGFQS08E9iBEWh-dxz-knj03zfPVpNQdbjZ7GPlWZE7lOkLn3hMOh8GXCSUr_EWBla1cC47eozsGvp_Y1Bb165HZ1nXHLDFILEmAr5S22ghY)

clean_body: I will continue to fight this injustice. | Dear Peter, The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections. To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up everything I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have officially APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/497966903baa536c/?utm_campaign=20241119&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card,
and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.

_That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —
especially since my own law licenses have been _taken away_ from me!

But there’s one thing I want to make clear...

...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal
Defense Trust.

_THAT’S A LIE. _

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust,
I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of
course the media and the Democrats will never report that.

And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to
contribute, please don’t. End of story.

But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my
freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice,
and rights of every U.S. citizen.

Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, this year's event will bring us to OVERWHELMING VICTORY in the American Culture War. Over four action-packed days, 15,000+ attendees will:
* **Hear from the MOST EXCITING speakers in the conservative movement** , including TUCKER CARLSON, DONALD TRUMP JR., RILEY GAINES, and MANY MORE,

* **Get critical activism and leadership TRAINING** so these hard-working kids are ready to return home and inspire MILLIONS MORE in their generation to LOVE AMERICA again, and

* **Build a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of PATRIOTIC STUDENTS** -- with 15,000+ attendees from ALL 50 states! -- so that our pro-America Movement is STRONGER and MORE UNITED than ever before heading into 2025!

_Your gift today to Turning Point USA 's AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund could be the reason that a young conservative from <<%STATE% / default: your state >>, or elsewhere in America, can join this one-of-a-kind event._ **[Fellow Patriot, would you consider a gift of $50 to help sponsor ONE MORE student ... a gift of $100 to help sponsor TWO MORE students ... and so on? **Peter — Fair maps have a profound impact on our democracy. Need proof?_Look no further than Michigan._**
This story starts back in 2018. Shortly after the NDRC was founded, we invested heavily in Michigan — in Gretchen Whitmer’s campaign for governor, in Democrats running for the state legislature, and in a proposal to create the Michigan Independent Citizens Redistricting Commission.
Instead of Republicans being in a position to gerrymander in 2021 (as they had been in 2011), Michigan became one of the first states in the country to take redistricting out of the hands of politicians and give that power to a non-partisan commission.
Fast forward to new maps in 2022 and the NDRC would help Michigan Democrats win a trifecta in the state government — gaining control of the governor’s mansion, the state house, and state senate.
With Democratic control came significant progress for the people of Michigan — expanding voting rights, repealing the state’s antiquated abortion ban, repealing the state’s ‘right-to-work’ law, and more.
**So that brings us up to this year — when Democrats were not only trying to defend their trifecta, but were also vying to unseat a state supreme court candidate who perpetuates the “Big Lie” and attended a Michigan “Stop the Steal” rally on January 6, 2021.**
The NDRC endorsed 19 Democracy Defenders — including Kyra Harris Bolden and Kimberly Ann Thomas for the state supreme court. With your support, we mobilized voters, raised money, and brought increased national attention to critical state-level races in Michigan.
**And our work paid off:_8 of our candidates won, including Bolden and Thomas!_** As Attorney General Eric Holder declared, “Michigan will have independent and fair-minded state supreme court justices who will protect their most cherished freedoms.”
**But Peter, our work is far from over.**
Next year, Michigan will hold a special election that will set the balance of power in the state senate, as Democrats currently hold 20 seats and Republicans with 18 seats. If the GOP is able to turn this seat red, it would leave Democratic Lt. Gov. Garlin Gilchrist as the tie-breaking vote.
As always, we’ll never stop organizing — and we’ll never stop working for a fairer democracy. Thank you for being a part of this movement.
Thank you,
Team NDRC

I just got word that we are running 12% behind on our mid-December fundraising goal.This isn’t ideal for us – especially with Jason Miyares running for reelection next year to defend President-elect Trump. But we have time to make up the pace.That’s why we launched a one-day $5,000 mid-month goal for us to hit by midnight. I’m a gay Afro-Latino man and a proud product of the Bronx, _born and bred._

I was raised by a single mother who kept my family afloat on a $4.25 minimum wage.

I grew up in public housing ridden with mold, leaks, vermin, and without consistent heat or water.

All the while, the city was shelling out millions on a Trump golf course right across from the street from me – _rather than housing for struggling New Yorkers._

Peter, **I know what it’s like** to be left behind by political leaders who pledged to serve you.

**I know what it’s like** to fight with everything you’ve got to make your voice heard.

And **I know what it’s like** to have to hide who you are for fear of violence.

So in 2020, I ran for Congress to deliver real and meaningful change for the hardworking people of the Bronx – **_the people who raised me._**

We’ve achieved so much together, but there is still so much work to do.

[That’s why I have to ask: Will you chip in $1 to support this people powered movement so I can continue fighting for you for years to come? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98737198/517647846/-1361974956?amount=1;amounts=1,2,3,4,5&refcode=RTFC_20241215_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmQ2ZmY4NC1mOWJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYomf1G1pbYW3XfFz8i5A30Y7GqlIclsNGvi2wJPD_w=)

If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Hi folks, it’s Andrew – Jared Moskowitz’s campaign manager. Can I tell you a secret? 👀 I was quietly hoping that Jared would win reelection by a HUGE margin in November so we could relax this election cycle and not constantly stress about reaching our mid-month goals. 💆♂️ Well, that didn't happen. 🤦♂️ = = Once again, our campaign just barely survived the Republicans’ all-out effort to topple our campaign and unseat Jared. But just because we lived to fight another day doesn’t mean that we’re off the hook. We’re still one of the most vulnerable seats in the entire country. That means Republicans are going to keep pouring money into flipping this seat. And Jared’s one of the rare few who actually have a track record of fighting for working people in Congress – he’s one of the good ones. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Someday we can relax. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te4c98faf-bc76-4167-9443-d7807c2410c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight...

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=pc7qZpEQH0zpOBtRXmd%2FScodDQwVkai0y3XFWu0JhmyuKOcasGm5RPJhpf7K5oYQ1Vi4cfYHbjOxPvoqfLDUj7Eqii5YufI4Uv5aWPSHTZumkGafB%2Fslr8C6wadXqwDSQpOgvKIVBbORGc08d4tvyCa8b3Y39YazFiUCptHoD05WQR85BFIdWoKgq%2B3GqBslzrdgdpIiuTqgrX8nUd2ilyS1Vz0svCWjISg%2FG9Zfzj8CoJGsAd9U5e4NSr7oEG9s1%2BjU41kUEauKrZJLVq10BMcm3BYEbzBpLO1o0JEo7umFGWKCetEPWMhgRJYCz4pypj9KZr6QcujvQrmREdtc%2B9umj6PKMcYm1Ue%2FWG2K9Pi8TDoduHKhS4zAcGJV%2BElnCi%2F3eJN0AFxHgR%2F2pvD%2FdihMZgaW0I8xy8%2FGqxUlyps%3D)

Hi Peter, When folks ask me what guides me in the halls of Congress, my answer is always the same: _perseverance._ The only college I applied to was the University of North Carolina. Even with the help of scholarships and grants, tuition became too much to bear, and I had no choice but to leave after I attended for 2 years to find work. I went back a few years later for one semester, but even then, I couldn’t manage working and studying full time. I got married, and had my incredible children, but I always felt like _something_ was missing. I felt like I had let down my friends who had graduated college, and wanted to be an example for my children on how to accomplish goals – but mostly, _I had this fire within me to succeed._ So, over 25 years later, I went back to UNC and earned a bachelor’s degree in Political Science and Afro and African-American studies. For those 4 semesters, I was a dean’s list student while working as County Commissioner. Peter, what I’m trying to say is: **I’m not a quitter, and you can count on the fact that I’ll never stop fighting to give you the representation you deserve in Congress.** But to do that, I need to know that you’re with me. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and we’re just short of our $5,000 goal. Trust me, I know that when we set our minds to something, we have what it takes to succeed. And I know that, together, we can pick up the pace and close this fundraising gap. Please consider pitching in $5 or anything you can right now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vf-em-fr-dec24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98738519/517651896/-1501998833?amount=5&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_121524_1_3_MM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2VlMzFmMC1mY2JhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DopUYsGGWw2dnCc-DAv7y9LQ0gQM9b9QDhyjQ-2YA_c=) Thank you, Valerie

name: Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk
subject: Saved for you
body:
Claim your free abortion rights sticker➡️
Peter—

Did you get our email? We still have a _free_ abortion rights sticker saved for you, so be sure to claim it now!

[**Just fill out this form and we'll mail your sticker free of charge.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98740623/517659345/-1784720526?sourceid=1150204&utm_campaign=25emjge-1206aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=sticker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDQ5NDRjZS1mZmJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWudAVM3wZ1V7GoO6OYttycHkwPpk_GjJxGefX3vBC8=&emci=9ae1586e-8cb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=744944ce-ffba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)

Essential, lifesaving health care shouldn't be controversial. But until the day abortion and all reproductive health care are rightfully recognized as human rights, we fight on.

[**Don't forget to complete this form to get your sticker!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98740624/517659346/-1784720526?sourceid=1150204&utm_campaign=25emjge-1206aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=sticker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDQ5NDRjZS1mZmJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWudAVM3wZ1V7GoO6OYttycHkwPpk_GjJxGefX3vBC8=&emci=9ae1586e-8cb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=744944ce-ffba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237) Display it proudly, with our gratitude for your dedication to reproductive rights.

Thank you!

Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk
Senior Director, Individual Giving
* * *
From: Center for Reproductive Rights <info@reprorights.org>
Sent: Wednesday, December 11, 2024 9:27 AM

clean_body: Claim your free abortion rights sticker➡️ Peter— Did you get our email? We still have a free abortion rights sticker saved for you, so be sure to claim it now! Essential, lifesaving health care shouldn't be controversial. But until the day abortion and all reproductive health care are rightfully recognized as human rights, we fight on. Display it proudly, with our gratitude for your dedication to reproductive rights. Thank you! Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk Senior Director, Individual Giving From: Center for Reproductive Rights <info@reprorights.org> Sent: Wednesday, December 11, 2024 9:27 AM To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Subject: ✅health care | Dear Peter, Thousands of supporters have already claimed their free sticker to display their support for abortion during this pivotal moment. | %recpient.first% – since I last emailed you, this situation has become far more serious.
---
With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our _new_ majority was _already_ going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat.
---
But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere **TOSS-UP!**
---
Trust me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November.
---
_That’s why I pulled**$2.5 MILLION** from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest._
---
And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for _nothing_.
---
So, before we officially close the books on 2024, I’m looking for **2.5 million PATRIOTS** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of truly ANY amount to help defend our new majority.
---

%recpient.first%,
---
Please don’t misunderstand...
---
I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom.
---
_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _
---
But we also must face a glaring reality:
---
**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**
---
Yes, you read that right. _1 seat._
---
I know how hard you fought for this new majority, %recpient.first%. I’m right there with you...
---
**Over the course of the election, I transferred _$2.5 million_ from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority.**
---
And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste.
---
That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end.
---
I’m asking **_2.5 million patriots_** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT.
---

clean_body: I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing. I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing. | %recpient.first% – since I last emailed you, this situation has become far more serious. With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our new majority was already going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat. But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere TOSS-UP! Trust me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November. That’s why I pulled$2.5 MILLION from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest. And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for nothing. So, before we officially close the books on 2024, I’m looking for 2.5 million PATRIOTS to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of truly ANY amount to help defend our new majority. Thank you, Jim Jordan \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Jim Jordan Date: Fri, December 6, 2024 Subject: Just 1 SEAT?! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com %recpient.first%, Please don’t misunderstand... I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom. After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House AND both chambers of Congress. But we also must face a glaring reality: Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT. Yes, you read that right. 1 seat. I know how hard you fought for this new majority, %recpient.first%. I’m right there with you... Over the course of the election, I transferred $2.5 million from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority. And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste. That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end. I’m asking 2.5 million patriots to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT. Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040

name: The Squad
subject: Down to the wire
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241215-1153-foote&t=1001&akid=1153%2E342411%2EAgtqn3 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Our Squad has been through a lot this year, and we're more determined than
ever to keep building this movement. But we can’t do it without you.

We’re down to the wire — today is our final mid-month check-in of 2024! We
need to reach our $25,000 goal, and we’re still $3,747 short.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241215-movement.5774PP&refcode=em20241215-1153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1153%2E342411%2EAgtqn3 ]Can you rush a donation to support our Squad and close the gap on our
fundraising slowdown before the clock strikes midnight tonight?

We’re facing an uphill battle,
Peter. With a new
administration set to take office in January, the issues we face — from
climate change to economic inequality — will only grow. Now more than
ever, we need to make sure that our voices in Congress are heard, and
we’re proud to know that our Squad will stand for us.

Every dollar you contribute will directly support our ability to mobilize
quickly and plan effective outreach strategies to grow our Squad across
the country. It will also allow us to continue running a robust digital
program to support each member of our Squad.

As a grassroots movement we rely 100% on people-power, and every dollar
matters. Whether you're able to give $5, $10, or $50, every donation adds
up to make a massive impact — especially in these final hours.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241215-movement.5774PP&refcode=em20241215-1153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1153%2E342411%2EAgtqn3 ]So[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241215-movement.5774PP&refcode=em20241215-1153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1153%2E342411%2EAgtqn3 ],
Peter, will you chip in and
help to get us over the finish line? Rush a donation of any amount before
midnight to help ensure our Squad can keep up the fight for our values.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241215-movement.5774PP&refcode=em20241215-1153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1153%2E342411%2EAgtqn3 ]Contribute ››

Together,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1153%2E342411%2EAgtqn3

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: We want to be transparent with you today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Since the majority of our fundraising comes from people like you contributing to emails like these, you deserve to know where we stand.
#

Hey there. Since the majority of our fundraising comes from people like you contributing to emails like these, you deserve to know where we stand.
We want to be transparent with you: Our fundraising has taken a pretty big dip in the past 24 hours. With our December mid-month fundraising deadline tonight, this isn’t great. All of our fundraising deadlines are important, but this one is particularly crucial. Our performance now will help us determine how much we need to raise to hit our goals for the month, the quarter, and the entirety of 2024 before our final FEC deadline of the year on December 31st.
That’s why we’re hoping we can ask you to step up and join the tens of thousands of others who have contributed to GIFFORDS PAC online since our founding in 2013.
Whether you can contribute $5, $25, $100, or any amount in between, you can be sure your donation goes directly towards our work to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
[**So please, use this link to make your first online contribution of $5 or any amount you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC before our December mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241215-1-b&t=3&akid=9624%2E3935704%2EWb0mMZ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-dec24.5v9WVG&refcode=em241215-1-b&t=7&akid=9624%2E3935704%2EWb0mMZ)**

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-dec24.DV10SI&refcode=em241215-1-b&t=8&akid=9624%2E3935704%2EWb0mMZ)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&refcode=em241215-1-b&t=9&akid=9624%2E3935704%2EWb0mMZ)**

Will you RUSH $5 before tonight's mid-month deadline to fight for the Senate? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241215-MAJORUpdate-TwoSpecialElections-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241215-MAJORUpdate-TwoSpecialElections-Pros-sl1&akid=19139%2E9716520%2E33uftP)**

**This could be a chance to break through, team:** Trump is planning to bring his biggest MAGA loyalists to his administration -- leaving TWO crucial Senate seats _up for grabs._

Trump won the White House -- but **he's making his SLIM far-right Senate majority even _more vulnerable._** With JD Vance and Marco Rubio set to answer Trump's beck-and-call, **special elections in Ohio and Florida could give Democrats _two more_ opportunities to FLIP crucial Senate seats and take back the majority!**
