Friend, Congress will vote this coming week on a Farm Bill and we need your help to fight back against attacks on critical nutrition assistance programs. At a time when hunger and poverty are on the rise in our communities, the House of Representatives’ version of the Farm Bill would cut $30 billion from SNAP nutrition assistance. Meanwhile, the Senate version of the Farm Bill (introduced by Michigan Senator Debbie Stabenow) makes long-overdue improvements to SNAP nutrition assistance, such as expanding assistance for students, creating a path for Puerto Rico to finally access SNAP benefits, removing the lifetime ban on nutrition assistance for people convicted of a drug-related felony, and increasing funding for local food banks. [**Take action today! Add your name to tell Congress to strengthen—not cut—SNAP nutrition benefits in the Farm Bill, which must pass before the end of the year.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJem8SUXwqu9rdxVCAUYUAXYOm69Ks41D8ijN5MPzFx2Fta4bmiUJkTFCoOV-ZUfs4A3qIMFAjUkaYClhvFskttiGxr_wp5xNL4hev6h096OF5BjWfd0sqUT_Aid8tqfoIY-WcLCVuRs0-1NPfNqDLaQuIcRh7XxK7cfIC5v-1M08p2lsrDluHMVKqGHXkfvrnKP1iopvyLCUK7G2FLVG9X3eF3iy26vz_obS2DTP0GWv85pEY6h0Ct4uVBbsA0PsFgnUj5Z8w5-Hn-Sbo7x6PQqsxucECHX41XVIxxMR1sGemhftB1TEYvRLfL2gMuGbAmNBYzDIwgJgGbY9M-B3djbp3RCFWVPpUd160VcAhiquEJ294k757wYdIxfr3cDYHpLSsy27ZLHd4blp_tAh_gfutAx9p6pTV9MI52VkW2sKDn5sZVk2VJw81NkbkHpsZ9H5p5yY4PN5vtJDcs_tqa40zbs2TaeoVhDioGWP5xTgiAtNt5qJHXVsahOzi23te_ly9aZg9L4ptQCzo4uMK1glKGW0sUuBk36AW-VRikfY/4cb/NSsyfyRtTT-t9GDBkBA9vw/h1/h001.FMMsU9-roRIr5PAKwD6g5a4RrARad13RJk_HkLUw9zg) | [TAKE ACTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJem8SUXwqu9rdxVCAUYUAXYOm69Ks41D8ijN5MPzFx2Fta4bmiUJkTFCoOV-ZUfs4A3qIMFAjUkaYClhvFskttsNmAUR6DXgZIBxxWxsFWpq-GR4IP2v9OSUbktgVaot_wWdtZu5yE_b-4V1M7XirM7EO0ab3zSDWGcxUBS5_NFqd0r3mw2g1QVSHGb0IlmSxE1TC19xQC0Jnr5xOdBLG6lR3xwL_UNbugwq6h4y8Ofj_WUQSkl2GuZp4I8B22jwS4zodywLRqUdRqU0izOxGus54qTu7KRUZDND-AQzl5GXfFwNplIIaQc816OCJvqC5soacZj0yKwDJsa0OkC_XBMXNqSs2a_m5ng5vTc3RtRiExdFBTMLK2Yem1iqR36Sd7GcHRwcAutiEySDHjRLXLbjil6oaUM9jQsIghCK65Dbdrcfa66HNXJbKtxgyLdRTmThYUVG7wvPw68YMGMy8YIvAOivEH53Yb4qsPQXSFynUmelxhndJEZ7XjSxZcIux-pfGyGfx2STF6CflTo0GmHPwbJbbp-sP0GVnGCsTXyg/4cb/NSsyfyRtTT-t9GDBkBA9vw/h2/h001.AzMUO-P85AoDpYVB39wJdBMzgBDGTlXBCWQy9ZFhtUY)

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Dec 14, 2024
Subject: TAKE ACTION: The House wants to cut $30 billion from SNAP nutrition assistance. The Senate bill would strengthen SNAP.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Congress is rushing to finalize critical legislation before it adjourns for the year and one bill that needs passage this month is the Farm Bill.
**Included in the Farm Bill are critical nutrition assistance programs including SNAP (food stamps), which millions of Americans need in order to feed their families.** Most Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, and according to Feeding America, more than 44 million Americans experience food insecurity. In my district in Michigan, the food insecurity rate is higher than the national average; you can [click here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVS0KF_xNoReQzISarsIdQk9cPfZsoohhBNrQcdSWD7xl8Mx5RddFBMKBqSDHmN1eSA5WyFJob3Xec79Z0b5QgnQQSAH6kqJaHm5KuHCeY-ZFJwLNl2KRYbYffY5PUX4t5r2b35oWE8idkh3CrwCslVMua3soCucVj6a8wuX8bTK_f_cE-H9mZXQYmSRUh73Gs10gQ1f_l4NqZ2c4dJ3HRQN3M7lQHgGe9sTZ440osqh-a6EXPVbMKtFc9sks84LpiDV02lCwYSSlZ7Z3kieMSw_0rw-Poprgu3d_LeE4-Ci2oen37mlEVj1P2QNyya7d_AkXWd0lKmnnkBKl2bifEvEMWvJg9Rc06dTWP5u0v8OONViWYa-b1_kWA-rt_ywC7Qn7ld89Ko_D_abSoc8O70KH7Ww9ucX3LyFsf1zz-yrQ5VMNHnqCAN_gfiI0a6ISUAm_0_9IThdf3wNSc03CjqSE-kJyQNN5okgs5RfjRsGa/4cb/NSsyfyRtTT-t9GDBkBA9vw/h3/h001.nzzg_yvlYFSH6EPV8eyWazeEPGtJwEwe16OLPn64Bz8) to see what the food insecurity rate is in your community.
**This year, the House version of the Farm Bill seeks to cut SNAP nutrition benefits by $30 billion.** But the Senate version, introduced by my state’s Senator Debbie Stabenow, makes critical improvements to SNAP to better cover the costs of a healthy diet, expands SNAP access for college students facing hunger, increases funding for local food banks, creates a long-overdue path for Puerto Rico to access SNAP benefits, removes the lifetime ban on nutrition assistance for individuals convicted of a drug-related felony, and more.1 We need improvements like these, not cruel cuts.
[**Help ensure that no one goes hungry this holiday season. Add your name to tell Congress: Strengthen—don’t cut—SNAP nutrition benefits in the Farm Bill.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJem8SUXwqu9rdxVCAUYUAXYOm69Ks41D8ijN5MPzFx2Fta4bmiUJkTFCoOV-ZUfs4A3qIMFAjUkaYClhvFsktttIMr8HTfrANFHcQQ6JjkO27YjE2ig1xwlvngkOyKiqnXyif2_6Tc3GVVNmp0U76lQYM7Ai4tjvLRDlXdp6bb8OyFuYx8vYqpieo1SAeFijQojP89jTXglgpmKn9h4ln4LTXLrg4OBJC7oeym1mXy7FmlTa0Lwp11NfefVTKm8C25Zz0Lzbs2234tb5NNfFqdoZMWieOuGk8FRiWp5v5TWI_gAX6HZqgloruYq1YWORzfMnobdYBX6vVBItE35bvmYBTRZ8qSU9Jgbt2I_jOuJ8INk5OmQVC_XoG59EtChs4mTg94DqNi3GTXAwWs9ncN0kdlCEx2Z0knhFK65vP_4Z-0GBfgqYHP4osvmZc81qxSrC2zjh68eRq3BggaFNjm67iSIkHPoUok4oWBEyJOFLyJnWY_NmvUFcrN7ZFRU_X3I1jewBAxtaENI6-_nj8Zemb7Zb0_T5BLMQb7tEH0Qk/4cb/NSsyfyRtTT-t9GDBkBA9vw/h4/h001.hOpjH-k-FXdytUoYpfFQmMRBtN2uU4UxbKF1nwRQKj0)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJem8SUXwqu9rdxVCAUYUAXYOm69Ks41D8ijN5MPzFx2Fta4bmiUJkTFCoOV-ZUfs4A3qIMFAjUkaYClhvFskttt8ok-G4u2fKWQqqIN_T2PR8W1KJsy7BRcs2Fh_YX6Gegg8r22_iH5rBM4kK030DuE9ldSBeQ6OOZ9RbFEjA5ZgxPut0liRQoHX6BoH4rX2Z-NZ0orczFVlHO4ALxKJvKCuY2qwFTFNtxfNcTwWZngNZH4YQjzWWEqbxcMtjqxTdltiVXWFYTwnqO0RP31lDpoyxY_at7eEu-gZXh2jfAVw860trKlIN-Ooj34WjFsLS4Fveql3LfF1RJxzozPigU_wR6TEjKB6g9ZdacArJF18CePRiBV8yn63Cb1-CbVwkASexAH59dOxEVra1AQ6s6esQ-Jav96Z56QZNi5Mq4NHKZFt7B2X0_2j0ar33bEyeCvt9IgDXjrH3XGTZtpkfRjAhJ_s1-wmrmEanTeFXEPQjAxNboKbRLeSvQ4CyTgDAK8MM9BpwX4JWydCXpDuYr9PXvzepeFn_onEgHHIEhYg/4cb/NSsyfyRtTT-t9GDBkBA9vw/h5/h001.9n8OFeMeCKKMGH5vGgHWsOGYZyKOr16mHoI1ZAptKdc)

Last year, 22% of Black people in the U.S. experienced food insecurity—more than twice the rate of white people.2 Meanwhile, Native communities face food insecurity at three times the rate of white U.S. residents and roughly 25% of Native people rely on federal nutrition assistance.3
The Farm Bill can also remove barriers for Native communities accessing critical nutrition assistance. Right now, Native people who qualify for SNAP and the Food Distribution Program on Indian Reservations are prohibited from accessing both nutrition programs in the same month.4 Advocates with the Native Farm Bill Coalition are calling to address this issue in the Farm Bill, reminding us that the federal government has a responsibility to Tribes, including ensuring adequate resources such as food.
Through this Farm Bill, we have an opportunity to address long-standing inequities in marginalized communities, including disproportionate rates of hunger. As with many community needs, our country can easily pay to expand resources like SNAP by reducing the military budget, which two-thirds of the House voted to pass last week.
[**Add your name now to urge Congress to pass a Farm Bill this month that strengthens SNAP and addresses the crisis of hunger in our communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJem8SUXwqu9rdxVCAUYUAXYOm69Ks41D8ijN5MPzFx2Fta4bmiUJkTFCoOV-ZUfs4A3qIMFAjUkaYClhvFskttmqVIFDu9-oAzcnlpnfHflkUOoTzljH76JiUmXQoCOlKnG10LtNP-HlE5msWtzrVPkUYf7xijA7L6p4zlArfZgYymDzV5klkeCvt-QZn-ft0kw5XEE-C2WsIXLRFzGjXAP8CQePsyimzXfEgMrbi-uChJoiOPzTnaezuy2xEFP5UnWZ_Q29KLtRQaL4mUzeCkeOMJjKtNVDOHFJb2aPKGgkyhalKregvrBDUCF4_gE3v_I7JTT2GOvGgsTaCup2WDM-yozWR5y8NdnjDrjc__sh0s51tV2vPoYlYKhMTwJyk9SZcrDKB1Vf9NndBDM33NkX-24RHzCLLU9NbpWH2ulcKYEchrhSP3Xb_kWBa3XEzGEuZxULdj2St8h_UlraBSWZ6NvZBmY1eW57gjBa1n2dvFwzCXZ_azdotwot3ctX0Z8fs75UqzwoXsEeTaE9bRjwfp74FpMSWY0tlOYEf11Q/4cb/NSsyfyRtTT-t9GDBkBA9vw/h6/h001.j9KthLkvn4PaMD8z5cF5fewKxQBhV3WGka_aME258Lw)
In love and service,
Rashida

clean_body: We have an opportunity to address long-standing hunger and inequities through the Farm Bill. | | | Friend, Congress will vote this coming week on a Farm Bill and we need your help to fight back against attacks on critical nutrition assistance programs. At a time when hunger and poverty are on the rise in our communities, the House of Representatives’ version of the Farm Bill would cut $30 billion from SNAP nutrition assistance. Meanwhile, the Senate version of the Farm Bill (introduced by Michigan Senator Debbie Stabenow) makes long-overdue improvements to SNAP nutrition assistance, such as expanding assistance for students, creating a path for Puerto Rico to finally access SNAP benefits, removing the lifetime ban on nutrition assistance for people convicted of a drug-related felony, and increasing funding for local food banks. | This holiday season, we will not allow Congress to cut nutrition assistance to vulnerable communities. Thank you for taking action today. Always serving you, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Dec 14, 2024 Subject: TAKE ACTION: The House wants to cut $30 billion from SNAP nutrition assistance. The Senate bill would strengthen SNAP. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Congress is rushing to finalize critical legislation before it adjourns for the year and one bill that needs passage this month is the Farm Bill. Included in the Farm Bill are critical nutrition assistance programs including SNAP (food stamps), which millions of Americans need in order to feed their families. Most Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, and according to Feeding America, more than 44 million Americans experience food insecurity. In my district in Michigan, the food insecurity rate is higher than the national average; you can to see what the food insecurity rate is in your community. This year, the House version of the Farm Bill seeks to cut SNAP nutrition benefits by $30 billion. But the Senate version, introduced by my state’s Senator Debbie Stabenow, makes critical improvements to SNAP to better cover the costs of a healthy diet, expands SNAP access for college students facing hunger, increases funding for local food banks, creates a long-overdue path for Puerto Rico to access SNAP benefits, removes the lifetime ban on nutrition assistance for individuals convicted of a drug-related felony, and more.1 We need improvements like these, not cruel cuts. Last year, 22% of Black people in the U.S. experienced food insecurity—more than twice the rate of white people.2 Meanwhile, Native communities face food insecurity at three times the rate of white U.S. residents and roughly 25% of Native people rely on federal nutrition assistance.3 The Farm Bill can also remove barriers for Native communities accessing critical nutrition assistance. Right now, Native people who qualify for SNAP and the Food Distribution Program on Indian Reservations are prohibited from accessing both nutrition programs in the same month.4 Advocates with the Native Farm Bill Coalition are calling to address this issue in the Farm Bill, reminding us that the federal government has a responsibility to Tribes, including ensuring adequate resources such as food. Through this Farm Bill, we have an opportunity to address long-standing inequities in marginalized communities, including disproportionate rates of hunger. As with many community needs, our country can easily pay to expand resources like SNAP by reducing the military budget, which two-thirds of the House voted to pass last week. In love and service, Rashida 1 2 3 4 * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s prosecuting Trump AND my husband
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6429ac7653cc48cb88923407c5206ec5&_e=LiYy5331wI36qD2ipe-BuGOS1nsm7Ih91-tSdybWLC3yhcYKvXVS_OUwdkTHyxCE_PKZh-7JmmF4uKXzCrqci3t0cR4iOaBqZq-WTLx7A0xUZxctEBek_P2QzUh8ANGl5KWOaOkDytANVhZdArn0TwFnk_A1iaetYpcMMjIiaoaLTMACZH58gSmKX0akvMitXEq50xCUZ5Jda5MWsrPhE8-c1AteWTWNdL1a2RhwwXPbUuBrxY4jBMDJgN8oE5d4idy_Z0a7HjnKaMw1EUaMOc7abUoW3XWeVMeJQla70QziiPxViF5p_P33uggqHOhzegpyN08mCTLcS6RcNw5uuyvLu67O8Sua0OpFZWpNuSt7LumG23xLa6CJ-vDRgXJ0)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6429ac7653cc48cb88923407c5206ec5&_e=LiYy5331wI36qD2ipe-BuGOS1nsm7Ih91-tSdybWLC3yhcYKvXVS_OUwdkTHyxCE_PKZh-7JmmF4uKXzCrqci3t0cR4iOaBqZq-WTLx7A0xUZxctEBek_P2QzUh8ANGl5KWOaOkDytANVhZdArn0TwFnk_A1iaetYpcMMjIiaoaLTMACZH58gSmKX0akvMitXEq50xCUZ5Jda5MWsrPhE8-c1AteWTWNdL1a2RhwwXOuzHVugBHhBLOCr40Epgvg6OA_4Bhsx6eEknIxS3vcFJJfyUHlE68CEddxfIrzdIjqGmMyVvTj99jLbp_mtoALscyHvc9VesemJGVPMdQLSZkoKSfTMux8pDrAtTzCLuP7SZrNgeeOTOFhwKAL-QeY)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6429ac7653cc48cb88923407c5206ec5&_e=LiYy5331wI36qD2ipe-BuGOS1nsm7Ih91-tSdybWLC3yhcYKvXVS_OUwdkTHyxCE_PKZh-7JmmF4uKXzCrqci3t0cR4iOaBqZq-WTLx7A0xUZxctEBek_P2QzUh8ANGl5KWOaOkDytANVhZdArn0TwFnk_A1iaetYpcMMjIiaoaLTMACZH58gSmKX0akvMitXEq50xCUZ5Jda5MWsrPhE8-c1AteWTWNdL1a2RhwwXOi8qkzkOuf6MjCdEh7ImKg1BR2aADYOlPXa-g-Suhvs-S3iuedE8Knj1hxPa8HFGEt6TVy1oOupzigv-nzKVU3jpXO022C4_8Pqv1yy35WZ_TPpXzJAYpvgD5z28_RZdV6SHhwJpwPIkjpCEyQIJNK)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6429ac7653cc48cb88923407c5206ec5&_e=LiYy5331wI36qD2ipe-BuGOS1nsm7Ih91-tSdybWLC3yhcYKvXVS_OUwdkTHyxCE_PKZh-7JmmF4uKXzCrqci3t0cR4iOaBqZq-WTLx7A0xUZxctEBek_P2QzUh8ANGl5KWOaOkDytANVhZdArn0TwFnk_A1iaetYpcMMjIiaoaLTMACZH58gSmKX0akvMitXEq50xCUZ5Jda5MWsrPhE8-c1AteWTWNdL1a2RhwwXOVA3IazbosHD16ejI-QD1vFuWjDUZvspniTaQCTp5kVx3SihTi1XOlpClVLQVolgO1KhPK779CxROj9HLPP9uQeqOnjBRZkROAr3aNDzoDixCg_-R8ySDMu2ozA0YlisSKg2KBkkf6bVTnBfMSuMmq)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

clean_body: Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Dear Peter, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! clean_body: | | | The nomination of Tulsi Gabbard as Director of National Intelligence isn’t just a routine appointment; it’s a potential disaster waiting to happen! Gabbard’s alarming ties with America’s enemies raise serious red flags. She has been accused of having “sympathy for dictators,” and a staggering 100 national security officials have expressed “alarm” and signed a letter urging that her nomination be scrutinized behind closed doors. Time is running out! Our national security is at stake, and we must act NOW! A closed door hearing would allow for a FULL review of Tulsi Gabbard’s record. | Gabbard’s former aides say she was a devout consumer of Kremlin propaganda. Imagine a Director of National Intelligence overseeing 18 US intelligence agencies, who may align more with hostile regimes than with American values! Our safety, our democracy, and our future depend on ensuring that individuals in power are fully vetted and held accountable. This is not merely a political maneuver; it is a necessary step to protect our nation from a leader who may endanger our very way of life! ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. Rep. Byron Donalds **[FIRED BACK at CNN's George Stephanopoulos](https://substack.com/redirect/7b646078-30de-4348-928a-b998810ac1ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when mischaracterized Donald Trump's intent to pardon January 6 participants who "assaulted police officers."
"(Trump) said 'if they're innocent I will pardon them,' They've all bee convicted. He said he would pardon those who assaulted police officers," Stephanopoulos claimed.
"George, you just changed the soundbite! That's not what he said," Donalds returned fire.
[Watch What Happens Next](https://substack.com/redirect/7b646078-30de-4348-928a-b998810ac1ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7b646078-30de-4348-928a-b998810ac1ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Donalds continues to explain that if a January 6 participant was "beating up a police officer," of course they would not be pardoned from their violent crime. But many who were convicted related to Jan 6 did NOT partake in any violence.
"But if you have people who were just walking through the capitol, which did occur on Jan 6,... then what he would do is not allow them to be held in jail with these massively increased charges!" Donalds insisted.
Donalds also argues that the same district attorney who was harsh on Jan 6ers just recently decided not to convict left-wing rioters at Union Station in Washington D.C. who clashed with police and set fires in protest of Israeli President Benjamin Netanyahu's visit.
"They were defacing monuments at Union Square! We want to be fair with the justice system, we don't want to be political with the justice system," Donalds added.

Watch Vivek Ramaswamy **[handle a very rude woman](https://substack.com/redirect/52caf1a3-4dee-4d13-b701-2a77b338c247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** confronting him during a Q&A portion of his speech.

subject: North Carolina Republicans gerrymandered our maps and changed the course of our nation’s history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
Cracking and packing congressional districts in order to gerrymander away the competition is legal (according to the MAGA Supreme Court), but it shouldn’t be. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98743569/517668964/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20241215_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTI1ZmExMS0wN2JiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydIfeLuH3tlZMnHo9Q1S9LcWugB1zCscpTG1TTHoLis=)
---
Peter, North Carolina Republicans gerrymandered congressional districts and changed the course of our nation’s history. Wiley recently spoke with Lawrence O'Donnell on MSNBC to explain how this happened: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98743571/517668979/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20241215_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTI1ZmExMS0wN2JiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydIfeLuH3tlZMnHo9Q1S9LcWugB1zCscpTG1TTHoLis=) By gerrymandering 3 more districts in their favor, the North Carolina GOP flipped each of these districts red — including Wiley’s. Those three flipped seats in North Carolina _made_ the difference between having a Speaker Jeffries and two more years of MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson. Now, Republicans have a razor-thin House majority to push Donald Trump’s extreme agenda, and voters are left disenfranchised by an unfair system. **Cracking and packing congressional districts in order to gerrymander away the competition is legal (according to the MAGA Supreme Court), but it shouldn’t be.** This shady tactic gives the party in power an unfair advantage, and it’s time to put an end to partisan gerrymandering. **[Wiley is leading the fight for fair redistricting. Please, pitch in today to help fuel this work:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98743573/517668993/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20241215_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTI1ZmExMS0wN2JiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydIfeLuH3tlZMnHo9Q1S9LcWugB1zCscpTG1TTHoLis=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately:_ **** | | **[DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98743575/517669008/-1960556440?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20241215_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTI1ZmExMS0wN2JiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydIfeLuH3tlZMnHo9Q1S9LcWugB1zCscpTG1TTHoLis=)**

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ea7b83d499b4c5d91285d67df06c06b&_e=_jD5pMqs1Fb3aRW_FZPqFFyljLAk8BLdyj4bwQEo3c1jE-hvBCph1aLEdtQuilyXVG2c4WsQ-Q0TNSO7dKMyw2jTXuA8akt6S40JEVfyIU80Dpb74UZFUnquLeQmu74jlcslEsEgsPatRvtMsbLfyiipAe9zVSsoSsj6SjZ-XAesIUnj_pUYQgp9paHf_hCPzRHc0WYeV9Jf0UogH70HQbBfjvLoyvmoZxilRVUn35FHT532-sBkxgi_cvnGQ8yrgl_yoJZxL9Rf5dRhvR7xIFoAlTVWkkzH1a4fmy1hlQcEEG5QkR5dH3qQRIy6oQDaThSp9xl60bs7WcJA3nsdzaTmESPU9O9DVIxSIMNoyVGhtk8OKAeR_uaWLPfUdU_Y4g6jr_HvdsNXluuvvxftIgZQSn6Zakr3-xCjLp21JI0%3D)
---
| |
Dear Peter,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ea7b83d499b4c5d91285d67df06c06b&_e=_jD5pMqs1Fb3aRW_FZPqFFyljLAk8BLdyj4bwQEo3c1jE-hvBCph1aLEdtQuilyXVG2c4WsQ-Q0TNSO7dKMyw2jTXuA8akt6S40JEVfyIU80Dpb74UZFUnquLeQmu74jlcslEsEgsPatRvtMsbLfyiipAe9zVSsoSsj6SjZ-XAesIUnj_pUYQgp9paHf_hCPzRHc0WYeV9Jf0UogH70HQbBfjvLoyvmoZxilRVUn35FHT532-sBkxgi_cvnGQ8yrdBv9ZTOb5D-fuxNYd-mG92xCeJCuktOy2CO_VEzKep0DBWNe0O0CEIihr7cKJI8vRZQgeh12-Vr5QFUB6hiei4QD2seFVW_K92YjleU7ZswPQwDZ8R3QAKjIXTLuPfdzC2FTFfNzRAnGBniFVnWfPOZ4Y_SMZ7aD-L-6WPVrbDY%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=4ea7b83d499b4c5d91285d67df06c06b&_t=CUYmsr2HtSCPTKW59olfUooxcsA2gwsIvUiN8EHD3AgaI_04BlWlDBK9-9QDJaHoQZ8yqOBrw7CTGTrLUUrO20I4huj-wfKVa6Oqes_mUmirYyZcEPnu8FZa81uYNr30)

---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Enough with their lies
body:
Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth.| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd6ff0c424d04e759ba0f84ad41f9202&_e=W6E_d92edlAQk19gG6BFEt8XlULKQ5vSKLDVSDbFJzTbKO7X1CDtawKRcCjeAPfb56KAcr_szYT4ymbCr69H67cfpehC2tK_vKbLj4kJIr66MoUJfL-kcJv5cctEFBQk0fATnyvW44EUQoFvf1i5RaqSb8H4g-e4pQJa2aCUK66pf3rU89v_nK974kZgRLNMgiYAHFYEpvpIRVXegrM7i5osfT0ylfQWG35FZnRPcVxLbs5beD3_HRw7MwHJ2dXFysymly-r_n5S5RHB0WFC64vtYdrNOqtmF4t125xmEVY6J8QbCxbdsyLkouZUb4_kc_Ko-Y4ACIcf6GhZW3YefdQJan1HGxNJex4E_yWw1ONzQi6Fsfd91-W_GKVoqZC3AftF6CiTpHt6ICUiKwZtmQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd6ff0c424d04e759ba0f84ad41f9202&_e=W6E_d92edlAQk19gG6BFEt8XlULKQ5vSKLDVSDbFJzTbKO7X1CDtawKRcCjeAPfb56KAcr_szYT4ymbCr69H67cfpehC2tK_vKbLj4kJIr66MoUJfL-kcJv5cctEFBQk0fATnyvW44EUQoFvf1i5RaqSb8H4g-e4pQJa2aCUK66pf3rU89v_nK974kZgRLNMgiYAHFYEpvpIRVXegrM7i5osfT0ylfQWG35FZnRPcVxLbs5beD3_HRw7MwHJ2dXFRV4BFSnKasfj1cUsMA3DikXDqXWaQ7Z8Uebi4U5sDpytd_dJweMwplXsm-mKI0MEpxnjEzhNgya2MVY-U9LBPabwNNcynejDwllQviCHU42DWCOHgBuCcMF6iaxl2lLOSyrq3Dxb4eLG58XmRmTG4w%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd6ff0c424d04e759ba0f84ad41f9202&_e=W6E_d92edlAQk19gG6BFEt8XlULKQ5vSKLDVSDbFJzTbKO7X1CDtawKRcCjeAPfb56KAcr_szYT4ymbCr69H67cfpehC2tK_vKbLj4kJIr66MoUJfL-kcJv5cctEFBQk0fATnyvW44EUQoFvf1i5RaqSb8H4g-e4pQJa2aCUK66pf3rU89v_nK974kZgRLNMgiYAHFYEpvpIRVXegrM7i5osfT0ylfQWG35FZnRPcVxLbs5beD3_HRw7MwHJ2dXFClYeZVon6aiOtXp3H_t7eDm4wa9A4vuwu_QX6g39aACX7fayqwk_wP7idvqlr4wc7vNWaWV2A3Ek7FTKSGUsU8fj7mw_AoqMdkpZlfzbCaR7zdOI6r4nT-shgzJj8NYtBhOAOoEwUYYHyvLHTkrrJQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd6ff0c424d04e759ba0f84ad41f9202&_e=W6E_d92edlAQk19gG6BFEt8XlULKQ5vSKLDVSDbFJzTbKO7X1CDtawKRcCjeAPfb56KAcr_szYT4ymbCr69H67cfpehC2tK_vKbLj4kJIr66MoUJfL-kcJv5cctEFBQk0fATnyvW44EUQoFvf1i5RaqSb8H4g-e4pQJa2aCUK66pf3rU89v_nK974kZgRLNMgiYAHFYEpvpIRVXegrM7i5osfT0ylfQWG35FZnRPcVxLbs5beD3_HRw7MwHJ2dXFcNvMxvUl2BFwvP2AODZx77c8bmxZH0Ji2LmBD00Rcw2weMN1lz0HqEozf0a5wHv-ZDhu99WRplEzC1AzLht_TADTf3wuqool4QRB-d88zqGgGg2BtE6WuQbN7RvgqNmvFcQxk4Whv3Nn9bxayEYi5g%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd6ff0c424d04e759ba0f84ad41f9202&_e=W6E_d92edlAQk19gG6BFEt8XlULKQ5vSKLDVSDbFJzTbKO7X1CDtawKRcCjeAPfb56KAcr_szYT4ymbCr69H67cfpehC2tK_vKbLj4kJIr66MoUJfL-kcJv5cctEFBQk0fATnyvW44EUQoFvf1i5RaqSb8H4g-e4pQJa2aCUK66pf3rU89v_nK974kZgRLNMgiYAHFYEpvpIRVXegrM7i5osfT0ylfQWG35FZnRPcVxLbs5beD3_HRw7MwHJ2dXFWt5HXkZXrxPHEIYA8KPbdXoLoexxGEgN_5TJ0Egl6VSmjTpLHC-CPS1AHnP8ukDU27XZXKL2OMcrHAG2Z3EZrKWuCydlNrvrwd8EVDVsKEU-nr4W6jddDZq8G45ZytLWLleA3hqymdyYQR4y35Nu6Q%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd6ff0c424d04e759ba0f84ad41f9202&_e=W6E_d92edlAQk19gG6BFEt8XlULKQ5vSKLDVSDbFJzTbKO7X1CDtawKRcCjeAPfb56KAcr_szYT4ymbCr69H67cfpehC2tK_vKbLj4kJIr66MoUJfL-kcJv5cctEFBQk0fATnyvW44EUQoFvf1i5RaqSb8H4g-e4pQJa2aCUK66pf3rU89v_nK974kZgRLNMgiYAHFYEpvpIRVXegrM7i5osfT0ylfQWG35FZnRPcVxLbs5beD3_HRw7MwHJ2dXF4ZE6ThNKP3zSzzpGwdbzio1pvLboXTJdj9FTER17b32z4QuZY2yWmedDlixqybPOLwLyTLVEO7qpLQM5bvn6KvXAmuI449-0xaJ6m6O6xqSA99PfawO4Hy5poGcu3os-WlYakooQ7mDmx78mFnUnJg%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd6ff0c424d04e759ba0f84ad41f9202&_e=W6E_d92edlAQk19gG6BFEt8XlULKQ5vSKLDVSDbFJzTbKO7X1CDtawKRcCjeAPfb56KAcr_szYT4ymbCr69H67cfpehC2tK_vKbLj4kJIr66MoUJfL-kcJv5cctEFBQk0fATnyvW44EUQoFvf1i5RaqSb8H4g-e4pQJa2aCUK66pf3rU89v_nK974kZgRLNMgiYAHFYEpvpIRVXegrM7i5osfT0ylfQWG35FZnRPcVxLbs5beD3_HRw7MwHJ2dXFdYnmtyY230zSiB5XkpeOcXXdyBan9hdV3ZGm0fjzi9uJ16pKd3e78_61_C8UdiRBUXwn9DSHtuLhL-ScrVrVlDnpP4VoCfCZxZsqKTSAH7SenyLFeUJkKIN8-XXG5Krd1WcUIQCN_YL5Ftp2CUYD5w%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!

I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd6ff0c424d04e759ba0f84ad41f9202&_e=W6E_d92edlAQk19gG6BFEt8XlULKQ5vSKLDVSDbFJzTbKO7X1CDtawKRcCjeAPfb56KAcr_szYT4ymbCr69H67cfpehC2tK_vKbLj4kJIr66MoUJfL-kcJv5cctEFBQk0fATnyvW44EUQoFvf1i5RaqSb8H4g-e4pQJa2aCUK66pf3rU89v_nK974kZgRLNMgiYAHFYEpvpIRVXegrM7i5osfT0ylfQWG35FZnRPcVxLbs5beD3_HRw7MwHJ2dXF9j-FexilDO9OHuWANtp38VePHzw98iydTQDgY6ehg7XGedCLXRlM5Q-Cw4H3XN0WiAZuHbpeaYpZ9bsVt_pyPLJ9u9Y8RI6OYvkvD7-FY6Sl7q7IX9fz3uLMzcHwqQ7bQGCjqUis1x_hoTYXjh_pvw%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd6ff0c424d04e759ba0f84ad41f9202&_e=W6E_d92edlAQk19gG6BFEt8XlULKQ5vSKLDVSDbFJzTbKO7X1CDtawKRcCjeAPfb56KAcr_szYT4ymbCr69H67cfpehC2tK_vKbLj4kJIr66MoUJfL-kcJv5cctEFBQk0fATnyvW44EUQoFvf1i5RaqSb8H4g-e4pQJa2aCUK66pf3rU89v_nK974kZgRLNMgiYAHFYEpvpIRVXegrM7i5osfT0ylfQWG35FZnRPcVxLbs5beD3_HRw7MwHJ2dXFfA6YHmFQEOfbD2LjGkNrU9yDVFvuQoDuwaOzsdc8aVn5-sKpO_rzGeoSmhjkCEZMn_J9-EPTIcmUmFzNthk0B1a5tEMKxkSeBxVVft5XtLrX6y8wCUD4x1BwyZXcwoJg3P4_gCZTU8q2VR1CpCMhlg%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

Sincerely,

My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. body:
It’s critical that this team does not become demoralized

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98744451/517672656/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmNiNTgyYS0wOWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRAPQmL03rH0mf94SU-wPKIZ7NBr8N5kdsPxN6FQR2M=) Hi, it’s Mohona, Sharice’s campaign manager. name: VoteVets
subject: Dangerous, Unfit, Compromised....
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
From Kennedy to Hegseth to Gabbard to Kash Patel — none of these people should be serving in positions of public trust and massive importance.
#
Peter —
Most people are taking some down time now. But at VoteVets, we’re gearing up. There’s too much coming for us to take time off. Think about it:
Trump’s working to purge the Military and fill it with loyalists.
His administration is laying the groundwork to gut the VA, sell it off to the lowest bidder, and slash care and benefits for the men and women who wore the uniform.
And his appointees are some of the most dangerous, unfit, and compromised individuals we’ve ever seen. From Kennedy to Hegseth to Gabbard to Kash Patel — none of these people should be serving in positions of public trust and massive importance.
**So, we’re asking you to chip in $5.**
Yes, just $5.
$5 might not seem like the kind of money that can stop Trump — and we’ll be completely honest with you, we’re not going to win every fight we pick.
But by chipping in $5 to VoteVets, you’re donating to an organization that will be at the forefront of the fight every day for the next four years. We’ll be working to defend the VA, to stop Trump from destroying the Military, and to block the worst of his appointees.
We get results when we drill down and find the places we can have the biggest impact. But we can’t do it alone. That’s why your $5 (or more, if you can afford it) makes such a big difference here.
How about it...
[**Can we count on you to chip in that $5 or whatever you can today as we prepare to take the fight to Trump and his administration?](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241215-1-30&t=1&akid=34030%2E3013755%2EYWQKyP)**

| Dec 15

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/year-in-review-2024-pubic-health?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

## Vaccinations
CDC expects the fall and winter virus season will likely have a similar or lower peak number of combined hospitalizations from COVID-19, influenza, and RSV compared to last year. However, peak hospitalizations from all respiratory viruses remain likely to be much higher than they were before the emergence of COVID-19.'
Influenza and COVID-19 vaccination rates continue to decline, marking a four-year trend reversal from the pre-pandemic era.
_**Need to get vaccinated? Click on the blue button below to find vaccines near you:**_
[ Click here for vaccination info](https://substack.com/redirect/7e05a55a-4e49-4ae1-a509-6dbdfe999a78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Childhood vaccinations (overview)
A March 2020 report on childhood vaccine compliance by the American Academy of Pediatrics showed compliance rates of about 95% over the previous five years, though [they noted](https://substack.com/redirect/b8d89558-c956-4db7-a294-358149b34462?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about a third of children were not vaccinated on schedule (not receiving all vaccines by the age recommended).
From 2010-2019, childhood immunizations rate [steadily increased](https://substack.com/redirect/8edfdb00-2895-4c75-8190-194698d0d90b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Since the pandemic and the mainstreaming of vaccine repudiation, however, vaccine rates have continued to drop.
For the 2023-2024 school year, [only 11 states](https://substack.com/redirect/867353bb-924f-4df0-9761-f7ae330b0548?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) met the recommended vaccination percentages for the MMR vaccine in kindergarten students. Those states were: California, Connecticut, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Mississippi, New Mexico, New York, Rhode Island, Tennessee, and West Virginia.
If you're wondering how the two poorest states (Mississippi, West Virginia) ended up in the cohort of most vaccine-compliant states in the country, the answer is simple: no exemptions.
Mississippi and West Virginia both have less than 1% exemption rates because the only type of exemption they allow is medical. Idaho, the state with the highest rate of exemptions (14.3%) allows for any parents to request a waiver without reason.
Florida saw the sharpest drop in MMR and DTaP vaccine compliance in the United States, and also was among the worst three states for Polio and Varicella...

Today marks the mid-point of December, meaning we have just a few weeks left to reach our fundraising goals and show the far-right that our movement maintains momentum.

name: The LaRouche Organization
subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
A Götterdämmerung or Götterfunken?

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=1)
---
| Friend — Will you help stop the unleashing of a thermonuclear Götterdämmerung—a "twilight of the gods" where oligarchical puppet-masters drive their unwitting tools insane before orchestrating their demise? Will you assist The LaRouche Organization in derailing the scheme that deranged STRATCOM's Adm. Thomas Buchanan [spilled the beans on](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMOrPpzeyQjQPcHxfKIzyuoxqIhY9FJ80M3UvyetVm2LVnUMvTaBKlBDXc0ufaoSZ-s-w1oL3dCdBzg-jj0sPaSytAjv-e7StQ22VM9q-LHqc0nLTABQVUjJUJ6H2yOFo0&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=2), and which argues publicly for the use of nuclear weapons against an "adversary" like Russia? Now, a life or death outcome rides on each of us comprehending why it is that a customary subject for renaissance artists was to depict the experience of "illumination," or humankind’s “divine spark’ of reason. This concept was associated with the excitement of contributing to society's development through successive mental breakthroughs. The "Divine Comedy," an intricately composed poem by renaissance poet Dante Alighieri, graphically illustrates the pilgrimage undertaken by the human individual to overcome his own and society’s shortcomings in attaining "divine reason." American physical scientist and statesman Lyndon LaRouche, for whom the LaRouche Organization (TLO) is named, defined this idea as being a unique quality of the human mind. LaRouche demonstrated that the substance of economic science is man’s unique power to generate, transmit, and assimilate ideas—and through this process, such ideas cause revolutionary breakthroughs, catapulting societies above their seemingly insurmountable obstacles of poverty and immiseration. In this direction, you are urgently encouraged to study and share the proceedings of the Schiller Institute Conference [“In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-27vZ7bAAmP821BtXamCEW--z7ggy0yfRKMJrhTzytjG1lbYDk-MHtFaWciOPTgsOnlqzBjgHcvf6q3mAI8I44R2UndThG1ZwJx-b3lThVnThXtsFXLN9EwrPQ5Np9bu7Y1DbLPSdKgfvU184XNK_6Y&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=3)” The series of four panels displayed an intense international dialogue of political-scientific-cultural assessments, propositions and hypotheses. Assembled over five continents, the participants consciously endeavored to examine, address and offer solutions to alter the world’s tumultuous course in human history. [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmM7No5esi34zRLQjvsKwUGWPBexUcqDiSrdOBbPL4RrlQ&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=4) Giving voice to the emerging role of Global South nations as policymakers (rather than pawns of the world’s colonial powers), diplomat Naledi Pandor of South Africa highlighted the African-inspired proposition of Ubuntu, meaning “I am human because you recognize in action my humanity.” She cited its coherence with the need “to adopt the ideas set out in the Schiller Institute development framework to really ensure that all the aspects of human endeavor which advance human progress are embraced by governments in the South as well as...in the North.” The noble intention to redirect the course of our calamitous world was the focus of Schiller Institute founder Helga Zepp-LaRouche’s keynote "One Humanity First, So All Nations Survive." She acquainted the participants with the historical intervention and shift in world affairs made by Lyndon LaRouche's concept of Strategic Defense Initiative (SDI) to end the Kissingerian era of Mutually Assured Destruction (MAD) during the Reagan Administration negotiations with the Soviet Union. As conceived and proposed by LaRouche, the concept of SDI proffered "Mutually Assured Survival" equally to all parties. If the two nations were to adopt a shared mission to develop laser technologies, which utilize new physical principles of science, the civilian economies of both nations would experience a revolutionary upshift. Such a strategic doctrine exemplifies the quality of decisive strategic-scientific thinking and moral leadership required today. **Poised on the precipice of nuclear extinction, our world will only survive if a correspondingly crucial intervention occurs!** Mrs.LaRouche noted that, by deploying the hypersonic Oreshnik missile in response to the launch of U.S. ATACMS inside Russian territory, Russia puts all known Western military armaments in check. The hypersonic technology demonstrates the need for the LaRouchean SDI concept of making nuclear weapons technologically "obsolete." Great emphasis was placed upon the harmony of method shared by Xi Jinping's notion of "disruptive technologies" and the concept of the "increase of relative potential population density" conceived by her late husband Lyndon. Both notions define exponential increases of man's power over nature as the necessary gauge as to whether a given society is achieving durable survival. Consider the following singular quote from “[What Is an Economic Shock Wave?](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygSthf7GiDlVHSXnn2qjjtMF5gwFRdFnLon-EWiTBvZF-sVyggA3zygYej8QxUHhT-v8b_jqCfzJXyJC4zoO3GDcvbAl4eBSkFwYc1hXJnhHoMuCuWsgoz8P5iTXbg7SgRA8qUlDMlrk7UO01zz4rwh0&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=5)” a paper published in 1982 which summarizes the scientific method characteristic of the fundamental principle which governs the ideas of Xi and LaRouche. Lyndon wrote:
> From this point of reference, we despise the assertion that human knowledge is typified by perfecting an existing technological mode of repeated, unchanging practice. To the extent that we merely repeat, more rigorously, the same technology, mankind dies. A zero-technological growth policy of guild-like practice, is the practice of a society which lacks the moral fitness to survive. We must despise notions respecting knowledge which bear upon measurement of repeatable actions.
Join TLO’s worldwide Christmas and New Year's mobilization to crack the silence of indifference and lead the world out of the fog of war. **Circulate the new leaflet: “[Stratcom’s Adm. Buchanan Spill’s the Beans!](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMOrPpzeyQjQPcHxfKIzyuoxqIhY9FJ80M3UvyetVm2LVnUMvTaBKlBDXc0ufaoSZ-s-w1oL3dCdBzg-jj0sPaSytAjv-e7StQ22VM9q-LHqc0nLTABQVUjJUJ6H2yOFo0&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=6)”** Visit your representatives and demand they build legislative support for ending all funding for wars, HR. 10218. Let us snatch the nations of Ukraine, Southwest Asia and Eastern Europe back from the precarious brink of a thermonuclear twilight of oligarchical gods now promulgated and entertained by the likes of lunatic Stratcom Rear Admiral Thomas Buchanan. Nuclear war is not an option, not a solution!
* * *
## Use H.R. 10218 To Pull U.S. ATACMS Back from Ukraine Now!
[**Mobilize With This Leaflet!**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMOrPpzeyQjQPcHxfKIzyuoxqIhY9FJ80M3UvyetVm2LVnUMvTaBKlBDXc0ufaoSZ-s-w1oL3dCdBzg-jj0sPaSytAjv-e7StQ22VM9q-LHqc0nLTABQVUjJUJ6H2yOFo0&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=7) It is urgent that the American people mobilize to urge Congress to immediately enact H.R. 10218, "To Prohibit the Transfer of Army Tactical Missile Systems to Ukraine (ATACMS) and for other Purposes", introduced by Rep. Clay Higgins (R-LA), and now before the House Committee on Foreign Affairs. This is a matter of the utmost urgency, to turn the country from its current course of baiting Russia into nuclear brinkmanship and possible U.S. pre-emptive nuclear strike. [**Read and download here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMOrPpzeyQjQPcHxfKIzyuoxqIhY9FJ80M3UvyetVm2LVnUMvTaBKlBDXc0ufaoSZ-s-w1oL3dCdBzg-jj0sPaSytAjv-e7StQ22VM9q-LHqc0nLTABQVUjJUJ6H2yOFo0&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=8)
* * *
## **Weekly****Dialogue With Helga Zepp-LaRouche**
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMOrPpzeyQjQPcHxfKIzyuo4ADW7dOjASHWnoszQymjMe6l6sn4CEGFytjPmjcWqOwZImVpWij3cwr1mqU40-H3Qw6DkuNTUb8Fj75IduNVsZ5ZzqRm_Ovq_tnSxJdURGg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=9) In her weekly dialogue with viewers, Mrs. LaRouche outlined the effects still being registered by the message from the historic weekend Schiller Institute conference, “[In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-27vZ7bAAmP821BtXamCEW--z7ggy0yfRKMJrhTzytjG1lbYDk-MHtFaWciOPTgsOnlqzBjgHcvf6q3mAI8I44R2UndThG1ZwJx-b3lThVnThXtsFXLN9EwrPQ5Np9bu7Y1DbLPSdKgfvU184XNK_6Y&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241215_newsletter&n=10)” was loud and clear. The world is at a “punctum saliens”’ where hard work over the Institute’s forty years has created a real breakout possibility for the world to break the cycle of underdevelopment, poverty and constant warfare. clean_body: A Götterdämmerung or Götterfunken? | | | Friend — Will you help stop the unleashing of a thermonuclear Götterdämmerung—a "twilight of the gods" where oligarchical puppet-masters drive their unwitting tools insane before orchestrating their demise? Will you assist The LaRouche Organization in derailing the scheme that deranged STRATCOM's Adm. Thomas Buchanan , and which argues publicly for the use of nuclear weapons against an "adversary" like Russia? Now, a life or death outcome rides on each of us comprehending why it is that a customary subject for renaissance artists was to depict the experience of "illumination," or humankind’s “divine spark’ of reason. This concept was associated with the excitement of contributing to society's development through successive mental breakthroughs. The "Divine Comedy," an intricately composed poem by renaissance poet Dante Alighieri, graphically illustrates the pilgrimage undertaken by the human individual to overcome his own and society’s shortcomings in attaining "divine reason." American physical scientist and statesman Lyndon LaRouche, for whom the LaRouche Organization (TLO) is named, defined this idea as being a unique quality of the human mind. LaRouche demonstrated that the substance of economic science is man’s unique power to generate, transmit, and assimilate ideas—and through this process, such ideas cause revolutionary breakthroughs, catapulting societies above their seemingly insurmountable obstacles of poverty and immiseration. In this direction, you are urgently encouraged to study and share the proceedings of the Schiller Institute Conference ” The series of four panels displayed an intense international dialogue of political-scientific-cultural assessments, propositions and hypotheses. Assembled over five continents, the participants consciously endeavored to examine, address and offer solutions to alter the world’s tumultuous course in human history. Giving voice to the emerging role of Global South nations as policymakers (rather than pawns of the world’s colonial powers), diplomat Naledi Pandor of South Africa highlighted the African-inspired proposition of Ubuntu, meaning “I am human because you recognize in action my humanity.” She cited its coherence with the need “to adopt the ideas set out in the Schiller Institute development framework to really ensure that all the aspects of human endeavor which advance human progress are embraced by governments in the South as well as...in the North.” The noble intention to redirect the course of our calamitous world was the focus of Schiller Institute founder Helga Zepp-LaRouche’s keynote "One Humanity First, So All Nations Survive." She acquainted the participants with the historical intervention and shift in world affairs made by Lyndon LaRouche's concept of Strategic Defense Initiative (SDI) to end the Kissingerian era of Mutually Assured Destruction (MAD) during the Reagan Administration negotiations with the Soviet Union. As conceived and proposed by LaRouche, the concept of SDI proffered "Mutually Assured Survival" equally to all parties. If the two nations were to adopt a shared mission to develop laser technologies, which utilize new physical principles of science, the civilian economies of both nations would experience a revolutionary upshift. Such a strategic doctrine exemplifies the quality of decisive strategic-scientific thinking and moral leadership required today. Poised on the precipice of nuclear extinction, our world will only survive if a correspondingly crucial intervention occurs! Mrs.LaRouche noted that, by deploying the hypersonic Oreshnik missile in response to the launch of U.S. ATACMS inside Russian territory, Russia puts all known Western military armaments in check. The hypersonic technology demonstrates the need for the LaRouchean SDI concept of making nuclear weapons technologically "obsolete." Great emphasis was placed upon the harmony of method shared by Xi Jinping's notion of "disruptive technologies" and the concept of the "increase of relative potential population density" conceived by her late husband Lyndon. Both notions define exponential increases of man's power over nature as the necessary gauge as to whether a given society is achieving durable survival. Consider the following singular quote from “” a paper published in 1982 which summarizes the scientific method characteristic of the fundamental principle which governs the ideas of Xi and LaRouche. Lyndon wrote: From this point of reference, we despise the assertion that human knowledge is typified by perfecting an existing technological mode of repeated, unchanging practice. To the extent that we merely repeat, more rigorously, the same technology, mankind dies. A zero-technological growth policy of guild-like practice, is the practice of a society which lacks the moral fitness to survive. We must despise notions respecting knowledge which bear upon measurement of repeatable actions. Join TLO’s worldwide Christmas and New Year's mobilization to crack the silence of indifference and lead the world out of the fog of war. Circulate the new leaflet: “” Visit your representatives and demand they build legislative support for ending all funding for wars, HR. 10218. Let us snatch the nations of Ukraine, Southwest Asia and Eastern Europe back from the precarious brink of a thermonuclear twilight of oligarchical gods now promulgated and entertained by the likes of lunatic Stratcom Rear Admiral Thomas Buchanan. Nuclear war is not an option, not a solution! Use H.R. 10218 To Pull U.S. ATACMS Back from Ukraine Now! It is urgent that the American people mobilize to urge Congress to immediately enact H.R. 10218, "To Prohibit the Transfer of Army Tactical Missile Systems to Ukraine (ATACMS) and for other Purposes", introduced by Rep. Clay Higgins (R-LA), and now before the House Committee on Foreign Affairs. This is a matter of the utmost urgency, to turn the country from its current course of baiting Russia into nuclear brinkmanship and possible U.S. pre-emptive nuclear strike. WeeklyDialogue With Helga Zepp-LaRouche In her weekly dialogue with viewers, Mrs. LaRouche outlined the effects still being registered by the message from the historic weekend Schiller Institute conference, “” was loud and clear. The world is at a “punctum saliens”’ where hard work over the Institute’s forty years has created a real breakout possibility for the world to break the cycle of underdevelopment, poverty and constant warfare. body:
One donation may not seem like it could make a difference, but at the state legislative ballot level, where races can come down to just a few dozen votes, donations have an especially powerful impact. | | |

---|---
💭 Can $7 actually make a difference? $7 donations gave our candidates the resources they needed to fend off a Republican takeover in the Pennsylvania House. $7 donations enabled Democrats to gain 10 seats in the Wisconsin Assembly, and four seats in the Senate. $7 donations helped break Republicans’ supermajority in the North Carolina House – protecting Gov.-elect Josh Stein’s veto power. Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [] Thanks for taking action, Team RTP [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9biRkT0ZFLBZo_8f8EnE7Jowo6A0R8oop8Rrw_kitS3sMwrJn2ozruxmkvaG936_l1duoWABImS72zia5WVvFdYZWl1KCBbj9JwhKtMN-w7lZ9W-JNEP2JjLHJeb_uPunCiPFq4gytji2pCsvnc8tzWtxC4qkwZ-5XJeZMuOMgeCjcA0MiaBPNvdd6jWFw1EXvH7SWzzmyUZxPeiZaZdUtfOD5spRAVKwg1j4sRE7m0hb4i4pXXnnFrWLzmpFlCu8giN8fuFWfe2huIUVC6ukcIJ7FVHsLRGZ6lCekfemxUksvCrAIKUNuzOj2GFN_21BoyO04uW2DK3XFKF_f1M-27HI7tL4ZadXrI3nMXjf26cQIPBRw349_FuFeYXKsKNuOkz4oxz_hlU2LcAugT9ASQ/4cb/epkN09nPRnW1yJBMa5WshA/h0/h001.uLKowCfMagzjLgJP1yLuwmKn92hvKEIT8p1FndXk_n4)
| | Peter,

This week, we’ve highlighted some of the incredible strides we’ve made this year in growing Black political power — breaking barriers, celebrating firsts, and making history.

_**But we can’t stop now.**_

Even with our progress, there’s still so much work to do — and now more than ever, we need to keep our momentum going.

**[Will you pitch in $10 today to make sure we have the resources to continue this fight into the new year and defend our communities from the new administration?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt2ejHjEM6OvywkRoROcSHBoxXwTUc4a6cToIo3uA8caCSU_27uTFOsqCPL5mvNawkOedvUQak-y94A2FbqZ9ARD1vG5CA4w1rsVr0X88PfGeLq5qWRD1Is89EmRJ7gvDUL0tr8cxgcjYsP1RaOvlJVaIFfK-w8PiEQ-4HUy61x87McHOy4nMIgQqPc5UWjhl1nZUjg4bjh6QETM9Y7AKrLN8h6PSY75BBoBSI3karM2HUzvJCAxwnw0q6-fm8vcWwIwtj1D2eEGBu5J463Rct1AxNCtumMB1Cux-Oy6pzXkzHJHgNOAcT63rD6s4utpUW7QyNK7yQA-P84QYpqaviDxd6wPbna93l_uJv6re8X0p8JzEs9Tguq94WDIMhXAxpuOLlRxC7Spkn6_g2s9hLI/4cb/epkN09nPRnW1yJBMa5WshA/h1/h001.X2W01V_a7_DI1tQfZHjtpCFfM7h_Hylkm1SvI8iAhMQ)** | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt2ejHjEM6OvywkRoROcSHBoxXwTUc4a6cToIo3uA8caCSU_27uTFOsqCPL5mvNawkOedvUQak-y94A2FbqZ9ARD1vG5CA4w1rsVr0X88PfGeLq5qWRD1Is89EmRJ7gvDUL0tr8cxgcjYsP1RaOvlJV_p8nOvXhIvKF67gXpmQ7NaRoosZCYcvKg7xIJxin9GaX2IQ48w5xBOMA6NAqbnuGQvgqMAsXgzPbYs3gCBXthAZhKhlYfkSmYQ_WfOY-LkZWIYkyeNJJOnARLHLwnX_h6WkbUsHeRf0lLQ-WgH3vnMcqQAVSR8o4-lO4i-0CNbSe2gyuEGvpm8s4yUvzmVSIr3ES-aPNJWjfBUD7AcDzs_aRmpxYyzVRus3Sv215c0VRJChVS5jC9HRA3F9DApbT/4cb/epkN09nPRnW1yJBMa5WshA/h2/h001.bXjjGzR4GiKuqlOcp2hVM82to7fuW_vC10wpc6j0pXA)
