We’re already planning for 2025 and beyond, but our critical work — **_supporting candidates, building Black political power, and making strides_** — doesn’t come cheap.

Let’s finish this year strong. **[Help us keep up the momentum by rushing a donation of $10 or more now.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt2ejHjEM6OvywkRoROcSHBoxXwTUc4a6cToIo3uA8caCSU_27uTFOsqCPL5mvNawkOedvUQak-y94A2FbqZ9ARD1vG5CA4w1rsVr0X88PfGeLq5qWRD1Is89EmRJ7gvDUL0tr8cxgcjYsP1RaOvlJV4fVpdv7s_4xYc5xLk5wyoZMTljrOu5pYgpa6zP3smMxem4XTPdgzG3xUHusax5HUNU_wdJ8V5EciHB6Jt5lTaE6QuqWgNO6XQ0NimGZ4xaEitHb-mzdrJvSmLXGLmrSnTu4hp6sS4TbO6i1VmyPQT0ORdPInrHyZx1IO7p6QCzEhEqDML6bBpl-Ywffn5afa_rTYfkixAWLBvhM3hh06BhG_jcIVYw311cPxTzs_yYMMKQPYi_RC9Bj6NAQWiP4h/4cb/epkN09nPRnW1yJBMa5WshA/h3/h001.pKwgZRDJ2yAvjlD3md9Pi3w9eP0r79FialfHaT8v4vA)**

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9PnuvrCzoBy5DfIGWsplANbnjpBAv4hJoqiZg5D3GXPoqt7P4D8fqTJ7_6UK_oYCV1M8gYCY-whv91rNEAimEWJBIpDNDY6axJ2l2CQNTw20C9YQ1t-FB4HP5QWt7iAxdBkjAlCoLHYRDIiqVrQBVeDa2Cc60SkqSBaCEkK1Yb-miMlpX77iEY6Dm0_7U4ezh893cKHLiotDfYixwk5o6gTOlzMcnNLFc1Qn2qNhn8dRq55sazeiNJYpnVj9try2_RdJNnB_cF1Fp9LHeNGVyBq7cRjJWEm92LV9wgd7SRjzX0g8A31ummVURTNa-acsW5gEgdQnJBHxvuo2YV5bWencXD0_yzydT1LP4_A6EufQ/4cb/epkN09nPRnW1yJBMa5WshA/h10/h001.1STR8ZS0aw8rVOeDUqSj5CfdNoQa7ts79kEr-L9BJuU) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

Folks, I’ll keep this brief: Our mid-month fundraising deadline is coming up in a few hours, and **I’m humbly asking for you to chip in $5 or more today. ** Look, while the presidential election results didn’t go the way we wanted, that doesn’t mean all of our work stops now. We have the power to choose freedom, to choose hope, and to choose progress. And that’s what I plan to do every day. **I have fought for New Mexicans every day that I’ve been in office, and I’m not about to stop now.** We have the opportunity to make real progress for New Mexicans — expanding childcare access, protecting our public lands, bringing down the costs of prescription drugs, and so much more. Our work to stand up to MAGA extremism and take back control of Congress for Democrats begins now. The earlier we reach voters and talk to them about what’s at stake, the better our chances of winning. body:
This year, we were able to double down our efforts to recruit strong Latino candidates across the country, thanks to your support.

| Peter,

In a challenging year for Democrats, I’m proud of the work we did through BOLD PAC to elect **_7 _** n**_ew Latino Democratic candidates._**

This year, we were able to double down our efforts to recruit strong Latino candidates across the country, thanks to your support.
**✅ Ruben Gallego** will be the first Latino Senator to Represent Arizona in the U.S. Senate.
**✅ ****Sam Liccardo (CA-16)** will be the first Latino to represent this district in over 100 years.
**✅ ****Luz Rivas (CA-29)** will be the first Latina to represent CA-29.
**✅ ****Gil Cisneros (CA-31)** won his election in California’s 31st district.
**✅ ****Nellie Pou (NJ-09)** will be the first Latina to represent New Jersey nationally.
**✅ ****Emily Randall (WA-06)** will be the first Queer Latina elected to Congress.
**✅ ****Pablo José Hernández Rivera** won his election as Puerto Rico’s next Resident Commissioner. When it comes to tackling the most pressing issues of our time, we are stronger in numbers. Electing a new coalition of progressives to Congress has put us in a stronger position against Republican majorities.

As I set my sights on the next legislative session, I’m not taking my focus away from electing progressives up and down the ballot. We’re already working to set a strong foundation for the next cycle, and I could use your help. So we launched our end-of-year fundraising goal: **Raise $50,000 before the ball drops on New Year’s Eve so that we can take full advantage of the match.**

From: Vic Barreras Torres (All On The Line) <allontheline@redistrictingaction.org>

Subject: A commitment to match dollar for dollar
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

> Hi Peter!
> In my role as All On The Line’s senior mobilization strategist, I get to focus on our grassroots supporters. I spend my time thinking about how to bring new folks into our community, how to mobilize our network in key moments, and yes, how to increase the number of grassroots donations to the All On The Line campaign.
> **I wanted to give you a peek behind the curtain into how we’re building our End-Of-Year fundraising campaign (and spoiler: then I’m going to ask you to contribute to it).**
> [**First the big news: We have a “match” opportunity — up to $50,000 in total donations — and we need supporters like you to come through.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98749099/517686320/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_MatchLift_email_20241215-AOTL-RedLite-MatchLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241215-AOTL-RedLite-MatchLift_&utm_campaign=MatchLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0ZDQxNWQ5LTE2YmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zV5A5StNoCS5pBPwpEB4kOiqxzGAinfM8NDsD2e9qUg=)
> This happens when a generous supporter of the fair maps movement steps forward with a commitment to donate a dollar for every dollar we raise in a specific time period. They “match” what we raise from the grassroots donations, making each donation twice as impactful.
> So if you make a $10 donation, the donor will match it with $10. If you make a $75 donation, the donor will match it with $75. If you make a $500 donation, the donor will match it with $500.
> [**Will you please help the All On The Line campaign take full advantage of our $50,000 end-of-year match opportunity by making a gift of any size right now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98749101/517686322/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_MatchLift_email_20241215-AOTL-RedLite-MatchLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241215-AOTL-RedLite-MatchLift_&utm_campaign=MatchLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0ZDQxNWQ5LTE2YmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zV5A5StNoCS5pBPwpEB4kOiqxzGAinfM8NDsD2e9qUg=)

> The positive impact y’all will have on our democracy gives me hope for the future. It’s been a tough year — especially this last month or so — but playing even a small role in this growing movement is what motivates me to keep going. Fair maps impact our daily lives today — and will have massive impacts on our future.
> **Next year alone, there are off-year and special elections across the country that will decide the control of multiple state legislatures, a governorship, and at least four state supreme court seats — one of which could determine control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court. **That means there's critical organizing to do to counter threats to fair elections and help ensure a more representative democracy.
> We also need to be ready for concrete threats ahead like Donald Trump and his allies undermining the census, more attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and ongoing attempts to gerrymander at the state level.
> We can do this. We can make our maps more fair and protect our democracy. And now, with this match opportunity, we have a chance to come together and make sure we have the resources we need to do so. [**If you want to make a lasting impact, please consider chipping into our end-of-year match fund.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98749115/517686336/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_MatchLift_email_20241215-AOTL-RedLite-MatchLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241215-AOTL-RedLite-MatchLift_&utm_campaign=MatchLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0ZDQxNWQ5LTE2YmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zV5A5StNoCS5pBPwpEB4kOiqxzGAinfM8NDsD2e9qUg=)
> Appreciate you,
> Vic

clean_body: We launched our end-of-year fundraising campaign. | Peter, Yesterday, we learned that a generous donor has committed to matching every dollar we raise between now and the end of the year — up to $50,000 in total donations. So we launched our end-of-year fundraising goal: Raise $50,000 before the ball drops on New Year’s Eve so that we can take full advantage of the match. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Our work is far from done and we need every ounce of support heading into 2025. = Thanks so much, Team AOTL \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Vic Barreras Torres (All On The Line) <allontheline@redistrictingaction.org> Date: Sat, Dec 14, 2024 Subject: A commitment to match dollar for dollar To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hi Peter! In my role as All On The Line’s senior mobilization strategist, I get to focus on our grassroots supporters. I spend my time thinking about how to bring new folks into our community, how to mobilize our network in key moments, and yes, how to increase the number of grassroots donations to the All On The Line campaign. I wanted to give you a peek behind the curtain into how we’re building our End-Of-Year fundraising campaign (and spoiler: then I’m going to ask you to contribute to it). = This happens when a generous supporter of the fair maps movement steps forward with a commitment to donate a dollar for every dollar we raise in a specific time period. They “match” what we raise from the grassroots donations, making each donation twice as impactful. So if you make a $10 donation, the donor will match it with $10. If you make a $75 donation, the donor will match it with $75. If you make a $500 donation, the donor will match it with $500. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: --- = | = = | = = | = The positive impact y’all will have on our democracy gives me hope for the future. It’s been a tough year — especially this last month or so — but playing even a small role in this growing movement is what motivates me to keep going. Fair maps impact our daily lives today — and will have massive impacts on our future. Next year alone, there are off-year and special elections across the country that will decide the control of multiple state legislatures, a governorship, and at least four state supreme court seats — one of which could determine control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court. That means there's critical organizing to do to counter threats to fair elections and help ensure a more representative democracy. We also need to be ready for concrete threats ahead like Donald Trump and his allies undermining the census, more attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and ongoing attempts to gerrymander at the state level. We can do this. We can make our maps more fair and protect our democracy. And now, with this match opportunity, we have a chance to come together and make sure we have the resources we need to do so. = Appreciate you, Vic Vic Barreras Torres Senior Mobilization Strategist, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121524_1&amount=25]
Fox News: NC Supreme Court rejects voter ID law, state electoral map, claiming 'racially motivated purpose' [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Fox_NC_VoterID.png]
We want to hear from likely voters in your area about the Voter ID laws under consideration in several states. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you agree that Voter ID laws are a voter suppression tactic?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121524_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121524_1&amount=15]

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121524_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121524_1&amount=25]

name: Mark Kelly
subject: To be honest with you, I had no idea what to expect
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
But here we are, nearly six years later, and more than a million people have donated to my campaigns. We’ve won two now, back-to-back, and we played a key role in winning Arizona’s Senate seat again this November.
#

Team -
Back when I was deciding if I was going to run for Senate in 2019, I had no idea what to expect. I knew that Gabby and I had some friends we could count on, but it was never guaranteed that we’d be able to put together the massive amount of resources you need to win a campaign.
And I knew that by refusing to take a dime of corporate money, raising those resources was going to be a whole lot more difficult.
But here we are, nearly six years later, and more than a million people have donated to my campaigns. We’ve won two now, back-to-back, and we played a key role in winning Arizona’s Senate seat again this November.
At every step of the way, the foundation of our success is supporters like you.
We’ve proven that you don’t have to take big checks from corporations to win. We’ve shown that campaigns can be fueled by grassroots support. That was incredibly important to me as we were getting started, and it still is today.
As we head into the second Trump presidency, with National Republicans in control of both the House and the Senate, there’s a lot to do. I will be working overtime to defend the progress we’ve made since I was first elected back in 2020. But support from people like you is what enables me to fight back.
So, before we get too late in the month, before everyone takes some time off for the holidays, I’m humbly asking you to make a donation to my campaign.
[**Can you chip in $3 before our mid-month deadline at midnight tonight? We’ve got to end the year strong to be ready for whatever comes our way in 2025.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec24.KA0iD9&refcode=em241215-1-120&t=1&akid=5934%2E6688874%2EEL5Ghj)

subject: The New York Sun’s Urgent Mission
body:

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0b198b10a14e4391a122e30918e4af62&_e=aniC6r7aFSdN3hGrHXevMV1cE8QLhw4li9V8jC__U8-zCTtDdFSGZo_QnSeeL2rUM4Ch04qNqNnYVVw4VZzVY4sh1x7vQN1kU9QI1J4C_igZKcfHQZs5abqut9EnzIXDCYBPEwMy-tefQjdXUmUvGZOPC2juh454QGeL9cmde11pFSWZZVxFSE3D6_PZBPprQx3VlaFCUpZ5KxJwdtnbdA6prXfb6f1Wktt98YAvGQlCVemXF5LKXpBeq8BppRPA93wh87BrcwcOoXIWVPRhH0Tcbkf8aWWUmT0n45mSb5Pe8HZ8vNs9Z9in2_Je9x6se99dyaAKjw6FsVCZ-QsaN9h3SaV0BH3d7aoG9vSHfpdKyoociPpo-Zwu6D4jgflc6OoDvTfEH59qVIv1IyYdgQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs.
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0b198b10a14e4391a122e30918e4af62&_e=aniC6r7aFSdN3hGrHXevMV1cE8QLhw4li9V8jC__U8-zCTtDdFSGZo_QnSeeL2rUM4Ch04qNqNnYVVw4VZzVY4sh1x7vQN1kU9QI1J4C_igZKcfHQZs5abqut9EnzIXDCYBPEwMy-tefQjdXUmUvGZOPC2juh454QGeL9cmde11pFSWZZVxFSE3D6_PZBPprQx3VlaFCUpZ5KxJwdtnbdA6prXfb6f1Wktt98YAvGQlijXGB65ZbqlDrvB3aURzPOUTpLsuk5SoTHJjG5TXZNQ3GLY7l8t6LNePT_jmYxyANpuxYbesCVCMYUMU286ICeJBMd0JeSueA6KCaACw3W8MNDRUFaBcuH5U4aLCagLMQXR6x8vduUsdwjV-xJeff3Dbv66LC9GIEGXnYoCvFsA%3D%3D)
---
| **Larry Kudlow**

clean_body: My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Reader,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: Riley Gaines
subject: We’re on a slippery slope
body:
God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. | |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2q3kw7TWYFljcLUedjfNMP1enSvKhu0mk4jbLl6bZsM0rQAxpPE6DR7AKuMhotJiQygr4S3EVvrqZAm2GSq5MU4eENh7j1CPD1UbcGvxYJEWcljhZJkiURRGOMUBqtQirf1HK1VUikM0S76uIlg_uKyYaEuyV0nxHCgMTtrJ1cn0Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2qfEEr_SB9xa5eJnqtR8jpSgx5Oq9AbJ1qLd-4bMUpZAxuO2eM-uwupf7P-TdvL9YikJybjovn_AtFWyOD3dLD_RFBO0q3xEiRPDJblYprn-CGLn0wm7bMD0A0gKfuj3UnrlOJze_mqMPY7RQeqSaIbnWZtmc8USBvNH3pAbGKgsw%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2qNIeowHqIBhaQ4ctmCJx0kvs2vppeRe6u3QOYztDGhxfV7H3OC4jRmfSxGleFL8kau0HC9UBUwxk5Y8D4p_YvuCbr8UiKnB1R4Kp9v7qjj3kOehxrISBo4F5ukzgvSbRUHs471i8L-jqYitM2KvlcwLIadboaiy3wfsHr2IUYoxQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2ppghF0x1ZYPcj_65uxS54xdXxWncffEL75T1erLle-hY6zhmz6miE3K7U_mkqYaGQFD0D8onOmUwDu2a5k7X00gV-YCcAryblDGBWFP7K3cJHrfYVF86g2ppSNunEVyU8cCUIEv95KXzUtfJo1BaGYzUmhpJr8u0_wAupgk2N2mA%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2qtLZobQIeGb_0XnoS3hbUhmQmjlyWgKmVSLfz52wsvfSHWKiI5zkVIqaZVcSH_liZGEmKT20Pg2zDlNeA0nPVziXmfrpadISrolRXP37JZulONpo4adsY45RJwrd1rzG13gi-ukEieCmAUp7BpodPf6ps4TtJTNG8yNUq9Nzs-Ng%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2pUirdmc1ri0NoVWRsAxC6Zh3RAEQwj8tciTv8gZSo6NTvjwHmcAEaKGI-cvL7414FhDnnHUFevsAeNq5CnPoOtN1yyQ2Zj6yHSKT1ismeanavSz9loMfhU6fK3xFe6fpOt9VYCExdIOdSRgr9UA7D7pOl-hWvRLTxJ56b68gmhpQ%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2ojCHtWd_1AHvyChnIRM8I3Y6kBnBm2HiWw3lbf6zSbdqOY-xDprVYwB4MzKonhQ5ehVEaylKAp_0G4444EFU4b6JI-WuGhwsCwb-ErXY0df7KwbRVzWrYc2kkpoRCJZZ6WMZSwG-TcRm1O06I0bHby9bYvxnmKLPsH8Ql7PNauYQ%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2ojoOH6GThvesFzXCyctFoK_4UYgkyGSHQuEzo0f6UZZDjJ_m8XRnvq6zHFWdD1uSj6GM5UhCvnNWQAEWRiCPM9jqvNzOgCR6EWXxdl91DZRyz-PScc86KqyUcSbJ-ewgh0icGoCKO6q_amB7ZSTZloHAht3mTwTpZBgI13pd31IA%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2r659NLs5bQSal_A3LqY7So84p5EHyjEVZBDtYSD-UzO_QM_cMFALLga2IuPGfwESgZ-yQQ7OOUmihXQNcDRKQ1n4mkuy1BMQaoTS6VL0GIUwDy6x0-L27uIzFPAbubNnzCpJsUYyKEduPnp87_5naWRUA9nqqgJeVin4VcQdPz_g%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a801c089efd4278b102e7fa1084d90d&_e=vwHEqJ7neYira5btL0KxFJJRAs2tUDCqTC-h32nb9xc3bokxbrFIwIiy5P_gmnAZubtDVXkdTQD3SLtOzlUpPeHHoh9yz_JRaF9E64nZcO7bx42lTm25MivWc4bukuEF0RZa38goM5D6OVt4-PWRhxXsimbk86htvYuRlWuLs6R4tZGZ9BDXB6eZ61evg2ZrsSBBK163PfH-SDM1en5BtgoInNoJZBxSse0HUM_sy2rR7dUqQfpuGddW1W-0IvuJLUJ8rSsgnDGUmVD6w2RjHXZpkyiS-5XZuPTBJinhmqUAvbUefJc2VchfzqalPTqDT52KW212yRXucCctlnHeqRR-yH0d6W1l2k10-DEr_VlBJw1t2G8mw8R-Xdofi4q0QsWqlU90EhiJVkArNbOtBw%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

Sincerely,

clean_body: God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

# [Time to start breaking things](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153171680&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMTcxNjgwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQyOTIzMjksImV4cCI6MTczNjg4NDMyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Z2wx2lMPVU3cjWuAWRJvNeWwv6_kRfIFAfsF5jK0h7Y)
### A simple solution for bringing Democrats out of the wilderness
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---
| Dec 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153171680&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMTcxNjgwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNDI5MjMyOSwiZXhwIjoxNzM2ODg0MzI5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.eIYe0ftGVHmfeSEbKoOlyq9_el2yODT280PKUkbNDQ0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153171680&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMTcxNjgwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQyOTIzMjksImV4cCI6MTczNjg4NDMyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Z2wx2lMPVU3cjWuAWRJvNeWwv6_kRfIFAfsF5jK0h7Y&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153171680&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMTcxNjgwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQyOTIzMjksImV4cCI6MTczNjg4NDMyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Z2wx2lMPVU3cjWuAWRJvNeWwv6_kRfIFAfsF5jK0h7Y)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/time-to-start-breaking-things?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Last week I wrote about [what an assassin reveals about our politics](https://substack.com/redirect/15f53d4c-5d79-462f-93f9-ea84e92beda1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and how the response to his act -- both by public officials and everyday people -- gives us an opportunity to look at one thing Democrats can start doing to flip the narrative: stop talking like company men and start talking about tearing down broken systems.
We had a lot of great engagement and comments and I just want to say that it's incredible to see so many people getting involved and working toward solving this!
That discussion focused on our healthcare system, something many Americans view as a corrupt scheme built to extract wealth from suffering people and transfer it to the shareholder class.
On that front, the solution for Democrats is to stop believing healthcare-industry funded polls that try to tell us Americans love their health insurance (that's like believing [soda company-funded studies](https://substack.com/redirect/58e10b1d-6ab3-4d0f-b9cc-ee863b941e3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that tell us soda isn't bad for us) and start trusting our gut and our lived experiences.
There is a vast amount of dormant political fuel right now in people who want to take down broken systems. And, as I outlined in ["Why do people keep voting against their own self-interest?"](https://substack.com/redirect/c4ac7b54-a78c-4eb7-bba7-19f22a582a25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the only place they feel that they have to turn is Donald Trump.
In that post I promised to start proposing more paths for Democrats to change that dynamic, find their way out of the wilderness, and start delivering for everyday people again. So let's build off of what we learned about the discontent people have with our healthcare system and expand that lesson to what we can do in other areas. Because the solution to winning again isn't that complicated:
_**Start breaking things that Republicans can never touch.**_
In 2021, as congressional insider trading was running rampant, I was absolutely blasted by Democrats for proposing a complete ban on members of Congress owning individual stocks, even in blind trusts, and saying that they should be jailed for insider trading "just like you, me, or Martha Stewart" would be.
When Nancy Pelosi brushed off the congressional insider trader problem by calling it part of the "free market," [I went on MSNBC](https://substack.com/redirect/c8286c01-d203-4814-a102-7f4236ac9fa7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and said that that sounded an awful lot like "let them eat cake" to me.
I was surprised at where Democratic elected officials were on this issue, since I had always considered the party to be anti-corruption, pro-worker, and at least not as pro-Wall Street as the other party.
Around that same time a friend of mine, MiAngel, called me up to tell me that something was going on in her hometown of Hayti Heights in southeast Missouri's "bootheel" region. Her cousin, Catrina, was the new mayor of the town so she gave me her phone number.
The bootheel is a cotton growing former slaveholding turned sharecropping area with a heavy rural black population. Hayti Heights is a relic of segregation in that area. For a long time it was the "wrong side of the tracks" neighborhood of Hayti, Missouri. In 1972 the Heights split off from Hayti and was an all black town up through the 2010s. Now it is about 90% black.
For a long time it was held together by the charisma of its renowned first mayor, David Humes, who [centered the town in state and national discussions](https://substack.com/redirect/b27b68f9-e363-46c6-982b-9febe9de61a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on race and rural poverty, and even garnered [a shout-out in a speech by President Jimmy Carter](https://substack.com/redirect/fdee7fb5-610a-4ac2-924a-2ad9c614db20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 1979.
After his death, however, the town spiraled into corruption and decay until Mayor Catrina's election in 2019. I called Catrina up and she said that they were having an event in a couple of weeks and invited me to come down, so I agreed.
What I saw was the saddest sight I saw on the campaign trail.
The people of Hayti Heights had set up on the side of a rural Missouri highway to sell hot dogs and potato chips to try to raise enough money to repair their broken water system. They had been buying water from the neighboring town of Hayti for a couple of years, but Hayti had said they couldn't continue to support both towns with their infrastructure.
To make matters worse, when I was taking the first bite of like my sixth polish sausage (trying to do what I could), the Mayor asked me to come with her to take care of something. So we got in her car and drove about a block to a small fenced in area. I was confused (and maybe a little judgmental) about why we had gotten in the car to drive a couple hundred feet, when she popped the trunk and pulled out a couple of gas cans.
She explained to me that their subterranean sewage pumps had worn out and that they didn't have enough money to fix them. So she had taken irrigation ditch pumps and rigged hoses to them on either side of the subterranean pumps to keep the sewage flowing. It looked like the type of setups I saw driving through Iraq when I was running missions there.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/32250357-45d0-45a8-8000-fd75822500ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Gas powered pumps I took a picture of along the Euphrates River in Iraq._
Every four hours, day and night, she had to drive to these pumps to fill them with gas and hand crank them on or they would overflow and sewage would rise up and fill the town. There were several burned out carcasses of pumps along the side that had broken because they weren't made for this type of work.
I asked her if she had talked to any other elected officials or people who could help her. She said no one cared. In fact, the last person she talked to had wanted to fine them for creating an environmental problem when the sewage overflowed.
Coincidentally, a few days later I told this story at an event in Springfield, Missouri, and a woman in the crowd knew of a water advocacy organization in Oklahoma who could help them get a grant. I connected the mayor with the organization, they worked on a grant, and were awarded a couple million dollars in ARPA funding. Hayti, the neighboring town, got several million for its water system, too.
The lesson here could be that Democrats can help build and lift people up. But guess what. Pemiscot County, where Hayti Heights is, is one of the few places where I didn't significantly outperform Kamala Harris. I only did half a point better than her despite the fact that I was in Pemiscot County over and over again and tangibly helped people there.
And it's not like Kamala Harris and I were close because she got a boost from being part of the Biden team that passed ARPA and people were giving her credit.
No, she lost Pemiscot County by 49% and I lost it by 48.5%. My opponent never went there during the campaign, has probably never been there, and certainly couldn't find it on a map. Yet I was annihilated there. A big part of that was that we didn't have enough money to run ads or send mail in the bootheel. But another part is that people as a whole, and even the media, don't care that much about building right now, so they don't talk about it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6839acfa-c639-4f1f-957d-f10a6a599764?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A reporter accompanied me on one of those trips back to Pemiscot County during the campaign. In a lull in the conversation the reporter asked Mayor Catrina what she liked the most about me and my campaign.
Catrina didn't hesitate.
She said "I like that he wants to ban politicians from owning stocks and throw them in jail if they break the law. I'm tired of them making decisions for themselves rather than for us."
Politically, it doesn't matter how much money in the IRA or ARPA went to working people. It doesn't matter how many union workers the infrastructure bill is going to put to work. The system is corrupt and if Democrats want to be trusted again, they are going to have to start breaking things.
Political corruption is the perfect place to start. Here are some things that Republicans will never do:
1\. **Ban all members of Congress and their families from owning stock and have criminal penalties for breaking the law.** My experience on the campaign trail would lead me to believe that many of you would think that's unfair. No, it's perfectly fair. Members of Congress make a lot of money. If you want to make money in the stock market, don't be a member of Congress. No one is making you. When I was at the Pentagon I worked at a procurement unit where military service members, who were _ordered_ there, with no choice, were forced to sell stocks in order to meet ethics obligations and avoid conflicts of interest. I think we can at least ask our members of congress to do the same.
2\. **Ban all outside income including the book deal loophole and others.** People hate politicians going to Washington and getting rich.
3\. **Reject political donations from all corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, and big healthcare and pharma CEOs.** I would make this the top plank of the Democratic Party. This is the single strongest thing the party could do to show it cares about everyday people and that it will actually start doing what it says it will do. And, perhaps, it would let some of these politicians actually do something about our broken healthcare system.
I mentioned this in past posts, but I need to mention it again because it is the reason that the Sherrod Browns and John Testers of the world are going extinct and aren't being replaced in other "red" states.
Between our campaign's voter contact and research, we consistently saw my message and background could gain us big ground, especially when paired with strong accountability for my opponent's failure to deliver for our state. But beyond needing the resources to communicate that message to more voters, the biggest hurdle our message faced wasn't about me or my message -- the research consistently showed it was as simple as the party I belonged to, intensified by sharing a presidential ballot with Trump.
My team and I are working on a series of posts to go over some of the related data on those topics with you and I'm really looking forward to sharing it and going deeper into solutions that we saw could reach people.
But it can't just be solutions by individuals. It won't work as long as the party doesn't do the work to deserve credibility with everyday people. And that work needs to be real, it needs to feel like an actual sacrifice or change, for people to believe it. The three things I outlined above would do that.
As a final note, I want to thank Judy K. for being our first paid supporter on Substack! We quietly introduced it as an option between our last post and this one for anyone who has the means to help us keep doing this work and making it public.
[SUPPORT THIS WORK](https://substack.com/redirect/b951cb4d-505d-4c7e-aedc-0c16ff5d4eba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Please keep all the great comments and questions coming, they help guide our work!
In the next week we will start diving into the numbers, and I'll share an inspirational email we got that is a great reminder of how important this work is for all of us, particularly the younger generations.
Until then.
-- Lucas

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Big media vs. new media
body:
It’s the end of an era. And I can’t say I’m sad to see it go.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=0dbeb7b4c0e740968eb45de74d76397b&_t=7SqORT0FFSpBaPD2mHOBeDWBqH_oyEBoalOEx8yd3ARMiQWLzZF7Nh6NTwIqigelP0DXBU1fh1YXYUdLlkIR7zPj7NB7LxLA3YlOVrTqwSkatrc4Dez72gTugbNfFTZZ)_
---
[
](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0dbeb7b4c0e740968eb45de74d76397b&_e=0BRzThA7pIs1V54SyN_YytVS8ufpQOC6KgGuWtjO362lurLIDkk5bYazcO_R3EfB_ti0uq639K0rRs4FKf6zMOBG3u_zzKuko1vPEaGfF02lPnYbLHwufVv14fdAGVgHRr7omolLtURtFYQa-2t0ULFDK3o75gsZD5W9nNDq5ZP-gmSjMOJnQ7_Z4GMZgu5nI8s2vrv1lKJmFIIoN1cCB-_QQxVq8ZyIU3HykiGifAnrvATQIlbJfmzJJ4bFuxSNxzWeJ94RqgpFgB3h0zb3_AmhQbjt725OlYLD9YMhHJoVRd2dwIsZ08G-gV6eTifLZC99eGbHjVbYK57mTlk3oBx5tCnSzGidudn-CBoX6sAOmrWoixY2Ue5keT1Ojw7u)
| |
Dear Friend, how are you today? I'm reaching out with a bold prediction--what do you think about this...

**Big media is over**.

It's the end of an era. And I can't say I'm sad to see it go.

But the death spiral of the legacy news media means that [I need YOUR urgent help to be forward-thinking during this news revolution.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0dbeb7b4c0e740968eb45de74d76397b&_e=0BRzThA7pIs1V54SyN_YytVS8ufpQOC6KgGuWtjO362lurLIDkk5bYazcO_R3EfB_ti0uq639K0rRs4FKf6zMOBG3u_zzKuko1vPEaGfF02lPnYbLHwufVv14fdAGVgHRr7omolLtURtFYQa-2t0ULFDK3o75gsZD5W9nNDq5ZP-gmSjMOJnQ7_Z4GMZgu5nI8s2vrv1lKJmFIIoN1cCB-_QQxVq8ZyIU3HykiGifAl1EVmrp9bRWvNNJSXlwCCecmXIM3kJNSwUk0LdsCsgGSNtj9RE3p1o5J_Ctwz6t1PqJ5RWSTkhbiyC1HzeoH7PCYGG8ckF0rDDmzJumV7HH_q86Hynm3vtFQB9SnBAWPa_ssQU-3k_5yyIoGJ6fugM)

I'll tell you more about how you can help in just a moment, but first, let me tell you why we need to act right away.

Next year, there's one thing we can absolutely expect...

Big media will continue to call for censorship of new media. And honestly, is that any surprise to you?

The ladies on _The View_ are already blaming the election results on X (formerly Twitter) and "misinformation." The _New York Times_ claims we're experiencing a "dark turn in democracy." Rachel Maddow cried on MSNBC about the dangers of Elon Musk and new media. Here's the thing--so-called "Big Media" has been corrupt and one-sided for a long, long time. In fact...

[**Hillsdale has led the fight against "Big media" for decades--with YOUR help!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0dbeb7b4c0e740968eb45de74d76397b&_e=0BRzThA7pIs1V54SyN_YytVS8ufpQOC6KgGuWtjO362lurLIDkk5bYazcO_R3EfB_ti0uq639K0rRs4FKf6zMOBG3u_zzKuko1vPEaGfF02lPnYbLHwufVv14fdAGVgHRr7omolLtURtFYQa-2t0ULFDK3o75gsZD5W9nNDq5ZP-gmSjMOJnQ7_Z4GMZgu5nI8s2vrv1lKJmFIIoN1cCB-_QQxVq8ZyIU3HykiGifAlhPGmnbzkEzoY-kOeF7V1OP-z6BdxEDqg91sX9SLqaUDy9rxg75u-IBVEuOTzFiVI2FkcwAyd2ghS1wxI-UC1W3M_JVz1HezX1K9fPnSgqNFeEbEyziPd2WSMwkq-7eqivh1WuNWqcOAW0pF-IQPMK)

_Imprimis_ --an important alternative to pervasive and pernicious far-Left narratives--first reached the mailboxes of a few thousand readers in 1972. Now, we fight against dangerous ideologies through our **free** online courses, **Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , and all our **outreach on social media**.

**And our outreach numbers in the millions --a far cry from the few thousand folks that received the first issue of _Imprimis_ back in '72!**

We've also partnered for decades with talk-radio shows and podcast hosts like Mark Levin, Tucker Carlson, and Charlie Kirk. We've also had the blessing to work with some of the best radio hosts in history--Rush Limbaugh and Paul Harvey--to promote the principles of liberty that Hillsdale staunchly defends.

**This has been some of our most important work. And it 's work we couldn't do without YOU.** You've especially been a big help to us during attacks from legacy media and censorship from Big Tech companies like Facebook.

Thank you so much!

Next year--as Big Media clings desperately to remain relevant--we can expect more attacks, so [I pray you'll continue to stand with us for TRUTH against Leftist dogmas.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0dbeb7b4c0e740968eb45de74d76397b&_e=0BRzThA7pIs1V54SyN_YytVS8ufpQOC6KgGuWtjO362lurLIDkk5bYazcO_R3EfB_ti0uq639K0rRs4FKf6zMOBG3u_zzKuko1vPEaGfF02lPnYbLHwufVv14fdAGVgHRr7omolLtURtFYQa-2t0ULFDK3o75gsZD5W9nNDq5ZP-gmSjMOJnQ7_Z4GMZgu5nI8s2vrv1lKJmFIIoN1cCB-_QQxVq8ZyIU3HykiGifAln6QEoKgaG_O57ikJvNuANMlcQnU347T_sAlLoqpdYdrt4tAEyLGZAx6ZID9Vosb60q6uAcBMQingyNUemqtKosqaNzcA73ga9-xxYTSm3gedPi6l1YKlhOWIkvI2z5HupeZ7vL2ghZ-NifEGLR-E0)

An important part of our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** will be confronting Big Media head-on. As more Americans begin turning off MSNBC and canceling their _New York Times_ subscriptions, with your generous gift today, you will provide...

* Free subscriptions to _Imprimis_ --our digest of liberty--featuring constitutional perspectives on contemporary problems, including immigration, the weaponization of government, and education.
* Podcasts including "The Larry Arnn Show," "Hillsdale Dialogues," and "Liberty and Learning with Mark Levin," all on **our Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , part of the "New Media" that more and more people--especially and including young people--are tuning in to.
* Free online courses on the Constitution, American history, Christianity, and Marxism--especially important as our audience for these courses begins to become younger and younger. We've got a great lineup of courses planned for 2025, by the way...
* Massive outreach on social media--including X (formerly known as Twitter)--where we often share our educational content, such as lectures from Hillsdale events, free online courses, informative surveys, and our learning videos.

**I hope you know we can only accomplish all of this with your help.**

[**Are you with us?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0dbeb7b4c0e740968eb45de74d76397b&_e=0BRzThA7pIs1V54SyN_YytVS8ufpQOC6KgGuWtjO362lurLIDkk5bYazcO_R3EfB_ti0uq639K0rRs4FKf6zMOBG3u_zzKuko1vPEaGfF02lPnYbLHwufVv14fdAGVgHRr7omolLtURtFYQa-2t0ULFDK3o75gsZD5W9nNDq5ZP-gmSjMOJnQ7_Z4GMZgu5nI8s2vrv1lKJmFIIoN1cCB-_QQxVq8ZyIU3HykiGifAktZFiL2OgC59u_D4D-JUNaFdrhBK8o41cWBv1L_sOPApUyvQmU7H8Z70He1opXShmT5FFift3C5aerCgYaFn_Dv9mmGM87K9YkXHBRv_YirSgA9RpFHd6kR6c2jz07lev6csQcoobwKzNDWHmzFzhi)

This is an exciting time when we can do so much to restore liberty. Together, we will STOP Big Media LIES and propaganda and TEACH the American people the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution.

To do so, we must expand these programs further than we ever have before--and that brings me to my last point...

I'm asking for your most generous year-end support for next year's **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

**If you haven 't renewed your support yet, can I count on you to please give your best tax-deductible year-end gift right away?**

**You can make your gift online, safely and securely, at this link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0dbeb7b4c0e740968eb45de74d76397b&_e=0BRzThA7pIs1V54SyN_YytVS8ufpQOC6KgGuWtjO362lurLIDkk5bYazcO_R3EfB_ti0uq639K0rRs4FKf6zMOBG3u_zzKuko1vPEaGfF02lPnYbLHwufVv14fdAGVgHRr7omolLtURtFYQa-2t0ULFDK3o75gsZD5W9nNDq5ZP-gmSjMOJnQ7_Z4GMZgu5nI8s2vrv1lKJmFIIoN1cCB-_QQxVq8ZyIU3HykiGifAkKWRbLctMMU6yPIiiFQD2yY28xfXeRkopcm_3MYVAK85RgJiO2Yc36XqJeapm8LcDZHTU16YSsuu01lAzTQfahTS5KsJK2XVBgEF6l7vaK-k1Sz31LDVhz7_-KlvvqMZMPk9_YthHzoaEbLQANa4zY)

And because we can count on the support of informed patriots like you, we'll continue to accomplish our goals without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT.

So please help us reach our $6,000,000 year-end online goal by **December 31** (that's only a few days away!).

Your gift of any size will help us restore liberty today, and secure liberty for the long term. After all, there is only one way to save liberty in America--EDUCATION.

Thank you for helping us meet this historic moment head-on--and for reading all the way to the end of this email! Really appreciate you,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** The era of Big Media is over. But next year, as legacy media attempts to cling to relevance, we can expect even more attacks. So I need your help to provide all our outreach, including _Imprimis_ , the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and free online courses, to millions for FREE. Next year, we plan to expand our outreach to newer and younger audiences.

Thanks to the help of informed patriots like you, we remain on the vanguard of new media--standing up to the lies and propaganda of the legacy media with the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution. This work will be even more important in 2025.

**That 's why I hope I can count on you today for a generous, tax-deductible gift to help us meet our $6,000,000 online funding goal--before December 31.** I've included your secure link to give right now here:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0dbeb7b4c0e740968eb45de74d76397b&_e=0BRzThA7pIs1V54SyN_YytVS8ufpQOC6KgGuWtjO362lurLIDkk5bYazcO_R3EfB_ti0uq639K0rRs4FKf6zMOBG3u_zzKuko1vPEaGfF02lPnYbLHwufVv14fdAGVgHRr7omolLtURtFYQa-2t0ULFDK3o75gsZD5W9nNDq5ZP-gmSjMOJnQ7_Z4GMZgu5nI8s2vrv1lKJmFIIoN1cCB-_QQxVq8ZyIU3HykiGifAlkzfanh60JLgrGEbpWZ4CSN5DfPapmPaARj9sf4xcwRFRKnOZ__EW0bHmRtvglAYrAJl2RuM2bHJt-auETBhyWeqzuJYpElWwYVTJ0R2kuLl_0-VMTBVv7TMtbx516FvYWuw0v7UVY3F3k0F5FXqp7)

We’ve Built a Movement Too Powerful to Ignore
[MAKE OUR VICTORY COMPLETE](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=too_powerful_12_15_24_nd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
This is it.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is heading to Capitol Hill this week for more than 20 meetings with senators to discuss how we can transform federal policies to Make America Healthy Again. His nomination as the next Secretary of Health and Human Services is the direct consequence of the work we did together.
You fought for this.
You stood firm when others doubted.
You supported this movement, demanded truth, and brought Make America Health Again to the forefront of our nation’s agenda.
_Every dollar, every message, every share—it all led to this moment._
The establishment is paying attention. The system we’ve worked so hard to challenge is beginning to shift. While there may be hurdles ahead, the strength of this movement and the principles we stand for are paving the way for real change.
**Together, we’ve built something too powerful to ignore.**
[**But we still have one final hurdle: clearing the remaining campaign debt. Let’s cross this finish line together and make sure the momentum we built doesn’t falter.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=too_powerful_12_15_24_nd1&n=6)
This is your victory. Let’s cement it.

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: Has America turned away from the Constitution?
body:
The Connection Between Faith and Freedom

_**A message from our sponsor...
**_

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=154259327f024237af93e2ce0c7685c7&_e=PJQKzMY3H3djEwijhdVxN_zkk9_E13WE9W_-SdKkDN0hVEM5xbIuf5YhI6KtTWKUyD-gm-Itkc9C-VXth4-s9RSC887y_4YlcH0ALfsA2daRZzheTV-dr3vCrzo4-tKSVW5A_2mKFDslZFnIwnn0u9NSnUC30o_4cCvgpxOFZKSu0QO4HI7ScoZ5wvNZ1dOTh2Dj5pKYdHEBlQ1gxVPpt9TrKReJlPJKCzXY1_1nnW1RF27Ko9P0hLH25rOgngnAjRPor2J8oKerYgmsIqG6xW2x6VZMUrjnSa458T8EpvlpdgLz7BjZjIjsAfWd54U9fSxMIjGPcCNjcpJC-G3RVPCmIhciB8t4AhpAXxZk1AuUz6oru139maTTcdAMnubIbrnf8_Q_XGesL73UFGwhSRfA3DBXHcnuqvhbBJgWgVc%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=154259327f024237af93e2ce0c7685c7&_e=PJQKzMY3H3djEwijhdVxN_zkk9_E13WE9W_-SdKkDN0hVEM5xbIuf5YhI6KtTWKUyD-gm-Itkc9C-VXth4-s9RSC887y_4YlcH0ALfsA2daRZzheTV-dr3vCrzo4-tKSVW5A_2mKFDslZFnIwnn0u9NSnUC30o_4cCvgpxOFZKSu0QO4HI7ScoZ5wvNZ1dOTh2Dj5pKYdHEBlQ1gxVPpt9TrKReJlPJKCzXY1_1nnW1RF27Ko9P0hLH25rOgngnAPvWsUmnI4Y_3UvrzB72605M6Cjt4L-7A8OCXka6dbctRZcWjE72Unr6XYxFY89KtrEU8TMK3nDW-pHsaeGC1OOZ5dqwpjXXo7-h2gqgeLrVLov0O7o2ud8TqspyXAHf_1fgy0u-B6H2s4kzdPm8JUP90HLBqP1_cU9iDhee8ego%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=154259327f024237af93e2ce0c7685c7&_e=PJQKzMY3H3djEwijhdVxN_zkk9_E13WE9W_-SdKkDN0hVEM5xbIuf5YhI6KtTWKUyD-gm-Itkc9C-VXth4-s9RSC887y_4YlcH0ALfsA2daRZzheTV-dr3vCrzo4-tKSVW5A_2mKFDslZFnIwnn0u9NSnUC30o_4cCvgpxOFZKSu0QO4HI7ScoZ5wvNZ1dOTh2Dj5pKYdHEBlQ1gxVPpt9TrKReJlPJKCzXY1_1nnW1RF27Ko9P0hLH25rOgngnAuHtPSOYa1T3Gsbt2gLPGsk25lEMpiWT1-5tNDQZCdR5fQgpxGsBwkV5Fp99e3_KqjUGFlgeovlToR8FDDzN-qstPvEloiFbpymsVsx-YtG6IY-95bDZGWS0bgCySRgjPit8hRF5oIb1mpDL7vUJIZPUz4bVV_nZ-jT8XP6geJtc%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=154259327f024237af93e2ce0c7685c7&_e=PJQKzMY3H3djEwijhdVxN_zkk9_E13WE9W_-SdKkDN0hVEM5xbIuf5YhI6KtTWKUyD-gm-Itkc9C-VXth4-s9RSC887y_4YlcH0ALfsA2daRZzheTV-dr3vCrzo4-tKSVW5A_2mKFDslZFnIwnn0u9NSnUC30o_4cCvgpxOFZKSu0QO4HI7ScoZ5wvNZ1dOTh2Dj5pKYdHEBlQ1gxVPpt9TrKReJlPJKCzXY1_1nnW1RF27Ko9P0hLH25rOgngnAqLrma0gQn8w9BhbwN4Re_rHcgIYZBfHB4_NGI7yWq6sXsKovKksSN3_pORmXjrsNwXx5hqO8MhmI05P2UXpdNG_XCg2hV3TR9CHs9AKW3Q-_748T6sSdZJjZqe5PH2GfsaZoN4GU-SvHCWvHQG1Xhm3cmzVcqxs-iu2RozxpPkE%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=154259327f024237af93e2ce0c7685c7&_t=JD5hX71eajchQYEbrzfjoq_uBcto6EAWKFfbTj7LjWW7sxEcp7NcwK50RuZdPQ0hnpIDTAa0wqSXCOat-L_xR68ju_udMEZsw7vd5v-b5F7VX6gZnyxGeELBFWYeNW6X)

|
---

Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House. | | | | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because... We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat! Remember: We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House. Remember: If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress. Remember: If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE. "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. We need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to help win these Special Elections and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority." If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now.
