name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Ending the influence of corporate PACs in Democratic primaries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I know we just had an election, but I don’t take corporate PAC money, so meeting these regular fundraising goals is critically important.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241215-4590-footer&t=1&akid=4590%2E420207%2E6ARpuf)
Peter, I promise to keep this one quick!
Right now my team tells me we’re still $3,400 short of our $7,000 mid-month fundraising goal. I know we just had an election, but I don’t take corporate PAC money, so meeting these regular fundraising goals is critically important — even in December.
And I’m not just rejecting corporate PAC money myself. **I’m fighting to end the influence of corporate PACs in Democratic primaries for good** , but I can’t do it without your support.
[**Will you pitch in $3 to help us reach our $7,000 goal so we can get big money out of politics and rebuild our party for the working class?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241215?refcode=em20241215-4590&amount=3&refcode2=4590_420207_6ARpuf&akid=4590%2E420207%2E6ARpuf)

Together,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241215-4590-footer&t=2&refcode2=4590_420207_6ARpuf&akid=4590%2E420207%2E6ARpuf)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

# [Let's Be Clear -- Biden's Pardons Are A Disgrace](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153130933&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMTMwOTMzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQyOTU4NzMsImV4cCI6MTczNjg4Nzg3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HBEfuVnwGLcmELz5D9-_CPiVtPOIbj-IXtioA3RxieE)
### Kids for cash human trafficking, abusing cancer patience, exploiting senior citizens, & historic civic embezzlement deserve consequences--not commutations
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Dec 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153130933&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMTMwOTMzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNDI5NTg3MywiZXhwIjoxNzM2ODg3ODczLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZLOm2vSbKu0BS8kE0egTSB_LvnU6ZAIP2BWjFjC70p4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153130933&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMTMwOTMzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQyOTU4NzMsImV4cCI6MTczNjg4Nzg3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HBEfuVnwGLcmELz5D9-_CPiVtPOIbj-IXtioA3RxieE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153130933&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMTMwOTMzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQyOTU4NzMsImV4cCI6MTczNjg4Nzg3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HBEfuVnwGLcmELz5D9-_CPiVtPOIbj-IXtioA3RxieE)
---
| | [](https://substack..gP_g-04icvxUvhXZ8s2iRpz9pHRGHGRb7Nhws5b4km4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/lets-be-clear-bidens-pardons-are?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Last month I expressed [deep concern that while Joe Biden was quick to pardon his son, he stopped there](https://substack.com/redirect/f6586b59-67cc-45b0-808a-14a0849e5e32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I pointed out that Biden had done nothing to pardon the thousands of non-violent drug offenders in prison due in part to his 1994 crime bill, nor commute the 40 people on federal death row to life in prison, nor cancel student debt, nor sign an EO protecting abortion access, nor pardon Indigenous activist Leonard Peltier or climate activist Steven Donzinger, nor enact the ERA.
Finally, due to each of you raising your voices, and due to pressure from countless activists and organizations, President Biden took a step forward and pardoned approximately 1500 people. I commended this move, while pointing out it still falls short of the dire need of the moment. But now as we further investigate these pardons, we see a horrific reality--Joe Biden has pardoned some of the worst people in the United States.
These are not folks caught up in an unjust criminal justice system, folks who were misled or denied due process, or folks who simply didn't know better. In numerous cases, Joe Biden pardoned powerful people who knowingly trafficked children, abused the elderly, abused sick patients, and stole historic amounts of funds from the American people. They caused generational harm that is still impacting countless Americans today. If Donald Trump had done this, we would have rightly loudly condemned the injustice. As a human rights lawyer, my standard remains justice above all else, and we need to recognize and reject the injustices Joe Biden has committed--and that begins with ensure we are informed.
**Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3upD6NS3ACSY1t8MLoJQfn-qO3Vnz7qkegoZBbq7nGc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153130933)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86e8ca0b-98ea-495b-9800-f0a519be4be9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Far from enacting systemic change for the better, Biden's pardons ensure further harm to the American people. Below I dive into just four such examples. We rightly condemned Donald Trump for pardoning war criminals and his wealthy friends. As you read below, ask yourself if these look like the acts of a man committed to justice and fairness, or something Donald Trump would do to protect his cronies?
### Kids For Cash
Judge Michael Conahan was sentenced to 17 years in prison for trafficking children in a modern day slavery ring. In [exchange for at least $2.8M in kickbacks](https://substack.com/redirect/a20eee61-be57-41ee-b328-9be7bb3cab83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Judge Conahan sentenced otherwise innocent children to a for-profit juvenile detention center over the course of several years. At least [one child died by suicide](https://substack.com/redirect/2a26ec7f-d148-4f3f-9678-74bb1236cf2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) due to the pain and suffering experienced at these for profit child prisons.
Perhaps even more embarrassing, when asked why Biden pardoned Judge Conahan, the White House responded that they "[didn't consider the case specifics](https://substack.com/redirect/2ccc110a-0fdc-4441-bd7e-081529211898?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." This is either the height of cruelty or the height of incompetence. Either way, it is indefensible. Even worse, Joe Biden pardoned Judge Conahan for his horrific crimes, even though countless yet suffer today due to Conahan's crimes, and even while not pardoning the children snared in Judge Conahan's illegal child trafficking scheme.
### Abusing Cancer Patients
Dr. Meera Sachdeva established a cancer center, then abused people at their lowest point--when they suffered cancer and went to her for treatment. [Rather than assist them](https://substack.com/redirect/f9af525e-8b9c-4658-bf60-54f10a2838cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Dr. Sachdeva committed healthcare fraud, allegedly diluted medications, used dirty syringes on patients, and according to several lawsuits, likely transmitted HIV and infected at least one person with the disease, and likely enabled the premature death of patients. This fraud continued for years, until Sachdeva was finally caught in 2012, sentenced to 20 years in person, and ordered to pay $8.2M in restitution.
Joe Biden inexplicably pardoned Dr. Sachdeva of her horrific crimes, crimes for which people are still suffering today.
### Exploiting Senior Citizens
As the CEO of Indiana's largest nursing home company, [James Burkhart exploited senior citizens for $19.4 million dollars](https://substack.com/redirect/39d6d968-0ab8-4a66-ba0a-0e0287ec4f37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in fraud--money he later used to buy himself gold bars, go on lavish vacations, and private jets, and diamonds. Local media reports that, "_Most of the stolen money came from the Health & Hospital Corporation of Marion County, a public health agency that owns nursing homes and operates Eskenazi hospital_." For his horrific abuse of the elderly, a judge sentenced Burkhart to 9.5 years in prison.
Joe Biden pardoned James Burkart of his abusive crimes, crimes for which people are still suffering today.
### Stealing from Working People
Former Dixon, IL comptroller Rita Crundwell set a record when she embezzled $53 million from the rural Illinois town. The record? She committed [the largest embezzlement of a town in U.S. history](https://substack.com/redirect/8b5208d5-defa-45e7-adea-7526d7d319da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Crundwell used these stolen funds to feed her horse breeding addiction, buy homes, more than four dozen luxury cars, and even a luxury motorhome. The City of Dixon condemned the pardon, [stating](https://substack.com/redirect/8b5208d5-defa-45e7-adea-7526d7d319da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> "The City of Dixon is shocked and outraged with the announcement that [President Biden](https://substack.com/redirect/8c13c1db-4756-49c3-a33f-31b4b9c04b83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has given Rita Crundwell clemency for the largest municipal embezzlement in the history of our country," current Dixon City Manager Danny Langlossa said in a statement reacting to Biden's commutation of Crundwell's sentence. "This is a complete travesty of justice and a slap in the face for our entire community."
Joe Biden pardoned Rita Crundwell of her historic crimes, crimes for which people ares still suffering today.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3upD6NS3ACSY1t8MLoJQfn-qO3Vnz7qkegoZBbq7nGc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153130933)
### The List Goes On
The power of the pardon is afforded to Presidents to right wrongs committed by our nation's historically unjust criminal justice system. A system that incarcerates Black and brown people at up to 6x higher rates than white people, while sentencing Black and brown people to 20% longer prison sentences for _the exact same crimes._ Yet, the above grotesque pardons are but a snapshot. In my analysis of the near 1500 pardons Biden issued, I found numerous more examples of pardons given to wealthy elites who used their status and power to exploit vulnerable people, engage in international drug trafficking, and steal from already marginalized communities. __
Meanwhile, as of the writing of this piece, Leonard Peltier languishes in prison, as does Steven Donzinger, as do thousands of non-violent drug offenders in federal prison--many of them incarcerated due to Biden's own 1994 crime bill that drastically increased mass incarceration of particularly Black and brown communities--student debt is still not cancelled, nor is the ERA enacted, nor is abortion protected via EO at least until January 20th
In my calls to Biden to pardon unjustly targeted people and communities, I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/f6586b59-67cc-45b0-808a-14a0849e5e32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> If Biden truly believes in justice, he cannot stop at only protecting his son. He must fight to protect _all_ Americans from malicious harm. The presidency is a powerful office--not for selective compassion, but for systemic change. And it is long past time Biden used it.
Unfortunately, far from advancing systemic change, Biden has further entrenched a system that ensures one level of justice for the wealthy and well connected, and another level of injustice for the low income and marginalized. Instead, Biden has found time to use his awesome power of the presidency to pardon wealthy judges who exploit children, but to protect the children exploited by those wealthy judges.
We must not relent in demanding Biden stop these injustices, and instead uphold meaningful justice for those who have actually been wronged by our unjust criminal justice system. Silence is simply not an option.
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3upD6NS3ACSY1t8MLoJQfn-qO3Vnz7qkegoZBbq7nGc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153130933)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4a77f69-eef1-41a6-b069-0447f0952e6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

When possible, I hope you'll upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

Dear Peter,
Despite the new administration's attacks on critical care policies, we’re committed to continuing the fight to pass the care agenda in communities all over the country.
But, the truth is that care workers and families across the country will **face additional challenges over the next four years.**
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98751886/517692662/-1219598393?ms=121524_carepledge&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODRjMjQ5ZC0yN2JiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LF4z-G6FOHZBJYIS6hsJ3dGKTi5K-PMofKrbkXdAfD8=&emci=b0985ef5-ddb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=184c249d-27bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)**
**[**_That’s why we need to come together and pledge to support our elected Care Champions and the care agenda in 2025 and beyond. Will you sign our pledge today? >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98751887/517692663/-1219598393?ms=121524_carepledge&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODRjMjQ5ZC0yN2JiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LF4z-G6FOHZBJYIS6hsJ3dGKTi5K-PMofKrbkXdAfD8=&emci=b0985ef5-ddb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=184c249d-27bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)**
**********__[Sign the Care Pledge](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98751888/517692664/-1219598393?ms=121524_carepledge&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODRjMjQ5ZC0yN2JiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LF4z-G6FOHZBJYIS6hsJ3dGKTi5K-PMofKrbkXdAfD8=&emci=b0985ef5-ddb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=184c249d-27bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)__**********
We need to make sure that our elected officials know how critical the care agenda is to Americans — _especially officials who have not yet championed care policies._
By signing this pledge, you’re joining the ranks of workers, caregivers, and advocates across the country who are committed to fighting to ensure **that all care workers are treated with dignity and respect and that families have access to the care they need.**
Focusing on finding strength in our community is one of the ways we’re going to win a care agenda for all. Our organizing work happens year-round, and with the 2025 legislative session just around the corner, we cannot stop our efforts for a single second. We know that the Texas GOP won’t stop, and neither will we. That’s why we’re reaching out. We set a $3,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and we need your help to reach it. Any amount helps: [=] If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. DONATE $ » [] DONATE $ » [] DONATE $ » [] DONATE $ » [] DONATE $ » [] OTHER AMOUNT » [] Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. For more information, visit toppac.org [] . [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] Pol. adv. paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac.org [] , not authorized by any federal, state, or local candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Powered By People
subject: We’ll keep this short.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Since it’s Sunday, we’ll keep this brief. We’re racing against the clock
to reach our $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal by midnight.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241215.PnurbG&refcode=ema20241215-239919&t=1001&akid=239919%2E444211%2EE-yUR_ ]If you can afford it, will you donate today to help make sure we have
the resources to start off 2025 from a position of strength?

We’re so grateful for your support,

Team Powered by People

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Email from Powered by People from December 13, 2024 is forwarded below:

With your support, we built the infrastructure to contact millions of
voters in Texas ahead of the 2024 election.

Even though the results weren’t what we hoped for, Beto and our whole team
are determined and committed to fighting for the future of our state.

Powered by People is a grassroots organization fueled by thousands of
volunteers and only possible because of donations from people like you.
Since you are a key part of this effort, we want to give you an inside
look at our fundraising progress for the month of December so far:

Right now, we’re $9,340.12 short of where we need to be for mid-December.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241215.PnurbG&refcode=ema20241215-239919&t=1002&akid=239919%2E444211%2EE-yUR_ ]So we’re reaching out to ask if you can make a contribution of
$3 right now to reach our $35,000 mid-month fundraising
goal by midnight on Sunday.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241215.PnurbG&refcode=ema20241215-239919&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=239919%2E444211%2EE-yUR_ ]DONATE $3

Any contribution you make today will help ensure we stay on track to meet
our targets as we head into the new year.

We can’t do any of this work without grassroots support—so thank you for
being in this fight with us.

— Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=239919%2E444211%2EE-yUR_

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Issued to: This Democrat [New Dems]
subject: 1 minute Survey: Defend President Biden's legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98752604/517694780/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzUzMmJiNy0yOWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ef787bkimlpwDUU4sqoFWJaetPoEhJKrtAsRhKgHKv0=)
---
With President Biden’s presidency coming to an end, I think we can all agree that he will be leaving behind an _amazing_ legacy.

✅ He created millions of jobs for Americans
✅ He capped prices on life-saving prescription drugs
✅ He pushed past partisan politics to create a united vision of our country

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Kim Ogg seeking death penalty in Jocelyn Nungaray killing,** " Houston Chronicle's **Nicole Hensley** -- "Harris County prosecutors are expected to seek the death penalty against two men charged in the death of 12-year-old**Jocelyn Nungaray** , according to officials.

The option to seek the death penalty at trial means jurors can consider to sentence **Johan Jose Martinez-Rangel** and**Franklin Pe ña** to die as a form of punishment. Court filings are expected Friday to elaborate on their decision to seek the death penalty, according to a Harris County District Attorney's Office news release.

Peña's defense attorney**Daniel Werlinger** said he and other lawyers received notice in November through the trial prosecutors that the punishment would be sought.

"We see this as old news. We knew we were going to be in this position from Day 1 but now it's official," Werlinger said.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/44734968-7f43-4917-838b-43ead3afb768?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/44734968-7f43-4917-838b-43ead3afb768?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The original charge against both men was filed as capital murder of a person older than 10 and younger than 15 years old, which excluded prosecutors from seeking death as a possible punishment before a jury. The charges were clarified in September to reflect Jocelyn was sexually assaulted.

The Venezuelan nationals were arrested within days of the girl's June 17 death. Her body was found in shallow water near a bridge in the 400 block of West Rankin Road." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Kim Ogg seeking death penalty in Jocelyn Nungaray killing, " Houston Chronicle's Nicole Hensley -- "Harris County prosecutors are expected to seek the death penalty against two men charged in the death of 12-year-oldJocelyn Nungaray , according to officials. The option to seek the death penalty at trial means jurors can consider to sentence Johan Jose Martinez-Rangel andFranklin Pe ña to die as a form of punishment. Court filings are expected Friday to elaborate on their decision to seek the death penalty, according to a Harris County District Attorney's Office news release. Peña's defense attorneyDaniel Werlinger said he and other lawyers received notice in November through the trial prosecutors that the punishment would be sought. "We see this as old news. We knew we were going to be in this position from Day 1 but now it's official," Werlinger said. The original charge against both men was filed as capital murder of a person older than 10 and younger than 15 years old, which excluded prosecutors from seeking death as a possible punishment before a jury. The charges were clarified in September to reflect Jocelyn was sexually assaulted. The Venezuelan nationals were arrested within days of the girl's June 17 death. Her body was found in shallow water near a bridge in the 400 block of West Rankin Road." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. name: Sarah McBride
subject: Photo dump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It’s been a busy few weeks!
#
Sarah here.
Election Day is more than a month behind us, but I’ve been full steam ahead! Your support is a big reason why I’m on this journey, so I wanted to show you a photo dump to show you exactly what I’ve been up to:
Last month, I completed **new member orientation** at the U.S. Capitol. It was an awe-inspiring, informative, and jam-packed couple of weeks of learning how to be a U.S. representative!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241215-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241215-1620&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
I got to sneak away over the weekend (perks of being driving distance from DC!) to join the **Brandywine Hundred Fire Company** in celebrating 100 years of service to Bellefonte! I’m so grateful to our dedicated firefighters who serve and protect our community day in and day out.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241215-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241215-1620&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
I also spoke to the bipartisan **Future Caucus** , a coalition of young Democratic and Republican state legislators, about our responsibility to work together to solve our nation’s crisis of hope — by proving that our democracy can still deliver.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241215-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241215-1620&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
Then, I attended the annual **Big Ive Turkey Drive** , one of my favorite Thanksgiving traditions, with Senator Coons and Senator-elect Blunt Rochester. It was all love and hugs as I joined elected officials, volunteers, and students to provide free turkeys to seniors in Wilmington.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241215-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241215-1620&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
Next, I was thrilled to celebrate the opening of the new state-of-the-art **Allied Health Center of Excellence at the Delaware Technical Community College Wilmington campus**. Funded with public funds, this new facility will enhance Delaware Tech's ability to educate the next generation of health care professionals.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241215-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241215-1620&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
Last week, I celebrated my favorite holiday — **Delaware Day**! Nearly 250 years ago, Delaware became the first state to sign on to the journey that is America. As a proud statriot, I may say, “I’m from the greatest state in the history of the union” more than any other sentence.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241215-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241215-1620&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
Last but not least, earlier this week we wrapped our second orientation gathering: **Harvard’s Bipartisan Program for Newly Elected Members of Congress.**
We heard from current and former representatives from both parties and experts that spanned the ideological spectrum on issues that ranged from taxes to housing to Artificial Intelligence to foreign affairs — and everything in between! It was wonderful to further get to know new colleagues on both sides of the aisle while hearing from brilliant minds studying some of the biggest issues of the day.
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241215-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241215-1620&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
As you can see, the past few weeks have been busy, but I’m having a great time rolling up my sleeves, diving into the details, and keeping up the fight to deliver for all Delawareans! That’s what this campaign has always been about.
**But the end of the month is approaching fast — when we’ll face our last public FEC deadline before I’m sworn in on January 3 — and there hasn’t been much time for fundraising.**
[**We need to raise $5,000 by tomorrow at midnight to keep our fundraising on track, power our work, and take on the big fights to get results for working people. Can you pitch in $5 or anything you can?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241215-1?refcode=em20241215-1620&amount=5&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241215-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241215-1620&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)**
Thank you!
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241215-1&t=1&refcode2=1620_21716_HmCz5N&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1620%2E21716%2EHmCz5N)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=XHF1krR5QqQzfAnByzBBcEcQfQRHbd%2FFCVPhrnk7AkiP3NeUwBclskkK08vWYnTnd757T4kTagy%2FyF04%2FNEK35hzbu4%2Ff%2BsDDy%2FtB%2BN7n0HnzohZn4slAdC%2FrxQgDPQx9YvyfYisPFdeT4DCxWth4XjI3dM2LO5iaWPzJ%2FqgQGO8hscTelHvSfT4jXGHvNKulB1zB9lkh32dCCV8UXMjLHi8fBdJY%2Fb75ZmS23%2FCSM5Jsx432zTcQ2N70xflhlLlbVtrhdL%2BFj1P08hnmwBse3elj%2FisZ1a2Vlt54EEbWdMBzhAA3286gdRP9%2FL%2BihyxvOFLuZVpeCw1SNm%2BGFJli%2BmJEEeV2%2FdfrY6YYxjuoHo%2FEOKVMb8g%2BqpoSZrAmZ7aHsi630AxYzYpukdreieQ69W6R0E5JUVC2CBsKws03qe5g1MLnsimg%2Fj2TpbWZp0l]

Hey Peter, I’m sorry to bother you on a Sunday — so I’ll keep this quick.

Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and we still haven’t hit our $5,000 goal.

We need to reach this goal to stay on track to hitting our end-of-year fundraising goal. It would mean the world to me if you could take a moment and pitch in anything you can spare before midnight.

So, can you boost our momentum ahead of tonight’s deadline by pitching in $ or whatever you can before midnight? Here’s that link again: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-dec24?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-dec24?amount=]

Thank you for your constant support,

George
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d5ca18e5-b870-4a8f-bf19-c057f7b8833f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This week, Donald Trump won Time Magazine's vaunted "person of the year" for the second time in the last decade. The results weren't even close. If this were a Hall of Fame vote for a famous athlete, the President-elect would have been unanimous. After having been unceremoniously ousted from the White House in the first presidential coup in history, the 47th President mounted the most improbable comeback, in which he overcame a mountain of opposition - from relentless media bias, to all-out lawfare in the courts, to two failed assassination attempts on his life.
Having succeeded against all odds, the President endeared himself to the American people through the trials and tribulations of the last four years. He has revolutionized our political psyche, and altered not just our political discourse, but our culture in general - rekindling a sense of optimism in a long dormant American spirit. At the ballot box, the American people offered him a landslide victory for his sacrifices - he carried both houses of Congress and was the first Republican to win the popular vote outright in twenty years.
[Visit Paul's Suckstack](https://substack.com/redirect/d5ca18e5-b870-4a8f-bf19-c057f7b8833f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
His electoral college victory was seismic; he is the first Republican in nearly four decades to eclipse three hundred and ten electoral votes. By county, he almost septupled his opposition - making the whole map blood-red, which offered undeniable testimony of MAGA's generational impact, one that has forever altered the course of American politics - and will outlast its progenitor long after he departs the political arena for good.
To think that the country was an inch away from losing everything just six months ago, as a bullet grazed Donald Trump's ear that fateful day in Butler, Pennsylvania, especially given the hindsight of his presidential victory, is mind boggling. Had the now famous chart not been up at the right moment or had there been a wrong turn of the head, America's final light of hope would have been darkened forever. There was so much riding on this year's election - from the integrity of the justice system to the sovereignty of our borders, to the state of the economy and the prospects of the American Dream.
* * *
# Tired of boring clothing from WOKE brands? Well we've got a Christmas gift for you...
Check out _**[Based Buy's selection](https://substack.com/redirect/ff85e0ff-53e2-4c7c-9b03-8b4b2800d6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ of pro-America shirts, custom designed by our in-house team.
[Bring Me To The Shop](https://substack.com/redirect/ff85e0ff-53e2-4c7c-9b03-8b4b2800d6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff85e0ff-53e2-4c7c-9b03-8b4b2800d6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
Had fate gone the other way, America could have well been on the pathway to World War III. In a world loaded with nuclear weapons, the prospects of Armageddon are as real as ever. As John F. Kennedy once remarked, "man holds in his mortal hands the power to abolish all forms of human poverty and all forms of human life." If the stakes of the 2024 election could be encapsulated into a single statement, it would be that. America, and the world, was headed rapidly down a warpath. Europe, facing its first land war in eight decades, was edging unnervingly close to a continent-wide conflagration. Same with the Middle East, which, now with a toppled Assad regime, is more volatile than ever, like a gasket about to blow. Add into the calculus aggressive Chinese and Russian regimes, and you have yourself an exceedingly bleak picture - a world that could easily devolve into chaos, resulting in more needless death and destruction, if things went badly.
Before it was too late, Americans woke up to this reality. In this context, the Trump movement is best framed as a political revolution. Like any revolution, things take time to catch traction. Eight years ago, when Donald Trump, who had just won his first historic race, was also featured on Time Magazine, he was given the ominous caption "President of the Divided States of America."
[Visit Paul's Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/d5ca18e5-b870-4a8f-bf19-c057f7b8833f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Eight years later, Time's editors finally realized what huge swaths of the country already knew a decade ago. Now, President Trump is portrayed in a positive fashion, looking regal and statesmanlike - his stance is more open and his face tilted upward, as to signify a hopeful future. Removed is the ominous language and dark coloration; instead, the President-elect is highlighted and forward facing, a much more optimistic bearing (and a welcome change from that well-known liberal rag) that casts the President in his rightful position as the catalyst of a new dawn in a United States saddled by uncertainty and despair.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/56e62fb7-78ff-460a-83c5-2cc1e7cda567?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**Unlike the previous honor eight years ago, President Trump is now portrayed in a positive fashion, looking regal and statesmanlike - his stance is more open and his face tilted upward, as to signify a hopeful future.**_
Between his three elections, Donald Trump has amassed more votes than any presidential candidate in history - and it's not even close. He has collected 214,477,092 popular votes and has garnered 848 electoral votes. No other presidential candidate comes close to these numbers. Barack Obama, the last Democrat to win two terms, collected 135,401,180 popular votes and 697 electoral votes, or 151 fewer than Donald Trump, over the course of his political career. And Obama of course, unlike Trump, did not have to deal with a rigged election system, whereby urban centers dumped buckets of untraceable ballots for his opponent - many dispositively linked to deceased persons or illegal aliens - in late night drop boxes, exploiting last-minute law changes made under the pretext of covid. This proved to be the scam of the century, and the fact that Donald Trump still prevailed, despite these systematic challenges working against him, underscores just how significant a landslide victory it was.
Accordingly, the 47th President has plenty of capital at his disposal to implement sweeping reforms - from mass deportations to cutting government regulations and reshaping the federal bureaucracy to getting his cabinet secretaries confirmed. The potential for a revolutionary change of course, one that will set a long torpid government upon much stronger and agile footing, should not be taken lightly.
American liberalism, which reached its zenith under the regimes of Barack Obama and Joe Biden, has torn our country at the seams. Economically, it has driven out American industry and strangled domestic business, severely wounding the American Dream and leaving all of society worse for the wear with products of significantly reduced quality. Culturally, it has sown untold division throughout society, putting the races and sexes against one another, and browbeating legacy Americans to feel ashamed of their past, particularly the glorious and heroic feats and fruits of that past, and the great individuals responsible for making the United States into the most powerful country the world has ever known.
[Read More From Paul](https://substack.com/redirect/d5ca18e5-b870-4a8f-bf19-c057f7b8833f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
On matters of foreign policy, America's integrity has been all but squandered with decades-long endless wars that have profited military contractors and international plutocrats at our detriment. American business no longer exists in many areas of the country; our entrepreneurial spirit and core identity has been dissipated of meaning and purpose. Our adversaries, like China and Mexico, run roughshod over the remains of a countryside razed by the reckless and stupid policies - from outsourcing jobs to shutting down factories - architected by a grossly incompetent ruling class. This regnant order, embodied by Nancy Pelosi and Mitch McConnell, in the collective lacks the foresight and wisdom to see beyond their petty aims and caprices, ignoring what is best for the greater good.
Our institutions have also taken a major beating. Law enforcement, from local police forces like the NYPD to federal agencies, like the FBI and ICE, have been demoralized - sometimes beyond repair. Many otherwise competent officers have been driven out by DEI and other woke policies such as vaccine mandates, which have resulted in a weaker overall force. Liberal policies have created a chilling effect on speech, where anyone who supports a candidate or policy anathema to Woke Progressivism is kowtowed into submission, lest he risk losing his job or worse. Justice in America has been nearly vanquished: rather than prosecute violent criminals, prosecutors and district attorneys have received their marching orders from George Soros-types, choosing to mercilessly punish anyone who gets in their way.
This system has all but destroyed what remains of constitutional governance - including its most important element of fair and impartial justice. Due process no longer exists in many parts of this country, including the Capitol, where illegitimately appointed "special counsels" have gone open season on political opponents - and for years with little accountability, always protected by a rogue and ruthless justice system. When all is said and done, the Jack Smith hatchet job will go down as one of the darkest chapters in the history of American justice. Lawfare - replete with communist judges and kangaroo courts - has brought this country to the brink of annihilation. Donald Trump was thus given a mandate to heal our society and bring respectability back to the institutions that have abdicated their public trust by abusing the powers they have been granted - to an order of magnitude never thought possible in the United States of America.
Even if Donald Trump accomplished nothing more, his legacy has already been cemented: the sea change he ushered forth in our politics will continue to reverberate for years to come. But the President is well poised to deliver an agenda as consequential and historic as his victory.
If successful, he will reshape both presidency and the country alike in his image, putting the United States on a forward-looking path that finally casts aside liberalism's fetishistic obsession for decline and stagnation once and for all. He will have engineered a model of governance that statesmen and stateswomen will be sure to emulate for decades to come. Fifty years from now, Donald Trump will be seen as the turning point in American history - where the shackles of a stagnant liberal order were finally shattered, and the ability for Americans to move confidently forward, having reclaimed their natural birthright as a dynamic and spirited people, was given a new lease on life.
* * *
_Paul Ingrassia, a graduate of Fordham University and Cornell Law School, is an Attorney; Communications Director of the NCLU; a two-time Claremont Fellow, and is on the Board of Advisors of the NYYR Club and the Italian American Civil Rights League. He writes a widely read Substack that is regularly posted on Truth Social by President Trump.[Follow Paul on X](https://substack.com/redirect/cf13984c-acc4-43c9-a76c-df8a6284db81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),_

clean_body: If this were a Hall of Fame vote for a famous athlete, the President-elect would have been unanimous. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? If this were a Hall of Fame vote for a famous athlete, the President-elect would have been unanimous. Dec 15 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- This week, Donald Trump won Time Magazine's vaunted "person of the year" for the second time in the last decade. The results weren't even close. If this were a Hall of Fame vote for a famous athlete, the President-elect would have been unanimous. After having been unceremoniously ousted from the White House in the first presidential coup in history, the 47th President mounted the most improbable comeback, in which he overcame a mountain of opposition - from relentless media bias, to all-out lawfare in the courts, to two failed assassination attempts on his life. Having succeeded against all odds, the President endeared himself to the American people through the trials and tribulations of the last four years. He has revolutionized our political psyche, and altered not just our political discourse, but our culture in general - rekindling a sense of optimism in a long dormant American spirit. At the ballot box, the American people offered him a landslide victory for his sacrifices - he carried both houses of Congress and was the first Republican to win the popular vote outright in twenty years. His electoral college victory was seismic; he is the first Republican in nearly four decades to eclipse three hundred and ten electoral votes. By county, he almost septupled his opposition - making the whole map blood-red, which offered undeniable testimony of MAGA's generational impact, one that has forever altered the course of American politics - and will outlast its progenitor long after he departs the political arena for good. To think that the country was an inch away from losing everything just six months ago, as a bullet grazed Donald Trump's ear that fateful day in Butler, Pennsylvania, especially given the hindsight of his presidential victory, is mind boggling. Had the now famous chart not been up at the right moment or had there been a wrong turn of the head, America's final light of hope would have been darkened forever. There was so much riding on this year's election - from the integrity of the justice system to the sovereignty of our borders, to the state of the economy and the prospects of the American Dream. Tired of boring clothing from WOKE brands? Well we've got a Christmas gift for you... Check out of pro-America shirts, custom designed by our in-house team. | | ---|---|--- Had fate gone the other way, America could have well been on the pathway to World War III. In a world loaded with nuclear weapons, the prospects of Armageddon are as real as ever. As John F. Kennedy once remarked, "man holds in his mortal hands the power to abolish all forms of human poverty and all forms of human life." If the stakes of the 2024 election could be encapsulated into a single statement, it would be that. America, and the world, was headed rapidly down a warpath. Europe, facing its first land war in eight decades, was edging unnervingly close to a continent-wide conflagration. Same with the Middle East, which, now with a toppled Assad regime, is more volatile than ever, like a gasket about to blow. Add into the calculus aggressive Chinese and Russian regimes, and you have yourself an exceedingly bleak picture - a world that could easily devolve into chaos, resulting in more needless death and destruction, if things went badly. Before it was too late, Americans woke up to this reality. In this context, the Trump movement is best framed as a political revolution. Like any revolution, things take time to catch traction. Eight years ago, when Donald Trump, who had just won his first historic race, was also featured on Time Magazine, he was given the ominous caption "President of the Divided States of America." Eight years later, Time's editors finally realized what huge swaths of the country already knew a decade ago. Now, President Trump is portrayed in a positive fashion, looking regal and statesmanlike - his stance is more open and his face tilted upward, as to signify a hopeful future. Removed is the ominous language and dark coloration; instead, the President-elect is highlighted and forward facing, a much more optimistic bearing (and a welcome change from that well-known liberal rag) that casts the President in his rightful position as the catalyst of a new dawn in a United States saddled by uncertainty and despair. | | ---|---|--- Unlike the previous honor eight years ago, President Trump is now portrayed in a positive fashion, looking regal and statesmanlike - his stance is more open and his face tilted upward, as to signify a hopeful future. Between his three elections, Donald Trump has amassed more votes than any presidential candidate in history - and it's not even close. He has collected 214,477,092 popular votes and has garnered 848 electoral votes. No other presidential candidate comes close to these numbers. Barack Obama, the last Democrat to win two terms, collected 135,401,180 popular votes and 697 electoral votes, or 151 fewer than Donald Trump, over the course of his political career. And Obama of course, unlike Trump, did not have to deal with a rigged election system, whereby urban centers dumped buckets of untraceable ballots for his opponent - many dispositively linked to deceased persons or illegal aliens - in late night drop boxes, exploiting last-minute law changes made under the pretext of covid. This proved to be the scam of the century, and the fact that Donald Trump still prevailed, despite these systematic challenges working against him, underscores just how significant a landslide victory it was. Accordingly, the 47th President has plenty of capital at his disposal to implement sweeping reforms - from mass deportations to cutting government regulations and reshaping the federal bureaucracy to getting his cabinet secretaries confirmed. The potential for a revolutionary change of course, one that will set a long torpid government upon much stronger and agile footing, should not be taken lightly. American liberalism, which reached its zenith under the regimes of Barack Obama and Joe Biden, has torn our country at the seams. Economically, it has driven out American industry and strangled domestic business, severely wounding the American Dream and leaving all of society worse for the wear with products of significantly reduced quality. Culturally, it has sown untold division throughout society, putting the races and sexes against one another, and browbeating legacy Americans to feel ashamed of their past, particularly the glorious and heroic feats and fruits of that past, and the great individuals responsible for making the United States into the most powerful country the world has ever known. On matters of foreign policy, America's integrity has been all but squandered with decades-long endless wars that have profited military contractors and international plutocrats at our detriment. American business no longer exists in many areas of the country; our entrepreneurial spirit and core identity has been dissipated of meaning and purpose. Our adversaries, like China and Mexico, run roughshod over the remains of a countryside razed by the reckless and stupid policies - from outsourcing jobs to shutting down factories - architected by a grossly incompetent ruling class. This regnant order, embodied by Nancy Pelosi and Mitch McConnell, in the collective lacks the foresight and wisdom to see beyond their petty aims and caprices, ignoring what is best for the greater good. Our institutions have also taken a major beating. Law enforcement, from local police forces like the NYPD to federal agencies, like the FBI and ICE, have been demoralized - sometimes beyond repair. Many otherwise competent officers have been driven out by DEI and other woke policies such as vaccine mandates, which have resulted in a weaker overall force. Liberal policies have created a chilling effect on speech, where anyone who supports a candidate or policy anathema to Woke Progressivism is kowtowed into submission, lest he risk losing his job or worse. Justice in America has been nearly vanquished: rather than prosecute violent criminals, prosecutors and district attorneys have received their marching orders from George Soros-types, choosing to mercilessly punish anyone who gets in their way. This system has all but destroyed what remains of constitutional governance - including its most important element of fair and impartial justice. Due process no longer exists in many parts of this country, including the Capitol, where illegitimately appointed "special counsels" have gone open season on political opponents - and for years with little accountability, always protected by a rogue and ruthless justice system. When all is said and done, the Jack Smith hatchet job will go down as one of the darkest chapters in the history of American justice. Lawfare - replete with communist judges and kangaroo courts - has brought this country to the brink of annihilation. Donald Trump was thus given a mandate to heal our society and bring respectability back to the institutions that have abdicated their public trust by abusing the powers they have been granted - to an order of magnitude never thought possible in the United States of America. Even if Donald Trump accomplished nothing more, his legacy has already been cemented: the sea change he ushered forth in our politics will continue to reverberate for years to come. But the President is well poised to deliver an agenda as consequential and historic as his victory. If successful, he will reshape both presidency and the country alike in his image, putting the United States on a forward-looking path that finally casts aside liberalism's fetishistic obsession for decline and stagnation once and for all. He will have engineered a model of governance that statesmen and stateswomen will be sure to emulate for decades to come. Fifty years from now, Donald Trump will be seen as the turning point in American history - where the shackles of a stagnant liberal order were finally shattered, and the ability for Americans to move confidently forward, having reclaimed their natural birthright as a dynamic and spirited people, was given a new lease on life. * Paul Ingrassia, a graduate of Fordham University and Cornell Law School, is an Attorney; Communications Director of the NCLU; a two-time Claremont Fellow, and is on the Board of Advisors of the NYYR Club and the Italian American Civil Rights League. He writes a widely read Substack that is regularly posted on Truth Social by President Trump., , , Paul submitted this editorial for publishing by PolitiBrawl. | **Leader Hakeem Jeffries: “House Democrats Will Take a Blowtorch to Project 2025”** Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats — and with major special elections coming up, _he could be our SPEAKER!_

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!** [**We’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow. We need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85497?t=6&akid=18233%2E878179%2EXmEObr) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85497?t=7&akid=18233%2E878179%2EXmEObr) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85497?t=8&akid=18233%2E878179%2EXmEObr)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House NEXT YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

[**So today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation for all your hard work and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85497?t=9&akid=18233%2E878179%2EXmEObr) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85497?t=10&akid=18233%2E878179%2EXmEObr) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85497?t=11&akid=18233%2E878179%2EXmEObr)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18233%2E878179%2EXmEObr). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18233%2E878179%2EXmEObr).**

body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e57e9b5532a141dfaba373ec698ce340&_e=iW1Rw6GcnsvmkfCaHhPfJKlhSDnOpDGpEjy_TTdk8QxoKmYp2S96HnNTx6g7OCS-rnn99wbbaHaAjqemFoZ8WcAHzrcX68miXsP5gRWvFdgFHMbFAur6vnb8K83BIHpSNkL6zA1e8NiFry0QUT8wwsM4g0Z7On_Wb7xGUcIW5ZiXtFAZTCmKeYh2TDOQ9DSMzCuxq-KynXFDi2ZvLKm7gWjoI3G3xZ5l4-ZMgmvAxxgW213DFoDiHVjvo0jQ0B-vV5jC-DO5m5vlqGO-lAqZOzN6C2RmawcoLIdENuIv4t638USWzCiO6Sw7qv0s8u7vbfFLKhyXrAvwYf34nN0HsrgnskrjI0YOdtKDL4ro9ing9458EK5mkFlOaSK02OzDFjFbEFT92Gbh2JdIGuTFww%3D%3D "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Peter,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?"

It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help).
It's not even school boards.
It's Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e57e9b5532a141dfaba373ec698ce340&_e=iW1Rw6GcnsvmkfCaHhPfJKlhSDnOpDGpEjy_TTdk8QxoKmYp2S96HnNTx6g7OCS-rnn99wbbaHaAjqemFoZ8WcAHzrcX68miXsP5gRWvFdgFHMbFAur6vnb8K83BIHpSNkL6zA1e8NiFry0QUT8wwsM4g0Z7On_Wb7xGUcIW5ZiXtFAZTCmKeYh2TDOQ9DSMzCuxq-KynXFDi2ZvLKm7gWjoI3G3xZ5l4-ZMgmvAxxiroEyys81iPvw8D1ntQeMSysxvs4FOzODaLC7bBIApWCzufatP4ld3__IR9WvifCZYxjkSZCfLfi88C6nXlT-GV_uwjCVJXMlUzhAX0G5C-ba_48F8wIA_x9NzYlNZ3W4ZW1JtHfN9p7acC8QwRyrJ52LPWq3iCtxhWDW_MUFsoA%3D%3D)[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e57e9b5532a141dfaba373ec698ce340&_e=iW1Rw6GcnsvmkfCaHhPfJKlhSDnOpDGpEjy_TTdk8QxoKmYp2S96HnNTx6g7OCS-rnn99wbbaHaAjqemFoZ8WcAHzrcX68miXsP5gRWvFdgFHMbFAur6vnb8K83BIHpSNkL6zA1e8NiFry0QUT8wwsM4g0Z7On_Wb7xGUcIW5ZiXtFAZTCmKeYh2TDOQ9DSMzCuxq-KynXFDi2ZvLKm7gWjoI3G3xZ5l4-ZMgmvAxxgd8TN0GdbhpwfU6wIsb20YwkcL9YTm6AXwL3x6pYJg1wrK6EitXqMr-KytCO9HKf8_6bIegjTcMyJPjUKJCla-mtxyheu63sz2HnaBaa5833q6L1AX-3IErlhHB4bwbXBSbZjSU5aR-WAOFhjYr9RMGUG_vTcR70kAgrUpgYPfGw%3D%3D)

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic.

Here's how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. clean_body: "SkyTree Book Fairs" Peter, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?" It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help). It's not even school boards. It's Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic. Here's how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It's the same with our kids' literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. |

name: Action Needed

subject: We have a shot at TWO Senate flips?!?!!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

name: Israel War Update
subject: Syria has Fallen, So What’s Next?
body:
Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of the hostages returned.

[View Email In Browser](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBz/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "View Email In Browser")
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBA/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Headline") Fellow Supporter of Israel: Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of the hostages returned. Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of Jewish bloodshed as a result of the war started by barbarians on October 7, 2023. Syria has fallen and the so-called ceasefire has too. Our brave soldiers must fight to secure Israel’s borders, rid the region of emboldened attackers all over the Middle East, and adapt to the escalating threats from Syria, but Israel doesn’t have enough supplies to properly win this war. **[Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBA/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?")** The bloody battlefields on our Northern and Southern borders, the attacks from Yemen, threats from Syria and direct attacks to and from the Head of the snake in Iran exact tremendous costs of life. We are in the fight for our lives against once again against enemies to whom our annihilation is their raison d'etre and the “ceasefire” appears unlikely to last. Yet, now, as in 1948, our State and our way of life are on the line... and our "Hagana," our IDF will not rest until our enemies get the message that we are not going anywhere. But they need bulletproof vests. They need Med kits. They need heavy winter coats and other emergency supplies that we simply don’t have the funds to provide them. **[That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBA/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.")** What Israel has overcome since October 7, 2023, has been nothing short of miraculous but the body count is rising. The brave IDF fighters require our support more than ever. They need supplies, clothes, food, and other necessities that we provide to them as Winter comes once again and the wars rage on. The latest developments in Syria increase the burden to the IDF and our security forces. **[Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBA/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.")** Can they count on you today? May the Lord Bless You and Keep You, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation | | [SUPPORT AN ISRAELI SOLDIER!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBA/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "SUPPORT AN ISRAELI SOLDIER!")
---

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBA/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Banner")

_The Genesis 123 Foundation is a US-based non-profit. Our mission is to build bridges between Jews and Christians with Israel in ways that are new, unique, and meaningful. We have diverse leadership of Jews and Christians united toward this objective, and aspire to create an abundance of programs to achieve these goals. We are excited to play a role in this important mission and hope you will join us and be blessed._
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=265381&trkid=562518736&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Anna Sophia Rowe
subject: Not “wringing our hands”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
Plus four reasons why we exist.| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98753538/517698349/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241214wringing_N_ASR_90DO_13_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlYjUyYTYyLTM4YmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ACJ9CLg8nJUBhLhSxU8tPqUcP_dSjqRmAeokGMWkSDI=)
---
Hi Peter,

Here’s the scary reality: Women’s rights will likely find themselves on the chopping block over the next four years.

Instead of wringing our hands and just worrying about it, here’s what we can **_actually do_** to make a difference: We can get to work ensuring women are in the rooms where laws are being written; installing women to the system of checks and balances our nation will depend on throughout the Trump administration.

We’re confident that more women in positions of power will create better outcomes for women over the next four years. Our success will depend on your help.

[**We rely on grassroots donations like yours to make our work possible. If you believe that women belong in the rooms where decisions are being made, please consider making a monthly donation to Her Bold Move today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98753539/517698350/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241214wringing_N_ASR_90DO_13_NG_N_L1&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlYjUyYTYyLTM4YmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ACJ9CLg8nJUBhLhSxU8tPqUcP_dSjqRmAeokGMWkSDI=) [MAKE A MONTHLY CONTRIBUTION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98753540/517698351/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241214wringing_N_ASR_90DO_13_NG_N_B1&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlYjUyYTYyLTM4YmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ACJ9CLg8nJUBhLhSxU8tPqUcP_dSjqRmAeokGMWkSDI=) Here is why our work is so important:

✅ **By electing qualified, pro-choice women to state and local offices, we are building necessary guardrails to defend against the potential damage of the incoming administration.** Research shows women leaders spend time working on women’s issues. The more women in the rooms where decisions are being made – the more likely we are to see women’s rights protected.

✅ **We are not afraid to work in deep red abortion ban states.** These are the states where women are truly being left behind and most desperately need women representing them in their government. We’re chipping away at the male GOP supermajorities in those states.

✅ **We are building a bench of qualified, pro-choice women.** The more women serving in our government, the more opportunities there will be for a woman to run for president and, FINALLY, win.

✅ **It is critical that our daughters see themselves reflected in their leaders.** We must ensure that there is female representation at every level of the American government.

This past election, 44% of our **_winners_** were women of color, and 47% of our **_winners_** came from abortion-ban states (!!!!!). Almost ALL of our winners shattered glass ceilings with their victories.

That ^ is the impact that we are having, and we are asking for your support to keep up the fight.

We have a vision for this country and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. It starts with electing more women to ALL levels of government. Please join us in this fight by making a monthly contribution to Her Bold Move today →

[**Thanks to grassroots dollars and support, we have grown exponentially since our founding. We are seeing results and success stories year after year. As we head into 2025, your monthly contribution will be what sustains us and truly makes our work possible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98753542/517698353/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241214wringing_N_ASR_90DO_13_NG_N_L2&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlYjUyYTYyLTM4YmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ACJ9CLg8nJUBhLhSxU8tPqUcP_dSjqRmAeokGMWkSDI=)

Thank you so much for being a part of this historic fight.

Onward,

Anna Sophia Rowe
Interim Social Media Director
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. clean_body: Plus four reasons why we exist.| | | | | = Hi Peter, Here’s the scary reality: Women’s rights will likely find themselves on the chopping block over the next four years. Instead of wringing our hands and just worrying about it, here’s what we can actually do to make a difference: We can get to work ensuring women are in the rooms where laws are being written; installing women to the system of checks and balances our nation will depend on throughout the Trump administration. We’re confident that more women in positions of power will create better outcomes for women over the next four years. Our success will depend on your help. = = Here is why our work is so important: ✅ By electing qualified, pro-choice women to state and local offices, we are building necessary guardrails to defend against the potential damage of the incoming administration. Research shows women leaders spend time working on women’s issues. The more women in the rooms where decisions are being made – the more likely we are to see women’s rights protected. ✅ We are not afraid to work in deep red abortion ban states. These are the states where women are truly being left behind and most desperately need women representing them in their government. We’re chipping away at the male GOP supermajorities in those states. ✅ We are building a bench of qualified, pro-choice women. The more women serving in our government, the more opportunities there will be for a woman to run for president and, FINALLY, win. ✅ It is critical that our daughters see themselves reflected in their leaders. We must ensure that there is female representation at every level of the American government. This past election, 44% of our winners were women of color, and 47% of our winners came from abortion-ban states (!!!!!). Almost ALL of our winners shattered glass ceilings with their victories. That ^ is the impact that we are having, and we are asking for your support to keep up the fight. We have a vision for this country and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. It starts with electing more women to ALL levels of government. Please join us in this fight by making a monthly contribution to Her Bold Move today → = Thank you so much for being a part of this historic fight. Onward, Anna Sophia Rowe Interim Social Media Director | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. body:
| Peter,

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a dairy farmer.**

I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees. That’s exactly why I decided to run for Elise Stefanik’s seat and why I’m asking for your support today.

[This is the closest House majority ever, so this race presents a real opportunity—and the work we do in the early days of the campaign will play a vital role in our success. Can I count on you to split $3 between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats to help us prepare for this special election and flip NY-21 blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98753706/517698808/-1092007712?amount=3&refcode=UD_20241215_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxYjUyYTYyLTM4YmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fYgNDnDZA6JdfxMtIqId7GNDoiB1cV9mV4diKNHrQz0=) | **[DONATE NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98753707/517698810/-1092007712?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=UD_20241215_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxYjUyYTYyLTM4YmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fYgNDnDZA6JdfxMtIqId7GNDoiB1cV9mV4diKNHrQz0=)**

The North Country doesn’t need another career politician who isn’t even from our district and is just using us to further their political ambitions. Now more than ever, we need a leader who understands the issues families face on a daily basis. In Congress, my sole focus will be to deliver results for the North Country and tackle these issues, but I need your help to get there.

In Congress, my sole focus will be to deliver results for the North Country and tackle these issues, but I need your help to get there. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Blake Gendebien and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: ** = = = Thank you, Blake | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 Please, consider making a =.
