name: Amanda Chase
subject: What happened Friday night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Special Election in Senate District 10
| | |
---
|
# LUTHER CIPHERS WINS THE REPUBLICAN NOMINATION
---
|
# What happened?
---
|
# THANK YOU TO MY SUPPORTERS

---
| Greetings!, In case you missed it, 972 registered voters participated in Friday's Republican Mass meeting, which took 3 rounds before political newcomer Luther Ciphers emerged as the winner.
Ultimately, 589 voters who stayed until the 3rd round of voting chose our Republican nominee, Luther Ciphers at 1:22am.
He is our Republican nominee who will take on Democrat nominee Jack Trammell in the January 7 Special Election to fill the vacancy left by Congressman-elect John McGuire.
Please mark your calendar for Tuesday, January 7 for voting at your regular polling location.
For more information about Luther Ciphers, please click the link here:
---
| [LUTHER CIPHERS WEBSITE](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Nr5WiAqM_jReAXIyTEPhssObDTU9ll8gCAHA8TtuzUEBYFZQNUuodg2SsgZWPHIAVz8UbkNmrVKeHBiK89rojDyER_DJ9369iDBP1YchXwhkux7r82QYePS9qH82-to4dMX5HlTCXCIfpIBEuUalxg==&c=A9z5BjONc4QUVhxqcqRg80G91wQNWgqDfY0dEWsQuNBuh0n6eCAlJw==&ch=Y8ANu3quQ_d9k6gb4EbS4I-zsIaAbr4-AWvUCQqabsza6rEhDwLaYw==)
---
Thank you to the volunteers who ran the Republican Mass meeting. While I'm not a fan of party processes that suppress voter turnout, I do appreciate the volunteers who worked hard to make the best of a very long night.
As many of you know, while I was in the Virginia Senate, I was the one Republican vote in the Virginia Senate to put an end to these types of elections beginning July 1 of this past year.
I believe you should be able to vote at your local polling location and then leave. Many of you have expressed you agree with me. It shouldn't take all day to cast a vote.
Thankfully, now these party processes to choose our Republican nominee will be the exception instead of the rule, as they are limited just to Special Elections.

---
| |
---
I want to thank 171 of my supporters for showing up on Friday, including one gentleman who was still recovering from heart surgery. Now that's commitment.
To those who donated, I want to thank you for your financial support. I couldn't have done this without you.
To my campaign team that was run by committed volunteers, thank you for donating your time and treasure.
Many of you have asked, "what's next for me?" My team and I are looking at our options. So stay tuned.
Right now we are going to enjoy time with our families for the holidays. Merry Christmas!
Finally, we are in the process of gathering our 4 by 8s campaign signs and metal posts. Please email Craig at craig@chaseforva.com and we will coordinate pick up. Many thanks.
For God & Country,
---
|
---
Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023
---
|
# "The world is run by those who show up."
---
|
# RESULTS BY ROUND
---
| |
Voting begin time: | ROUND 1 9pm | ROUND 2 11pm | ROUND 3 12:16am
---|---|---|---
Amanda Chase | THIRD PLACE 171 | THRID PLACE 95 | dropped
Jean Gannon | 124 | withdrew and endorsed Adams | dropped
Luther Ciphers | 2ND PLACE 210 | FIRST PLACE 330 | WINNER 332
Alex Cheatham | 3 | dropped | dropped
Duane Adams | FIRST PLACE 395 | SECOND PLACE 322 | 257
Brian Hamlett | 65 | dropped | dropped
Shayne Snavely | 4 | dropped | dropped
TOTAL VOTES | 972 | 748 | 589
|

Friend,

**The Left has found its first opportunity to cause chaos during Donald Trump 's Presidency: buying the FL-1 and FL-6 House seats in the upcoming Special Elections. **

Democrats are attempting to flip these open seats and infiltrate **RED** Florida with **BLUE** liberals.

name: Seth Moulton
subject: This election should have been a slam dunk for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
Sometimes we need to be willing to say the quiet part out loud even when the truth is uncomfortable: This election should have been a slam dunk for Democrats.

Yet, when I said that the party needed to stop looking down its nose at the very voters we lost across every corner of the country, and be willing to have open conversations about tough issues like the economy, the border, and divisive cultural issues, some in our party got very angry.

The chair of the local Democratic Party called me a Nazi cooperator. The head of the Political Science Department of a major Boston university said that my office was no longer welcome to contact them. And a primary challenger has already registered to run against me.

And all of this despite an overwhelming number of national voices echoing my concerns, not to mention the hundreds of calls and texts I’ve received from voters who said themselves, “I agree with you Seth, but it feels like I’m not allowed to say that out loud.”

It’s starting to feel like some Democrats just don’t want to win. Well, I do. And if you agree, I need your help.

If you’re with me, please consider making an early contribution to my re-election campaign. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

Make no mistake: if we aren’t willing to have difficult conversations as a party and if we continue to push out any voter that doesn’t adhere to the extreme left’s self-defined purity tests, we will continue to lose elections. And, as a result, the vulnerable people whose rights you and I want to protect are the people who will be hurt the most.

As a Marine, I learned about the power of the wisdom that emerges from a group of people with different opinions and experiences. I also learned to be a fighter. I will continue to fight for the individual freedoms of every American. But in order to do that we need to start by winning elections.

Join me today.

Seth

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
“The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6404333e5eb84af0b5c5c8998af74b71&_e=JxxUwohhzulx9QJ-kIKofx63BDh3xXHLvVdqZQTiDLQfHmHKUcsJtjn6O1q_ER8XXRV3brK2YRqnf1vsHr45CvKCZbgY4RiayEP2CdYR37CnkasoGrwAye76Znn8_KjHzuD1f2mIIab9IRme5UK6hHSbNC8lok781awRak6bmp30sEQwPVdt7S3Hg4PGtj2gnE09M4fjVr_K0lW4YWc1fe42oo_aenEqpKAWYDX0EZLpJsj-XZtUb-yloULsz9pwE79JkTzhkHB5OdLKu1YVc3SVL34YkoZ2RYTT9Kplx83IHaDuvVDd1XIzlSAuIecdIQcAR_mTQ7qr_QzJcvpLzjksGgHNS08J0_iZl1_MPuYxWQpJVR7kqo6SSLPl9EQZqN3n9iRBrLYxQ-6G1OKa_w%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6404333e5eb84af0b5c5c8998af74b71&_e=JxxUwohhzulx9QJ-kIKofx63BDh3xXHLvVdqZQTiDLQfHmHKUcsJtjn6O1q_ER8XXRV3brK2YRqnf1vsHr45CvKCZbgY4RiayEP2CdYR37CnkasoGrwAye76Znn8_KjHzuD1f2mIIab9IRme5UK6hHSbNC8lok781awRak6bmp30sEQwPVdt7S3Hg4PGtj2gnE09M4fjVr_K0lW4YWc1fe42oo_aenEqpKAWYDX0EZLpJsj-XZtUb-yloULsz9pwVTlcHgn0UMQGgcBw8U_hJcQJ5KY5-BIqy5f1pznc3A-MeulkxUArEAWeSdhOq9o_ejUzl-LSEy7yGxHX20iKZul_ORnXcUwvNK3nk4F4MBUJd4S9nKbeTvj39zeYR0p6QQlXszu1OLCyVxX0gkA4SQ%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6404333e5eb84af0b5c5c8998af74b71&_e=JxxUwohhzulx9QJ-kIKofx63BDh3xXHLvVdqZQTiDLQfHmHKUcsJtjn6O1q_ER8XXRV3brK2YRqnf1vsHr45CvKCZbgY4RiayEP2CdYR37CnkasoGrwAye76Znn8_KjHzuD1f2mIIab9IRme5UK6hHSbNC8lok781awRak6bmp30sEQwPVdt7S3Hg4PGtj2gnE09M4fjVr_K0lW4YWc1fe42oo_aenEqpKAWYDX0EZLpJsj-XZtUb-yloULsz9pwNtHBL-mJK0tJX8x0B3cIBTt2bJC6b0fGmI9EvbZ8ySo1vON2Z1AYJ2xWD0YPh_EOM84Oo4zBC3j1Pyr4-FYfxul-6qqP2dzUGF5XYVm6sLlr24oGH84uFmJWOZnzGuWqOqoTdIQR-zN-UUuXcFq2vw%3D%3D)**

It's the hottest ticket in America right now - and the guest list is COMPLETELY FULL. But when President Trump heard that you weren't on the list, he authorized two additional tickets to ensure his absolute best supporters will be there to celebrate. Since we're less than 40 days away from President Trump being inaugurated, he went ahead and took care of EVERYTHING for you - hotel stay, airfare, the works. Derek,

Normally when Adam’s name is mentioned online, it’s to uplift his powerful
work to deliver for California’s families, or it’s because the right-wing
is coming after him.

But over the last few weeks, Adam and this team have popped up in some fun
places.

Like on the holiday episode of Family Guy, where Brian compares emails to
messages just like this one.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20241215_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8218%2E5257348%2ExU-9yQ ]Adam Schiff's emails from his email program being mentioned on Family
Guy

Or in a recent New York Times crossword puzzle.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20241215_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8218%2E5257348%2ExU-9yQ ]New York Times Crossword Puzzle that says: Politician Schiff or
Kinzinger

And our favorite — for his swearing-in as a member of the United States
Senate!

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20241215_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=8218%2E5257348%2ExU-9yQ ]Adam and Eve posing for a photo

Adam wouldn’t have the high profile he does if it weren’t for your support
and how you have given him such a powerful platform,
Derek. And he most certainly
would not be in the U.S. Senate, working to deliver for California
families and defend our democracy.

Thanks for being on Team Schiff!

— Schiff HQ

body:
As we head into the these final days of 2024, remember this:

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=shl%2FROfMIjRKNQVCivybPGgZH1disnQFgRls6GCLqcVLXWVKSSDckW5aczsZKKmdDntaJkUvsTa7P0T0SgQ2g1Bz6XsDgZrMqu1zRQBr4C%2B635zF1rAFnBpbicUjt9hF7aL%2BplW2BFGCn0sbOlzH5ptT91vNZtgSXs%2FHqVWOcoPcj5yFjI6pWfX0eRnO3Kz%2F11%2Br1YqY9Ea8u3sDuKSg5aU6h3sMkhRaorKgU7H6zDsxUA7CdJOC65Sg3IEjK6dnFpaWaT7nMZJcRcJY6Lx7c623O%2Fp3Vf22itfENzwOUECMvbvyCJ13vB7S5QrUNzFUbxmG3%2Fd7nm8wJ0v14DDAk2YSRJkyIT76zGoi14UpAIdd%2BUswBHyLFiv4LFKb5x4wcgDZEzky%2BqFD1v429vTEWPlfp3gaRzlZ0SKdipERh00%3D)

| |
---
Hi Peter, Whenever things get tough, or look particularly hopeless, I like to turn to my favorite song, “Love’s in Need of Love Today” by Stevie Wonder. The lyrics ring true even now, almost 50 years after its release: _Hate's goin' 'round
Breaking hate's tried to break my heart many times_ **In times like this, it can sometimes feel like there’s only hate.** I know there are people all across our district, our state and our nation who are frustrated, anxious, angry, or fearful after the results of our Election. There is a sense of unease as we head back into uncharted territory, and for good reason. But when I take a step back and look at all the progress we’ve made, I’m reminded why I’ll never quit this work: my commitment to building a better future for our children and a better life for our communities. [It’s what guides me in Congress, and why we’re able to accomplish the good work we do. That’s why we set a $5,000 mid-month fundraising goal — to help us finish this year strong and maintain our momentum in this fight for progress. clean_body: As we head into the these final days of 2024, remember this: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, Whenever things get tough, or look particularly hopeless, I like to turn to my favorite song, “Love’s in Need of Love Today” by Stevie Wonder. The lyrics ring true even now, almost 50 years after its release: Hate's goin' 'round Breaking hate's tried to break my heart many times In times like this, it can sometimes feel like there’s only hate. I know there are people all across our district, our state and our nation who are frustrated, anxious, angry, or fearful after the results of our Election. There is a sense of unease as we head back into uncharted territory, and for good reason. But when I take a step back and look at all the progress we’ve made, I’m reminded why I’ll never quit this work: my commitment to building a better future for our children and a better life for our communities. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = As we head into the these final days of 2024, I’ll leave you with the final lyric of my favorite song — and my guiding principle in life: ♫ “Just give the world love.” ♫ – Stevie Wonder Thank you for dancing with me, Valerie | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, You can also =.

Republicans will control the House and the Senate, and Donald Trump will be sworn in for his second term as president. Jason is prepared to fight back against anything Trump and his Republican allies might do to make life harder for Coloradans — but he can’t do it alone.
That’s why it’s crucial to give our best effort before the end of 2024 and pick up the momentum we need to start the new year strong.

Republicans will control the House and the Senate, and Donald Trump will be sworn in for his second term as president. Jason is prepared to fight back against anything Trump and his Republican allies might do to make life harder for Coloradans — but he can’t do it alone. That’s why it’s crucial to give our best effort before the end of 2024 and pick up the momentum we need to start the new year strong. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army.
